```vbnet name=AppPaths.vb
Option Strict Off
Option Explicit On

Imports System.IO

Public Module AppPaths

    ' Base folder for this application's files on the Invoice server
    Public ReadOnly Property AppRoot As String = "\\invoice\MainMenu"

    ' All legacy/root files should live here going forward
    Public ReadOnly Property DataDir As String = Path.Combine(AppRoot, "Data")

    ' Zip outputs go here
    Public ReadOnly Property BackupDir As String = Path.Combine(AppRoot, "Backups")

    ' Word docs live outside the app root per your note
    Public ReadOnly Property WordDocsDir As String = "\\invoice\word"

End Module
```

```vbnet name=MigrationService.vb
Option Strict Off
Option Explicit On

Imports System
Imports System.IO
Imports System.Linq

Public Module MigrationService

    ' Legacy location (root of the share). Files used to be dumped here.
    Private ReadOnly LegacyRoot As String = "\\invoice"

    ' MigrationRule = Skip (per your decision)
    Public Sub EnsureFoldersAndMigrateOnce()
        Directory.CreateDirectory(AppPaths.AppRoot)
        Directory.CreateDirectory(AppPaths.DataDir)
        Directory.CreateDirectory(AppPaths.BackupDir)

        ' Move a known set of legacy file patterns from \\invoice\ to \\invoice\MainMenu\Data\
        ' Skip if destination already exists.
        Dim patterns As String() = {
            "*.DAT",
            "*.CUR",
            "*.LST",
            "*.PRC",
            "PACK.NUM",
            "BILLS.*",
            "*.CHK",
            "*.TXT"
        }

        For Each pattern In patterns
            Dim files As String() = Array.Empty(Of String)()

            Try
                files = Directory.GetFiles(LegacyRoot, pattern, SearchOption.TopDirectoryOnly)
            Catch
                ' If the share root isn't accessible or pattern fails, just continue.
                Continue For
            End Try

            For Each src In files
                Dim fileName As String = Path.GetFileName(src)
                Dim dest As String = Path.Combine(AppPaths.DataDir, fileName)

                ' Skip rule
                If File.Exists(dest) Then
                    Continue For
                End If

                ' Don't try to move our own folder if someone created files weirdly
                If String.Equals(src.TrimEnd("\"c), dest.TrimEnd("\"c), StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) Then
                    Continue For
                End If

                Try
                    File.Move(src, dest)
                Catch
                    ' If file is in use or permissions prevent move, skip.
                End Try
            Next
        Next
    End Sub

End Module
```

```vbnet name=BackupService.vb
Option Strict Off
Option Explicit On

Imports System
Imports System.IO
Imports System.IO.Compression
Imports System.Linq

Public Module BackupService

    ' Implements (I) Backup Price List & Rolodex in .NET.
    ' - Sources:
    '     \\invoice\MainMenu\Data\  (data files)
    '     \\invoice\word\*.doc      (word docs)
    ' - Outputs:
    '     \\invoice\MainMenu\Backups\WORD.zip
    '     \\invoice\MainMenu\Backups\BACKUP##.zip (rotating via PACK.NUM)

    Public Sub RunBackupPriceListAndRolodex()
        Directory.CreateDirectory(AppPaths.DataDir)
        Directory.CreateDirectory(AppPaths.BackupDir)

        ' 1) Backup Word docs to WORD.zip
        Dim wordZip As String = Path.Combine(AppPaths.BackupDir, "WORD.zip")
        CreateZipFromPattern(wordZip, AppPaths.WordDocsDir, "*.doc", SearchOption.TopDirectoryOnly)

        ' 2) Rotating backup for DataDir
        Dim nextNum As Integer = GetNextPackNumberAndAdvance(Path.Combine(AppPaths.DataDir, "PACK.NUM"))
        Dim backupZip As String = Path.Combine(AppPaths.BackupDir, $"BACKUP{nextNum}.zip")

        CreateZipForData(backupZip, AppPaths.DataDir)
    End Sub

    Private Sub CreateZipFromPattern(zipPath As String, folder As String, pattern As String, opt As SearchOption)
        If Not Directory.Exists(folder) Then
            ' If the Word share doesn't exist, still create an empty zip so the process is predictable.
            CreateEmptyZip(zipPath)
            Return
        End If

        Dim files = Directory.GetFiles(folder, pattern, opt)

        Using fs As New FileStream(zipPath, FileMode.Create, FileAccess.ReadWrite, FileShare.None)
            Using archive As New ZipArchive(fs, ZipArchiveMode.Create)
                For Each f In files
                    Dim entryName As String = Path.GetFileName(f)
                    archive.CreateEntryFromFile(f, entryName, CompressionLevel.Optimal)
                Next
            End Using
        End Using
    End Sub

    Private Sub CreateZipForData(zipPath As String, dataDir As String)
        If Not Directory.Exists(dataDir) Then
            CreateEmptyZip(zipPath)
            Return
        End If

        ' Match the spirit of the old backup: key business files in the data root.
        ' (No recursion by default.)
        Dim includePatterns As String() = {
            "*.DAT",
            "*.CUR",
            "PRC*.PRC",
            "PHONE*.LST",
            "BILLS.*",
            "PACK.NUM"
        }

        Dim files As New System.Collections.Generic.List(Of String)()

        For Each pat In includePatterns
            Try
                files.AddRange(Directory.GetFiles(dataDir, pat, SearchOption.TopDirectoryOnly))
            Catch
                ' ignore
            End Try
        Next

        ' De-dupe
        files = files.Distinct(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase).ToList()

        Using fs As New FileStream(zipPath, FileMode.Create, FileAccess.ReadWrite, FileShare.None)
            Using archive As New ZipArchive(fs, ZipArchiveMode.Create)
                For Each f In files
                    Dim entryName As String = Path.GetFileName(f)
                    archive.CreateEntryFromFile(f, entryName, CompressionLevel.Optimal)
                Next
            End Using
        End Using
    End Sub

    Private Sub CreateEmptyZip(zipPath As String)
        Using fs As New FileStream(zipPath, FileMode.Create, FileAccess.ReadWrite, FileShare.None)
            Using archive As New ZipArchive(fs, ZipArchiveMode.Create)
                ' no entries
            End Using
        End Using
    End Sub

    ' PACK.NUM behavior:
    ' - Stores a number (1..99)
    ' - Each run returns current value and increments it
    ' - Rolls over after 99 back to 1
    Private Function GetNextPackNumberAndAdvance(packNumPath As String) As Integer
        Dim n As Integer = 1

        Try
            If File.Exists(packNumPath) Then
                Dim txt As String = File.ReadAllText(packNumPath).Trim()
                If txt <> "" Then
                    Integer.TryParse(txt, n)
                End If
            End If
        Catch
            n = 1
        End Try

        If n < 1 OrElse n > 99 Then n = 1

        Dim nextN As Integer = n + 1
        If nextN > 99 Then nextN = 1

        Try
            File.WriteAllText(packNumPath, nextN.ToString())
        Catch
            ' If we can't write, still return n so backup can proceed.
        End Try

        Return n
    End Function

End Module
```

```vbnet name=FormMainMenu.vb
Option Strict Off
Option Explicit On

Imports System
Imports System.Drawing
Imports System.Windows.Forms

Partial Public Class FormMainMenu

    Protected Overrides Sub OnLoad(e As EventArgs)
        MyBase.OnLoad(e)

        Me.KeyPreview = True

        ' Ensure folders exist and migrate legacy root files (Skip rule)
        MigrationService.EnsureFoldersAndMigrateOnce()

        EnsureLayout()
        BuildMenu()
    End Sub

    Private Sub EnsureLayout()
        If tlpRoot Is Nothing Then Return
        If flpLeft Is Nothing OrElse flpRight Is Nothing Then Return

        tlpRoot.SuspendLayout()

        tlpRoot.Dock = DockStyle.Fill
        tlpRoot.ColumnStyles.Clear()
        tlpRoot.RowStyles.Clear()

        tlpRoot.ColumnCount = 2
        tlpRoot.RowCount = 1
        tlpRoot.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Percent, 50.0F))
        tlpRoot.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Percent, 50.0F))
        tlpRoot.RowStyles.Add(New RowStyle(SizeType.Percent, 100.0F))

        ConfigureMenuPanel(flpLeft)
        ConfigureMenuPanel(flpRight)

        If flpLeft.Parent IsNot tlpRoot OrElse flpRight.Parent IsNot tlpRoot Then
            tlpRoot.Controls.Clear()
            tlpRoot.Controls.Add(flpLeft, 0, 0)
            tlpRoot.Controls.Add(flpRight, 1, 0)
        Else
            tlpRoot.SetCellPosition(flpLeft, New TableLayoutPanelCellPosition(0, 0))
            tlpRoot.SetCellPosition(flpRight, New TableLayoutPanelCellPosition(1, 0))
        End If

        If Not Me.Controls.Contains(tlpRoot) Then
            Me.Controls.Add(tlpRoot)
        End If

        For i As Integer = Me.Controls.Count - 1 To 0 Step -1
            Dim c = Me.Controls(i)
            If c IsNot tlpRoot Then
                Me.Controls.RemoveAt(i)
            End If
        Next

        tlpRoot.ResumeLayout(performLayout:=True)
    End Sub

    Private Sub ConfigureMenuPanel(panel As FlowLayoutPanel)
        panel.SuspendLayout()

        panel.Dock = DockStyle.Fill
        panel.AutoScroll = True
        panel.FlowDirection = FlowDirection.TopDown
        panel.WrapContents = False
        panel.Padding = New Padding(10)

        panel.ResumeLayout(performLayout:=True)
    End Sub

    Private Sub BuildMenu()
        flpLeft.Controls.Clear()
        flpRight.Controls.Clear()

        flpLeft.Controls.Add(MakeHeaderLabel("Main Menu (Left)"))
        flpRight.Controls.Add(MakeHeaderLabel("Main Menu (Right)"))

        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "A", "Shop Card Generator")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "B", "Invoice Generator")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "C", "Checks and Cash Receipts")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "D", "View Sales Journal")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "E", "View Log Book")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "F", "Price List Program")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "G", "Print Records / Void Invoices")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "H", "Quick Message Flashing")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "I", "Backup Price List & Rolodex")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "J", "Print Out Customers Actual Names")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "K", "Cash Disbursements")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "L", "Business Expenses Account")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "M", "Quotation Form Generator")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "N", "Rolodex")

        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "O", "Copy Spec Index")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "P", "Entire Ledger Viewing")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "Q", "Word Processor")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "R", "Find Word Processor Text")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "T", "Change Date or Time")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "X", "Typewriter Mode")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "Y", "Ed Dean's Personal Backup")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "Z", "Personal Calendar")

        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "1", "Mileage Tracking")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "2", "Product Purchasing")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "3", "Miscellaneous Menu")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "4", "Add Entries to Log Book")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "6", "Cadmium Cards")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "7", "Emergency PAYROLL System")

        ResizeButtonsToPanel(flpLeft)
        ResizeButtonsToPanel(flpRight)
    End Sub

    Private Function MakeHeaderLabel(text As String) As Label
        Dim lbl As New Label()
        lbl.AutoSize = False
        lbl.Height = 32
        lbl.Dock = DockStyle.Top
        lbl.TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft
        lbl.Font = New Font(Me.Font, FontStyle.Bold)
        lbl.Text = text
        lbl.Margin = New Padding(3, 3, 3, 8)
        Return lbl
    End Function

    Private Sub AddMenuButton(panel As FlowLayoutPanel, key As String, text As String)
        Dim btn As New Button()

        btn.AutoSize = False
        btn.Height = 34
        btn.TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft
        btn.Text = $"({key}) {text}"
        btn.Tag = key
        btn.Margin = New Padding(3, 3, 3, 6)
        btn.UseVisualStyleBackColor = True

        AddHandler btn.Click, Sub(sender, args) HandleMenuKey(CStr(btn.Tag))

        panel.Controls.Add(btn)
    End Sub

    Protected Overrides Sub OnResize(e As EventArgs)
        MyBase.OnResize(e)
        ResizeButtonsToPanel(flpLeft)
        ResizeButtonsToPanel(flpRight)
    End Sub

    Private Sub ResizeButtonsToPanel(panel As FlowLayoutPanel)
        If panel Is Nothing Then Return

        Dim targetWidth As Integer = panel.ClientSize.Width - panel.Padding.Left - panel.Padding.Right - 5
        If targetWidth < 50 Then targetWidth = 50

        For Each c As Control In panel.Controls
            Dim btn = TryCast(c, Button)
            Dim lbl = TryCast(c, Label)

            If btn IsNot Nothing Then
                btn.Width = targetWidth
            ElseIf lbl IsNot Nothing Then
                lbl.Width = targetWidth
            End If
        Next
    End Sub

    Private Sub FormMainMenu_KeyPress(sender As Object, e As KeyPressEventArgs) Handles Me.KeyPress
        Dim ch As String = e.KeyChar.ToString()
        If ch = vbCr OrElse ch = vbLf Then Return
        HandleMenuKey(ch)
    End Sub

    Private Sub HandleMenuKey(ch As String)
        If String.IsNullOrEmpty(ch) Then Return

        Dim up As String = ch
        If up.Length = 1 AndAlso Char.IsLetter(up(0)) Then
            up = up.ToUpperInvariant()
        End If

        Select Case up
            Case "I"
                Try
                    Cursor = Cursors.WaitCursor
                    BackupService.RunBackupPriceListAndRolodex()
                    MessageBox.Show($"Backup complete.{Environment.NewLine}{Environment.NewLine}Backups folder:{Environment.NewLine}{AppPaths.BackupDir}",
                                    "Backup",
                                    MessageBoxButtons.OK,
                                    MessageBoxIcon.Information)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    MessageBox.Show("Backup failed: " & ex.Message, "Backup", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
                Finally
                    Cursor = Cursors.Default
                End Try

            Case "Y"
                ' Placeholder until we translate/replace the original CHAIN "EDBACKUP"
                NotYet("Ed Dean's Personal Backup (needs spec/source)")

            Case "A" : NotYet("Shop Card Generator")
            Case "B" : NotYet("Invoice Generator")
            Case "C" : NotYet("Checks and Cash Receipts (LEDGER)")
            Case "D" : NotYet("View Sales Journal (SALES)")
            Case "E" : NotYet("View Log Book (LOGBOOK)")
            Case "F" : NotYet("Price List Program (plist)")
            Case "G" : NotYet("Print/Void Invoices (BOOT)")
            Case "H" : NotYet("Quick Message Flashing")
            Case "J" : NotYet("Print Out Customers Actual Names (spool real names)")
            Case "K" : NotYet("Cash Disbursements (BILL)")
            Case "L" : NotYet("Business Expenses Account (password)")
            Case "M" : NotYet("Quotation Form Generator (QUOTE)")
            Case "N" : NotYet("Rolodex (PHONE)")

            Case "O" : NotYet("Copy Spec Index")
            Case "P" : NotYet("Entire Ledger Viewing (ENTIRE)")
            Case "Q" : NotYet("Word Processor")
            Case "R" : NotYet("Find Word Processor Text")
            Case "T" : NotYet("Change Date or Time (placeholder)")
            Case "X" : NotYet("Typewriter Mode (placeholder)")
            Case "Z" : NotYet("Personal Calendar")

            Case "1" : NotYet("Mileage Tracking")
            Case "2" : NotYet("Product Purchasing")
            Case "3" : NotYet("Miscellaneous Menu")
            Case "4" : NotYet("Add Entries to Log Book")
            Case "6" : NotYet("Cadmium Cards")
            Case "7" : NotYet("Emergency PAYROLL System")

            Case Else
                ' ignore
        End Select
    End Sub

    Private Sub NotYet(feature As String)
        MessageBox.Show("Not implemented yet: " & feature, "Port status", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information)
    End Sub

End Class
```

## @testsubject117

Question. When we are done, will this code require the physical DOS .bas files and other files currently existing in the root of Invoice?

## Copilot

No—**once a feature is fully ported to VB.NET**, it will **not** require the original DOS `.BAS` files at runtime.

What it *will* still require are the **data files** (whatever your business data is), but those are not “DOS BAS files”—they’re things like `*.DAT`, `*.CUR`, `*.LST`, etc., and we’re explicitly moving/standardizing those into:

- `\\invoice\MainMenu\Data\`

### What depends on the DOS `.BAS` files today
Right now, your WinForms project is **not loading or interpreting `.BAS`** at all. The only time DOS `.BAS` would still matter is if:
- you still run parts of the old system externally (e.g., via `SHELL`, `CHAIN` in BASIC, or launching a DOS EXE), or
- you haven’t ported a module yet and you’re using the old DOS program as a stopgap.

In the code we’ve written so far:
- The menu is pure WinForms.
- The backup (I) is pure .NET (`System.IO` + `System.IO.Compression`).
- The migration is pure .NET.

So **for (I)** specifically: **no `.BAS` needed**—only the files being backed up (data + Word docs).

### What about the “files currently existing in the root of Invoice”?
Those are in two categories:

1) **Legacy data files in `\\invoice\` root**  
   During the transition, we *may* still see them there. Our migration step moves them to `\\invoice\MainMenu\Data\` (with your rule = **Skip if already exists**). After migration and once you confirm everything is working, you can keep the root clean.

2) **Legacy DOS program files (`.BAS`, old EXEs, batch files, etc.)**  
   The new app won’t need them **unless** you choose to keep launching them for unported options. Our current code is *not* launching them.

### Practical recommendation
- Keep the old DOS folder intact **until every menu option is ported and validated**.
- After that, the WinForms app should only depend on:
  - `\\invoice\MainMenu\...` (your app data + backups)
  - `\\invoice\word\...` (Word docs)

If you tell me which remaining menu options you plan to actually keep (vs retire), I can also tell you when it’s safe to delete the old DOS program files.

## @testsubject117

we can review that at the end of the project

## Copilot

Sounds good—we’ll revisit cleanup/decommissioning at the end.

For now, the working rule will be:

- **Ported features must not depend on any DOS `.BAS` files** (or running DOS programs).
- We’ll keep the legacy DOS files and any root files in place during the transition for safety, but the .NET app will progressively stop needing them as each module is replaced.

When you’re ready for the next step, tell me whether you want to:
1) add a small **progress UI** for the (I) backup (so it doesn’t look frozen), or
2) start porting the next feature (common next choices: **Rolodex (N)**, **Invoice Generator (B)**, or **Typewriter Mode (X)**).

can you generate your current FormMainMenu.vb code so I can copy and paste it

## Copilot

```vbnet
Option Strict Off
Option Explicit On

Imports System
Imports System.Drawing
Imports System.Windows.Forms

Partial Public Class FormMainMenu

    Protected Overrides Sub OnLoad(e As EventArgs)
        MyBase.OnLoad(e)

        Me.KeyPreview = True

        ' Ensure folders exist and migrate legacy root files (Skip rule)
        MigrationService.EnsureFoldersAndMigrateOnce()

        EnsureLayout()
        BuildMenu()
    End Sub

    Private Sub EnsureLayout()
        If tlpRoot Is Nothing Then Return
        If flpLeft Is Nothing OrElse flpRight Is Nothing Then Return

        tlpRoot.SuspendLayout()

        tlpRoot.Dock = DockStyle.Fill
        tlpRoot.ColumnStyles.Clear()
        tlpRoot.RowStyles.Clear()

        tlpRoot.ColumnCount = 2
        tlpRoot.RowCount = 1
        tlpRoot.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Percent, 50.0F))
        tlpRoot.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Percent, 50.0F))
        tlpRoot.RowStyles.Add(New RowStyle(SizeType.Percent, 100.0F))

        ConfigureMenuPanel(flpLeft)
        ConfigureMenuPanel(flpRight)

        If flpLeft.Parent IsNot tlpRoot OrElse flpRight.Parent IsNot tlpRoot Then
            tlpRoot.Controls.Clear()
            tlpRoot.Controls.Add(flpLeft, 0, 0)
            tlpRoot.Controls.Add(flpRight, 1, 0)
        Else
            tlpRoot.SetCellPosition(flpLeft, New TableLayoutPanelCellPosition(0, 0))
            tlpRoot.SetCellPosition(flpRight, New TableLayoutPanelCellPosition(1, 0))
        End If

        If Not Me.Controls.Contains(tlpRoot) Then
            Me.Controls.Add(tlpRoot)
        End If

        For i As Integer = Me.Controls.Count - 1 To 0 Step -1
            Dim c = Me.Controls(i)
            If c IsNot tlpRoot Then
                Me.Controls.RemoveAt(i)
            End If
        Next

        tlpRoot.ResumeLayout(performLayout:=True)
    End Sub

    Private Sub ConfigureMenuPanel(panel As FlowLayoutPanel)
        panel.SuspendLayout()

        panel.Dock = DockStyle.Fill
        panel.AutoScroll = True
        panel.FlowDirection = FlowDirection.TopDown
        panel.WrapContents = False
        panel.Padding = New Padding(10)

        panel.ResumeLayout(performLayout:=True)
    End Sub

    Private Sub BuildMenu()
        flpLeft.Controls.Clear()
        flpRight.Controls.Clear()

        flpLeft.Controls.Add(MakeHeaderLabel("Main Menu (Left)"))
        flpRight.Controls.Add(MakeHeaderLabel("Main Menu (Right)"))

        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "A", "Shop Card Generator")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "B", "Invoice Generator")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "C", "Checks and Cash Receipts")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "D", "View Sales Journal")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "E", "View Log Book")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "F", "Price List Program")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "G", "Print Records / Void Invoices")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "H", "Quick Message Flashing")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "I", "Backup Price List & Rolodex")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "J", "Print Out Customers Actual Names")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "K", "Cash Disbursements")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "L", "Business Expenses Account")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "M", "Quotation Form Generator")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "N", "Rolodex")

        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "O", "Copy Spec Index")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "P", "Entire Ledger Viewing")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "Q", "Word Processor")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "R", "Find Word Processor Text")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "T", "Change Date or Time")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "X", "Typewriter Mode")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "Y", "Ed Dean's Personal Backup")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "Z", "Personal Calendar")

        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "1", "Mileage Tracking")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "2", "Product Purchasing")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "3", "Miscellaneous Menu")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "4", "Add Entries to Log Book")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "6", "Cadmium Cards")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "7", "Emergency PAYROLL System")

        ResizeButtonsToPanel(flpLeft)
        ResizeButtonsToPanel(flpRight)
    End Sub

    Private Function MakeHeaderLabel(text As String) As Label
        Dim lbl As New Label()
        lbl.AutoSize = False
        lbl.Height = 32
        lbl.Dock = DockStyle.Top
        lbl.TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft
        lbl.Font = New Font(Me.Font, FontStyle.Bold)
        lbl.Text = text
        lbl.Margin = New Padding(3, 3, 3, 8)
        Return lbl
    End Function

    Private Sub AddMenuButton(panel As FlowLayoutPanel, key As String, text As String)
        Dim btn As New Button()

        btn.AutoSize = False
        btn.Height = 34
        btn.TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft
        btn.Text = $"({key}) {text}"
        btn.Tag = key
        btn.Margin = New Padding(3, 3, 3, 6)
        btn.UseVisualStyleBackColor = True

        AddHandler btn.Click, Sub(sender, args) HandleMenuKey(CStr(btn.Tag))

        panel.Controls.Add(btn)
    End Sub

    Protected Overrides Sub OnResize(e As EventArgs)
        MyBase.OnResize(e)
        ResizeButtonsToPanel(flpLeft)
        ResizeButtonsToPanel(flpRight)
    End Sub

    Private Sub ResizeButtonsToPanel(panel As FlowLayoutPanel)
        If panel Is Nothing Then Return

        Dim targetWidth As Integer = panel.ClientSize.Width - panel.Padding.Left - panel.Padding.Right - 5
        If targetWidth < 50 Then targetWidth = 50

        For Each c As Control In panel.Controls
            Dim btn = TryCast(c, Button)
            Dim lbl = TryCast(c, Label)

            If btn IsNot Nothing Then
                btn.Width = targetWidth
            ElseIf lbl IsNot Nothing Then
                lbl.Width = targetWidth
            End If
        Next
    End Sub

    Private Sub FormMainMenu_KeyPress(sender As Object, e As KeyPressEventArgs) Handles Me.KeyPress
        Dim ch As String = e.KeyChar.ToString()
        If ch = vbCr OrElse ch = vbLf Then Return
        HandleMenuKey(ch)
    End Sub

    Private Sub HandleMenuKey(ch As String)
        If String.IsNullOrEmpty(ch) Then Return

        Dim up As String = ch
        If up.Length = 1 AndAlso Char.IsLetter(up(0)) Then
            up = up.ToUpperInvariant()
        End If

        Select Case up
            Case "I"
                Try
                    Cursor = Cursors.WaitCursor
                    BackupService.RunBackupPriceListAndRolodex()
                    MessageBox.Show($"Backup complete.{Environment.NewLine}{Environment.NewLine}Backups folder:{Environment.NewLine}{AppPaths.BackupDir}",
                                    "Backup",
                                    MessageBoxButtons.OK,
                                    MessageBoxIcon.Information)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    MessageBox.Show("Backup failed: " & ex.Message, "Backup", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
                Finally
                    Cursor = Cursors.Default
                End Try

            Case "Y"
                ' Placeholder until we translate/replace the original CHAIN "EDBACKUP"
                NotYet("Ed Dean's Personal Backup (needs spec/source)")

            Case "A" : NotYet("Shop Card Generator")
            Case "B" : NotYet("Invoice Generator")
            Case "C" : NotYet("Checks and Cash Receipts (LEDGER)")
            Case "D" : NotYet("View Sales Journal (SALES)")
            Case "E" : NotYet("View Log Book (LOGBOOK)")
            Case "F" : NotYet("Price List Program (plist)")
            Case "G" : NotYet("Print/Void Invoices (BOOT)")
            Case "H" : NotYet("Quick Message Flashing")
            Case "J" : NotYet("Print Out Customers Actual Names (spool real names)")
            Case "K" : NotYet("Cash Disbursements (BILL)")
            Case "L" : NotYet("Business Expenses Account (password)")
            Case "M" : NotYet("Quotation Form Generator (QUOTE)")
            Case "N" : NotYet("Rolodex (PHONE)")

            Case "O" : NotYet("Copy Spec Index")
            Case "P" : NotYet("Entire Ledger Viewing (ENTIRE)")
            Case "Q" : NotYet("Word Processor")
            Case "R" : NotYet("Find Word Processor Text")
            Case "T" : NotYet("Change Date or Time (placeholder)")
            Case "X" : NotYet("Typewriter Mode (placeholder)")
            Case "Z" : NotYet("Personal Calendar")

            Case "1" : NotYet("Mileage Tracking")
            Case "2" : NotYet("Product Purchasing")
            Case "3" : NotYet("Miscellaneous Menu")
            Case "4" : NotYet("Add Entries to Log Book")
            Case "6" : NotYet("Cadmium Cards")
            Case "7" : NotYet("Emergency PAYROLL System")

            Case Else
                ' ignore
        End Select
    End Sub

    Private Sub NotYet(feature As String)
        MessageBox.Show("Not implemented yet: " & feature, "Port status", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information)
    End Sub

End Class
```

## Copilot

Those “lots of errors” are almost certainly because the newer `FormMainMenu.vb` I generated **introduced new dependencies** that don’t exist (or aren’t wired up) in your project yet:

- `MigrationService`
- `BackupService`
- `AppPaths`

If those modules/files aren’t actually present in the project (or named differently), VB will error.

### Fast fix (so you can compile right now)
Use your working menu code, but change only **(I)** to call the backup later *without requiring new modules yet*. In other words: keep the UI stable, and we’ll add backup/migration after you confirm those files are added.

Here is a “safe” `FormMainMenu.vb` that matches the version you said builds, with the removed buttons, and **no references to MigrationService/BackupService/AppPaths**:

```vbnet
Option Strict Off
Option Explicit On

Imports System
Imports System.Drawing
Imports System.Windows.Forms

Partial Public Class FormMainMenu

    Protected Overrides Sub OnLoad(e As EventArgs)
        MyBase.OnLoad(e)

        Me.KeyPreview = True
        EnsureLayout()
        BuildMenu()
    End Sub

    Private Sub EnsureLayout()
        If tlpRoot Is Nothing Then Return
        If flpLeft Is Nothing OrElse flpRight Is Nothing Then Return

        tlpRoot.SuspendLayout()

        tlpRoot.Dock = DockStyle.Fill
        tlpRoot.ColumnStyles.Clear()
        tlpRoot.RowStyles.Clear()

        tlpRoot.ColumnCount = 2
        tlpRoot.RowCount = 1
        tlpRoot.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Percent, 50.0F))
        tlpRoot.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Percent, 50.0F))
        tlpRoot.RowStyles.Add(New RowStyle(SizeType.Percent, 100.0F))

        ConfigureMenuPanel(flpLeft)
        ConfigureMenuPanel(flpRight)

        If flpLeft.Parent IsNot tlpRoot OrElse flpRight.Parent IsNot tlpRoot Then
            tlpRoot.Controls.Clear()
            tlpRoot.Controls.Add(flpLeft, 0, 0)
            tlpRoot.Controls.Add(flpRight, 1, 0)
        Else
            tlpRoot.SetCellPosition(flpLeft, New TableLayoutPanelCellPosition(0, 0))
            tlpRoot.SetCellPosition(flpRight, New TableLayoutPanelCellPosition(1, 0))
        End If

        If Not Me.Controls.Contains(tlpRoot) Then
            Me.Controls.Add(tlpRoot)
        End If

        For i As Integer = Me.Controls.Count - 1 To 0 Step -1
            Dim c = Me.Controls(i)
            If c IsNot tlpRoot Then
                Me.Controls.RemoveAt(i)
            End If
        Next

        tlpRoot.ResumeLayout(performLayout:=True)
    End Sub

    Private Sub ConfigureMenuPanel(panel As FlowLayoutPanel)
        panel.SuspendLayout()

        panel.Dock = DockStyle.Fill
        panel.AutoScroll = True
        panel.FlowDirection = FlowDirection.TopDown
        panel.WrapContents = False
        panel.Padding = New Padding(10)

        panel.ResumeLayout(performLayout:=True)
    End Sub

    Private Sub BuildMenu()
        flpLeft.Controls.Clear()
        flpRight.Controls.Clear()

        flpLeft.Controls.Add(MakeHeaderLabel("Main Menu (Left)"))
        flpRight.Controls.Add(MakeHeaderLabel("Main Menu (Right)"))

        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "A", "Shop Card Generator")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "B", "Invoice Generator")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "C", "Checks and Cash Receipts")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "D", "View Sales Journal")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "E", "View Log Book")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "F", "Price List Program")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "G", "Print Records / Void Invoices")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "H", "Quick Message Flashing")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "I", "Backup Price List & Rolodex")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "J", "Print Out Customers Actual Names")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "K", "Cash Disbursements")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "L", "Business Expenses Account")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "M", "Quotation Form Generator")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "N", "Rolodex")

        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "O", "Copy Spec Index")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "P", "Entire Ledger Viewing")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "Q", "Word Processor")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "R", "Find Word Processor Text")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "T", "Change Date or Time")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "X", "Typewriter Mode")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "Y", "Ed Dean's Personal Backup")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "Z", "Personal Calendar")

        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "1", "Mileage Tracking")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "2", "Product Purchasing")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "3", "Miscellaneous Menu")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "4", "Add Entries to Log Book")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "6", "Cadmium Cards")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "7", "Emergency PAYROLL System")

        ResizeButtonsToPanel(flpLeft)
        ResizeButtonsToPanel(flpRight)
    End Sub

    Private Function MakeHeaderLabel(text As String) As Label
        Dim lbl As New Label()
        lbl.AutoSize = False
        lbl.Height = 32
        lbl.Dock = DockStyle.Top
        lbl.TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft
        lbl.Font = New Font(Me.Font, FontStyle.Bold)
        lbl.Text = text
        lbl.Margin = New Padding(3, 3, 3, 8)
        Return lbl
    End Function

    Private Sub AddMenuButton(panel As FlowLayoutPanel, key As String, text As String)
        Dim btn As New Button()

        btn.AutoSize = False
        btn.Height = 34
        btn.TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft
        btn.Text = $"({key}) {text}"
        btn.Tag = key
        btn.Margin = New Padding(3, 3, 3, 6)
        btn.UseVisualStyleBackColor = True

        AddHandler btn.Click, Sub(sender, args) HandleMenuKey(CStr(btn.Tag))

        panel.Controls.Add(btn)
    End Sub

    Protected Overrides Sub OnResize(e As EventArgs)
        MyBase.OnResize(e)
        ResizeButtonsToPanel(flpLeft)
        ResizeButtonsToPanel(flpRight)
    End Sub

    Private Sub ResizeButtonsToPanel(panel As FlowLayoutPanel)
        If panel Is Nothing Then Return

        Dim targetWidth As Integer = panel.ClientSize.Width - panel.Padding.Left - panel.Padding.Right - 5
        If targetWidth < 50 Then targetWidth = 50

        For Each c As Control In panel.Controls
            Dim btn = TryCast(c, Button)
            Dim lbl = TryCast(c, Label)

            If btn IsNot Nothing Then
                btn.Width = targetWidth
            ElseIf lbl IsNot Nothing Then
                lbl.Width = targetWidth
            End If
        Next
    End Sub

    Private Sub FormMainMenu_KeyPress(sender As Object, e As KeyPressEventArgs) Handles Me.KeyPress
        Dim ch As String = e.KeyChar.ToString()
        If ch = vbCr OrElse ch = vbLf Then Return
        HandleMenuKey(ch)
    End Sub

    Private Sub HandleMenuKey(ch As String)
        If String.IsNullOrEmpty(ch) Then Return

        Dim up As String = ch
        If up.Length = 1 AndAlso Char.IsLetter(up(0)) Then
            up = up.ToUpperInvariant()
        End If

        Select Case up
            Case "A" : NotYet("Shop Card Generator")
            Case "B" : NotYet("Invoice Generator")
            Case "C" : NotYet("Checks and Cash Receipts (LEDGER)")
            Case "D" : NotYet("View Sales Journal (SALES)")
            Case "E" : NotYet("View Log Book (LOGBOOK)")
            Case "F" : NotYet("Price List Program (plist)")
            Case "G" : NotYet("Print/Void Invoices (BOOT)")
            Case "H" : NotYet("Quick Message Flashing")
            Case "I" : NotYet("Backup Price List & Rolodex (implement in .NET)")
            Case "J" : NotYet("Print Out Customers Actual Names (spool real names)")
            Case "K" : NotYet("Cash Disbursements (BILL)")
            Case "L" : NotYet("Business Expenses Account (password)")
            Case "M" : NotYet("Quotation Form Generator (QUOTE)")
            Case "N" : NotYet("Rolodex (PHONE)")

            Case "O" : NotYet("Copy Spec Index")
            Case "P" : NotYet("Entire Ledger Viewing (ENTIRE)")
            Case "Q" : NotYet("Word Processor")
            Case "R" : NotYet("Find Word Processor Text")

            ' REMOVED hotkeys: S, U, V, W, +, 5

            Case "T" : NotYet("Change Date or Time")
            Case "X" : NotYet("Typewriter Mode")
            Case "Y" : NotYet("Ed Dean's Personal Backup")
            Case "Z" : NotYet("Personal Calendar")

            Case "1" : NotYet("Mileage Tracking")
            Case "2" : NotYet("Product Purchasing")
            Case "3" : NotYet("Miscellaneous Menu")
            Case "4" : NotYet("Add Entries to Log Book")
            Case "6" : NotYet("Cadmium Cards")
            Case "7" : NotYet("Emergency PAYROLL System")

            Case Else
                ' ignore
        End Select
    End Sub

    Private Sub NotYet(feature As String)
        MessageBox.Show("Not implemented yet: " & feature, "Port status", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information)
    End Sub

End Class
```

```vbnet name=BackupConfig.vb

Public Class BackupConfig

    Public Property WordSourceDir As String = "F:\WORD"
    Public Property WorkingDir As String = AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory.TrimEnd("\"c)
    Public Property BackupDir As String = "C:\BACKUP"

    ' Mirrors GWBASIC control files
    Public Property PackNumPath As String = "C:\PACK.NUM"
    Public Property NotesPath As String = "NOTES-4.ED"
    Public Property ErrorsListPath As String = "ERRORS.LST"

    ' Rotation settings
    Public Property PackMin As Integer = 1
    Public Property PackMax As Integer = 99
End Class
```

That error means your project currently has **two methods named `EnsureLayout` with the exact same signature** (`Private Sub EnsureLayout()`) in the same `FormMainMenu` partial class (likely split across `FormMainMenu.vb` and another file, or you pasted the method twice).

### Fix (pick one)
**Option A (quickest):** keep only one `EnsureLayout()` method.  
Search your project for `Private Sub EnsureLayout()` and delete/rename the duplicate.

**Option B (safer when you’re pasting snippets):** rename the one in `FormMainMenu.vb` to something unique, and update the call site.

Here is the minimal change version (rename to `EnsureMenuLayout`):

```vbnet
' In OnLoad:
EnsureMenuLayout()
BuildMenu()

' Rename the method:
Private Sub EnsureMenuLayout()
    ' ...same body as EnsureLayout...
End Sub
```

```vbnet
Option Strict Off
Option Explicit On

Imports System
Imports System.Drawing
Imports System.Windows.Forms

Partial Public Class FormMainMenu

    ' NOTE:
    ' - True GUI menu (no terminal emulation).
    ' - Assumes FormMainMenu.Designer.vb defines:
    '     Friend WithEvents flpLeft As FlowLayoutPanel
    '     Friend WithEvents flpRight As FlowLayoutPanel
    '     Friend WithEvents tlpRoot As TableLayoutPanel
    ' - This file intentionally uses a UNIQUE layout method name to avoid
    '   "Overload resolution failed..." if another partial class already has EnsureLayout().

    Protected Overrides Sub OnLoad(e As EventArgs)
        MyBase.OnLoad(e)

        Me.KeyPreview = True
        EnsureMenuLayout()
        BuildMenu()
    End Sub

    ' Renamed from EnsureLayout() -> EnsureMenuLayout() to avoid duplicate method name collisions
    Private Sub EnsureMenuLayout()
        If tlpRoot Is Nothing Then Return
        If flpLeft Is Nothing OrElse flpRight Is Nothing Then Return

        tlpRoot.SuspendLayout()

        tlpRoot.Dock = DockStyle.Fill
        tlpRoot.ColumnStyles.Clear()
        tlpRoot.RowStyles.Clear()

        tlpRoot.ColumnCount = 2
        tlpRoot.RowCount = 1
        tlpRoot.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Percent, 50.0F))
        tlpRoot.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Percent, 50.0F))
        tlpRoot.RowStyles.Add(New RowStyle(SizeType.Percent, 100.0F))

        ConfigureMenuPanel(flpLeft)
        ConfigureMenuPanel(flpRight)

        If flpLeft.Parent IsNot tlpRoot OrElse flpRight.Parent IsNot tlpRoot Then
            tlpRoot.Controls.Clear()
            tlpRoot.Controls.Add(flpLeft, 0, 0)
            tlpRoot.Controls.Add(flpRight, 1, 0)
        Else
            tlpRoot.SetCellPosition(flpLeft, New TableLayoutPanelCellPosition(0, 0))
            tlpRoot.SetCellPosition(flpRight, New TableLayoutPanelCellPosition(1, 0))
        End If

        If Not Me.Controls.Contains(tlpRoot) Then
            Me.Controls.Add(tlpRoot)
        End If

        ' Remove any other root-level controls (keeps only tlpRoot)
        For i As Integer = Me.Controls.Count - 1 To 0 Step -1
            Dim c = Me.Controls(i)
            If c IsNot tlpRoot Then
                Me.Controls.RemoveAt(i)
            End If
        Next

        tlpRoot.ResumeLayout(performLayout:=True)
    End Sub

    Private Sub ConfigureMenuPanel(panel As FlowLayoutPanel)
        panel.SuspendLayout()

        panel.Dock = DockStyle.Fill
        panel.AutoScroll = True

        panel.WrapContents = False
```

## @testsubject117

Overload resolution failed because no accessible 'EnsureMenuLayout' is most specific for these arguments:
    'Private Sub EnsureMenuLayout()': Not most specific.
    'Private Sub EnsureMenuLayout()': Not most specific.

## Copilot

You’re still getting the same error because you now have **two `EnsureMenuLayout()` methods** in the *same* `FormMainMenu` partial class (in two different partial files, or duplicated in the same file). Renaming alone won’t help if the name exists twice.

The only “regeneration” that fixes this **without requiring you to hunt duplicates** is to **remove the call entirely** and let the designer layout stand (i.e., don’t force the runtime layout from code). The menu will still build and buttons will still work.

Below is a corrected `FormMainMenu.vb` that:

- keeps your working menu/button code
- removes the problematic layout call and method (so no overload ambiguity)
- still supports KeyPress hotkeys
- still has the removed buttons (5, +, S, U, V, W) excluded

Paste this to fully replace your current `FormMainMenu.vb`:

```vbnet
Option Strict Off
Option Explicit On

Imports System
Imports System.Drawing
Imports System.Windows.Forms

Partial Public Class FormMainMenu

    Protected Overrides Sub OnLoad(e As EventArgs)
        MyBase.OnLoad(e)

        Me.KeyPreview = True

        ' IMPORTANT:
        ' Your project currently has duplicate layout helpers in partial classes.
        ' To avoid "Overload resolution failed..." we do NOT call any EnsureLayout method here.
        ' Layout should be handled by the Designer (FormMainMenu.Designer.vb).
        BuildMenu()
    End Sub

    Private Sub BuildMenu()
        If flpLeft Is Nothing OrElse flpRight Is Nothing Then Return

        flpLeft.Controls.Clear()
        flpRight.Controls.Clear()

        ' Optional headers
        flpLeft.Controls.Add(MakeHeaderLabel("Main Menu (Left)"))
        flpRight.Controls.Add(MakeHeaderLabel("Main Menu (Right)"))

        ' Left column
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "A", "Shop Card Generator")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "B", "Invoice Generator")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "C", "Checks and Cash Receipts")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "D", "View Sales Journal")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "E", "View Log Book")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "F", "Price List Program")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "G", "Print Records / Void Invoices")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "H", "Quick Message Flashing")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "I", "Backup Price List & Rolodex")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "J", "Print Out Customers Actual Names")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "K", "Cash Disbursements")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "L", "Business Expenses Account")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "M", "Quotation Form Generator")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "N", "Rolodex")

        ' Right column (REMOVED: 5, +, S, U, V, W)
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "O", "Copy Spec Index")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "P", "Entire Ledger Viewing")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "Q", "Word Processor")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "R", "Find Word Processor Text")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "T", "Change Date or Time")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "X", "Typewriter Mode")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "Y", "Ed Dean's Personal Backup")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "Z", "Personal Calendar")

        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "1", "Mileage Tracking")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "2", "Product Purchasing")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "3", "Miscellaneous Menu")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "4", "Add Entries to Log Book")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "6", "Cadmium Cards")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "7", "Emergency PAYROLL System")

        ResizeButtonsToPanel(flpLeft)
        ResizeButtonsToPanel(flpRight)
    End Sub

    Private Function MakeHeaderLabel(text As String) As Label
        Dim lbl As New Label()
        lbl.AutoSize = False
        lbl.Height = 32
        lbl.Dock = DockStyle.Top
        lbl.TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft
        lbl.Font = New Font(Me.Font, FontStyle.Bold)
        lbl.Text = text
        lbl.Margin = New Padding(3, 3, 3, 8)
        Return lbl
    End Function

    Private Sub AddMenuButton(panel As FlowLayoutPanel, key As String, text As String)
        Dim btn As New Button()

        btn.AutoSize = False
        btn.Height = 34
        btn.TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft
        btn.Text = $"({key}) {text}"
        btn.Tag = key
        btn.Margin = New Padding(3, 3, 3, 6)
        btn.UseVisualStyleBackColor = True

        AddHandler btn.Click, Sub(sender, args) HandleMenuKey(CStr(btn.Tag))

        panel.Controls.Add(btn)
    End Sub

    Protected Overrides Sub OnResize(e As EventArgs)
        MyBase.OnResize(e)
        ResizeButtonsToPanel(flpLeft)
        ResizeButtonsToPanel(flpRight)
    End Sub

    Private Sub ResizeButtonsToPanel(panel As FlowLayoutPanel)
        If panel Is Nothing Then Return

        Dim targetWidth As Integer = panel.ClientSize.Width - panel.Padding.Left - panel.Padding.Right - 5
        If targetWidth < 50 Then targetWidth = 50

        For Each c As Control In panel.Controls
            Dim btn = TryCast(c, Button)
            Dim lbl = TryCast(c, Label)

            If btn IsNot Nothing Then
                btn.Width = targetWidth
            ElseIf lbl IsNot Nothing Then
                lbl.Width = targetWidth
            End If
        Next
    End Sub

    Private Sub FormMainMenu_KeyPress(sender As Object, e As KeyPressEventArgs) Handles Me.KeyPress
        Dim ch As String = e.KeyChar.ToString()
        If ch = vbCr OrElse ch = vbLf Then Return
        HandleMenuKey(ch)
    End Sub

    Private Sub HandleMenuKey(ch As String)
        If String.IsNullOrEmpty(ch) Then Return

        Dim up As String = ch
        If up.Length = 1 AndAlso Char.IsLetter(up(0)) Then
            up = up.ToUpperInvariant()
        End If

        Select Case up
            Case "A" : NotYet("Shop Card Generator")
            Case "B" : NotYet("Invoice Generator")
            Case "C" : NotYet("Checks and Cash Receipts (LEDGER)")
            Case "D" : NotYet("View Sales Journal (SALES)")
            Case "E" : NotYet("View Log Book (LOGBOOK)")
            Case "F" : NotYet("Price List Program (plist)")
            Case "G" : NotYet("Print/Void Invoices (BOOT)")
            Case "H" : NotYet("Quick Message Flashing")
            Case "I" : NotYet("Backup Price List & Rolodex (implement in .NET)")
            Case "J" : NotYet("Print Out Customers Actual Names (spool real names)")
            Case "K" : NotYet("Cash Disbursements (BILL)")
            Case "L" : NotYet("Business Expenses Account (password)")
            Case "M" : NotYet("Quotation Form Generator (QUOTE)")
            Case "N" : NotYet("Rolodex (PHONE)")

            Case "O" : NotYet("Copy Spec Index")
            Case "P" : NotYet("Entire Ledger Viewing (ENTIRE)")
            Case "Q" : NotYet("Word Processor")
            Case "R" : NotYet("Find Word Processor Text")

            ' REMOVED hotkeys: 5, +, S, U, V, W

            Case "T" : NotYet("Change Date or Time")
            Case "X" : NotYet("Typewriter Mode")
            Case "Y" : NotYet("Ed Dean's Personal Backup")
            Case "Z" : NotYet("Personal Calendar")

            Case "1" : NotYet("Mileage Tracking")
            Case "2" : NotYet("Product Purchasing")
            Case "3" : NotYet("Miscellaneous Menu")
            Case "4" : NotYet("Add Entries to Log Book")
            Case "6" : NotYet("Cadmium Cards")
            Case "7" : NotYet("Emergency PAYROLL System")

            Case Else
                ' ignore
        End Select
    End Sub

    Private Sub NotYet(feature As String)
        MessageBox.Show("Not implemented yet: " & feature, "Port status", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information)
    End Sub

End Class
```

### To permanently solve the root cause (recommended)
Even with the above, you should fix the duplicates:

1) In Visual Studio: **Edit → Find and Replace → Find in Files**
2) Search for `EnsureLayout` and `EnsureMenuLayout`
3) Delete one of the duplicates or rename it so only one exists.

## Copilot

Good—then the next step is to **re-introduce backup + migration** in a way that won’t recreate duplicates or dependency errors.

### Do this next (in order)

1) **Leave `FormMainMenu.vb` alone** except for the *one* menu key you want to implement first (start with **I**).
2) **Add 3 new files** to the project (each exactly once):
   - `AppPaths.vb`
   - `MigrationService.vb`
   - `BackupService.vb`

3) After those compile, change only the `"I"` handler to call the backup service.

---

## 1) Add `AppPaths.vb`
```vbnet name=AppPaths.vb
Option Strict Off
Option Explicit On

Imports System.IO

Public Module AppPaths
    Public ReadOnly Property AppRoot As String = "\\invoice\MainMenu"
    Public ReadOnly Property DataDir As String = Path.Combine(AppRoot, "Data")
    Public ReadOnly Property BackupDir As String = Path.Combine(AppRoot, "Backups")
    Public ReadOnly Property WordDocsDir As String = "\\invoice\word"
End Module
```

## 2) Add `MigrationService.vb` (MigrationRule = Skip)
```vbnet name=MigrationService.vb
Option Strict Off
Option Explicit On

Imports System.IO

Public Module MigrationService

    Private ReadOnly LegacyRoot As String = "\\invoice"

    Public Sub EnsureFoldersAndMigrateOnce()
        Directory.CreateDirectory(AppPaths.AppRoot)
        Directory.CreateDirectory(AppPaths.DataDir)
        Directory.CreateDirectory(AppPaths.BackupDir)

        Dim patterns As String() = {
            "*.DAT", "*.CUR", "*.LST", "*.PRC",
            "PACK.NUM", "BILLS.*", "*.CHK", "*.TXT"
        }

        For Each pattern In patterns
            Dim files As String()

            Try
                files = Directory.GetFiles(LegacyRoot, pattern, SearchOption.TopDirectoryOnly)
            Catch
                Continue For
            End Try

            For Each src In files
                Dim dest As String = Path.Combine(AppPaths.DataDir, Path.GetFileName(src))

                ' Skip if already migrated
                If File.Exists(dest) Then Continue For

                Try
                    File.Move(src, dest)
                Catch
                    ' ignore (in use / permissions / etc.)
                End Try
            Next
        Next
    End Sub

End Module
```

## 3) Add `BackupService.vb` (uses ZIP built into .NET)
```vbnet name=BackupService.vb
Option Strict Off
Option Explicit On

Imports System.IO
Imports System.IO.Compression
Imports System.Linq

Public Module BackupService

    Public Sub RunBackupPriceListAndRolodex()
        Directory.CreateDirectory(AppPaths.DataDir)
        Directory.CreateDirectory(AppPaths.BackupDir)

        ' 1) Word docs => WORD.zip
        Dim wordZip As String = Path.Combine(AppPaths.BackupDir, "WORD.zip")
        CreateZipFromPattern(wordZip, AppPaths.WordDocsDir, "*.doc")

        ' 2) Rotating data backup => BACKUP##.zip
        Dim packNumPath As String = Path.Combine(AppPaths.DataDir, "PACK.NUM")
        Dim n As Integer = GetNextPackNumberAndAdvance(packNumPath)
        Dim dataZip As String = Path.Combine(AppPaths.BackupDir, $"BACKUP{n}.zip")

        CreateDataZip(dataZip, AppPaths.DataDir)
    End Sub

    Private Sub CreateZipFromPattern(zipPath As String, folder As String, pattern As String)
        Using fs As New FileStream(zipPath, FileMode.Create, FileAccess.ReadWrite, FileShare.None)
            Using archive As New ZipArchive(fs, ZipArchiveMode.Create)
                If Directory.Exists(folder) Then
                    For Each f In Directory.GetFiles(folder, pattern, SearchOption.TopDirectoryOnly)
                        archive.CreateEntryFromFile(f, Path.GetFileName(f), CompressionLevel.Optimal)
                    Next
                End If
            End Using
        End Using
    End Sub

    Private Sub CreateDataZip(zipPath As String, dataDir As String)
        Dim includePatterns As String() = {
            "*.DAT", "*.CUR", "PRC*.PRC", "PHONE*.LST", "BILLS.*", "PACK.NUM"
        }

        Dim files As New System.Collections.Generic.List(Of String)

        For Each pat In includePatterns
            If Directory.Exists(dataDir) Then
                Try
                    files.AddRange(Directory.GetFiles(dataDir, pat, SearchOption.TopDirectoryOnly))
                Catch
                End Try
            End If
        Next

        files = files.Distinct(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase).ToList()

        Using fs As New FileStream(zipPath, FileMode.Create, FileAccess.ReadWrite, FileShare.None)
            Using archive As New ZipArchive(fs, ZipArchiveMode.Create)
                For Each f In files
                    archive.CreateEntryFromFile(f, Path.GetFileName(f), CompressionLevel.Optimal)
                Next
            End Using
        End Using
    End Sub

    Private Function GetNextPackNumberAndAdvance(packNumPath As String) As Integer
        Dim n As Integer = 1

        Try
            If File.Exists(packNumPath) Then
                Integer.TryParse(File.ReadAllText(packNumPath).Trim(), n)
            End If
        Catch
            n = 1
        End Try

        If n < 1 OrElse n > 99 Then n = 1

        Dim nextN As Integer = n + 1
        If nextN > 99 Then nextN = 1

        Try
            File.WriteAllText(packNumPath, nextN.ToString())
        Catch
        End Try

        Return n
    End Function

End Module
```

---

## 4) Minimal change in `FormMainMenu.vb`
In your existing `HandleMenuKey` `Select Case`, change only `Case "I"` to:

```vbnet

    Try
        Cursor = Cursors.WaitCursor
        MigrationService.EnsureFoldersAndMigrateOnce()
        BackupService.RunBackupPriceListAndRolodex()
        MessageBox.Show("Backup complete." & Environment.NewLine & AppPaths.BackupDir,
                        "Backup", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information)
    Catch ex As Exception
        MessageBox.Show("Backup failed: " & ex.Message,
                        "Backup", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
    Finally
        Cursor = Cursors.Default
    End Try
```

`Y` can remain `NotYet(...)` for now.

this is visual studio .net 2026

## Copilot

```vbnet
Option Strict Off
Option Explicit On

Imports System.IO
Imports System.IO.Compression
Imports System.Linq

Public Module BackupService

    Public Sub RunBackupPriceListAndRolodex()
        Directory.CreateDirectory(AppPaths.DataDir)
        Directory.CreateDirectory(AppPaths.BackupDir)

        ' 1) Word docs => WORD.zip
        Dim wordZip As String = Path.Combine(AppPaths.BackupDir, "WORD.zip")
        CreateZipFromPattern(wordZip, AppPaths.WordDocsDir, "*.doc")

        ' 2) Rotating data backup => BACKUP##.zip
        Dim packNumPath As String = Path.Combine(AppPaths.DataDir, "PACK.NUM")
        Dim n As Integer = GetNextPackNumberAndAdvance(packNumPath)
        Dim dataZip As String = Path.Combine(AppPaths.BackupDir, $"BACKUP{n}.zip")

        CreateDataZip(dataZip, AppPaths.DataDir)
    End Sub

    Private Sub CreateZipFromPattern(zipPath As String, folder As String, pattern As String)
        Using fs As New FileStream(zipPath, FileMode.Create, FileAccess.ReadWrite, FileShare.None)
            Using archive As New ZipArchive(fs, ZipArchiveMode.Create)
                If Directory.Exists(folder) Then
                    For Each f In Directory.GetFiles(folder, pattern, SearchOption.TopDirectoryOnly)
                        archive.CreateEntryFromFile(f, Path.GetFileName(f), CompressionLevel.Optimal)
                    Next
                End If
            End Using
        End Using
    End Sub

    Private Sub CreateDataZip(zipPath As String, dataDir As String)
        Dim includePatterns As String() = {
            "*.DAT", "*.CUR", "PRC*.PRC", "PHONE*.LST", "BILLS.*", "PACK.NUM"
        }

        Dim files As New System.Collections.Generic.List(Of String)

        For Each pat In includePatterns
            If Directory.Exists(dataDir) Then
                Try
                    files.AddRange(Directory.GetFiles(dataDir, pat, SearchOption.TopDirectoryOnly))
                Catch
                End Try
            End If
        Next

        files = files.Distinct(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase).ToList()

        Using fs As New FileStream(zipPath, FileMode.Create, FileAccess.ReadWrite, FileShare.None)
            Using archive As New ZipArchive(fs, ZipArchiveMode.Create)
                For Each f In files
                    archive.CreateEntryFromFile(f, Path.GetFileName(f), CompressionLevel.Optimal)
                Next
            End Using
        End Using
    End Sub

    Private Function GetNextPackNumberAndAdvance(packNumPath As String) As Integer
        Dim n As Integer = 1

        Try
            If File.Exists(packNumPath) Then
                Integer.TryParse(File.ReadAllText(packNumPath).Trim(), n)
            End If
        Catch
            n = 1
        End Try

        If n < 1 OrElse n > 99 Then n = 1

        Dim nextN As Integer = n + 1
        If nextN > 99 Then nextN = 1

        Try
            File.WriteAllText(packNumPath, nextN.ToString())
        Catch
        End Try

        Return n
    End Function

End Module
```

## @testsubject117

here is the current FormMainMenu.vb code, which appears to be working. Option Strict Off
Option Explicit On

Imports System
Imports System.Drawing
Imports System.Windows.Forms

Partial Public Class FormMainMenu

    Protected Overrides Sub OnLoad(e As EventArgs)
        MyBase.OnLoad(e)

        Me.KeyPreview = True

        ' IMPORTANT:
        ' Your project currently has duplicate layout helpers in partial classes.
        ' To avoid "Overload resolution failed..." we do NOT call any EnsureLayout method here.
        ' Layout should be handled by the Designer (FormMainMenu.Designer.vb).
        BuildMenu()
    End Sub

    Private Sub BuildMenu()
        If flpLeft Is Nothing OrElse flpRight Is Nothing Then Return

        flpLeft.Controls.Clear()
        flpRight.Controls.Clear()

        ' Optional headers
        flpLeft.Controls.Add(MakeHeaderLabel("Main Menu (Left)"))
        flpRight.Controls.Add(MakeHeaderLabel("Main Menu (Right)"))

        ' Left column
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "A", "Shop Card Generator")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "B", "Invoice Generator")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "C", "Checks and Cash Receipts")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "D", "View Sales Journal")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "E", "View Log Book")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "F", "Price List Program")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "G", "Print Records / Void Invoices")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "H", "Quick Message Flashing")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "I", "Backup Price List & Rolodex")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "J", "Print Out Customers Actual Names")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "K", "Cash Disbursements")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "L", "Business Expenses Account")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "M", "Quotation Form Generator")
        AddMenuButton(flpLeft, "N", "Rolodex")

        ' Right column (REMOVED: 5, +, S, U, V, W)
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "O", "Copy Spec Index")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "P", "Entire Ledger Viewing")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "Q", "Word Processor")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "R", "Find Word Processor Text")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "T", "Change Date or Time")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "X", "Typewriter Mode")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "Y", "Ed Dean's Personal Backup")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "Z", "Personal Calendar")

        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "1", "Mileage Tracking")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "2", "Product Purchasing")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "3", "Miscellaneous Menu")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "4", "Add Entries to Log Book")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "6", "Cadmium Cards")
        AddMenuButton(flpRight, "7", "Emergency PAYROLL System")

        ResizeButtonsToPanel(flpLeft)
        ResizeButtonsToPanel(flpRight)
    End Sub

    Private Function MakeHeaderLabel(text As String) As Label
        Dim lbl As New Label()
        lbl.AutoSize = False
        lbl.Height = 32
        lbl.Dock = DockStyle.Top
        lbl.TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft
        lbl.Font = New Font(Me.Font, FontStyle.Bold)
        lbl.Text = text
        lbl.Margin = New Padding(3, 3, 3, 8)
        Return lbl
    End Function

    Private Sub AddMenuButton(panel As FlowLayoutPanel, key As String, text As String)
        Dim btn As New Button()

        btn.AutoSize = False
        btn.Height = 34
        btn.TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft
        btn.Text = $"({key}) {text}"
        btn.Tag = key
        btn.Margin = New Padding(3, 3, 3, 6)
        btn.UseVisualStyleBackColor = True

        AddHandler btn.Click, Sub(sender, args) HandleMenuKey(CStr(btn.Tag))

        panel.Controls.Add(btn)
    End Sub

    Protected Overrides Sub OnResize(e As EventArgs)
        MyBase.OnResize(e)
        ResizeButtonsToPanel(flpLeft)
        ResizeButtonsToPanel(flpRight)
    End Sub

    Private Sub ResizeButtonsToPanel(panel As FlowLayoutPanel)
        If panel Is Nothing Then Return

        Dim targetWidth As Integer = panel.ClientSize.Width - panel.Padding.Left - panel.Padding.Right - 5
        If targetWidth < 50 Then targetWidth = 50

        For Each c As Control In panel.Controls
            Dim btn = TryCast(c, Button)
            Dim lbl = TryCast(c, Label)

            If btn IsNot Nothing Then
                btn.Width = targetWidth
            ElseIf lbl IsNot Nothing Then
                lbl.Width = targetWidth
            End If
        Next
    End Sub

    Private Sub FormMainMenu_KeyPress(sender As Object, e As KeyPressEventArgs) Handles Me.KeyPress
        Dim ch As String = e.KeyChar.ToString()
        If ch = vbCr OrElse ch = vbLf Then Return
        HandleMenuKey(ch)
    End Sub

    Private Sub HandleMenuKey(ch As String)
        If String.IsNullOrEmpty(ch) Then Return

        Dim up As String = ch
        If up.Length = 1 AndAlso Char.IsLetter(up(0)) Then
            up = up.ToUpperInvariant()
        End If

        Select Case up
            Case "A" : NotYet("Shop Card Generator")
            Case "B" : NotYet("Invoice Generator")
            Case "C" : NotYet("Checks and Cash Receipts (LEDGER)")
            Case "D" : NotYet("View Sales Journal (SALES)")
            Case "E" : NotYet("View Log Book (LOGBOOK)")
            Case "F" : NotYet("Price List Program (plist)")
            Case "G" : NotYet("Print/Void Invoices (BOOT)")
            Case "H" : NotYet("Quick Message Flashing")
            Case "I"
                Try
                    Cursor = Cursors.WaitCursor
                    MigrationService.EnsureFoldersAndMigrateOnce()
                    BackupService.RunBackupPriceListAndRolodex()
                    MessageBox.Show("Backup complete." & Environment.NewLine & AppPaths.BackupDir,
                        "Backup", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    MessageBox.Show("Backup failed: " & ex.Message,
                        "Backup", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
                Finally
                    Cursor = Cursors.Default
                End Try
            Case "J" : NotYet("Print Out Customers Actual Names (spool real names)")
            Case "K" : NotYet("Cash Disbursements (BILL)")
            Case "L" : NotYet("Business Expenses Account (password)")
            Case "M" : NotYet("Quotation Form Generator (QUOTE)")
            Case "N" : NotYet("Rolodex (PHONE)")

            Case "O" : NotYet("Copy Spec Index")
            Case "P" : NotYet("Entire Ledger Viewing (ENTIRE)")
            Case "Q" : NotYet("Word Processor")
            Case "R" : NotYet("Find Word Processor Text")

            ' REMOVED hotkeys: 5, +, S, U, V, W

            Case "T" : NotYet("Change Date or Time")
            Case "X" : NotYet("Typewriter Mode")
            Case "Y" : NotYet("Ed Dean's Personal Backup")
            Case "Z" : NotYet("Personal Calendar")

            Case "1" : NotYet("Mileage Tracking")
            Case "2" : NotYet("Product Purchasing")
            Case "3" : NotYet("Miscellaneous Menu")
            Case "4" : NotYet("Add Entries to Log Book")
            Case "6" : NotYet("Cadmium Cards")
            Case "7" : NotYet("Emergency PAYROLL System")

            Case Else
                ' ignore
        End Select
    End Sub

    Private Sub NotYet(feature As String)
        MessageBox.Show("Not implemented yet: " & feature, "Port status", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information)
    End Sub

End Class

You showed `BackupConfig.vb` still has old defaults like `F:\WORD`, `C:\BACKUP`, `C:\PACK.NUM`.

- **(B) Update `BackupConfig` defaults** to match the new locations:
  - WordSourceDir = `\\invoice\word`

## @testsubject117

currently the visual studio project is not on the same computer where it will be. Do I need to test on the actual computer?

## Copilot

Yes—you should test on (or against) the **actual environment** before trusting the backup/migration, because UNC access and permissions are the #1 thing that differs between your dev box and the **Invoice** server/workstations.

You *don’t* necessarily need Visual Studio on the Invoice computer, but you do need to run the built app in the same conditions it will run in.

## Minimum testing you should do
### 1) Test UNC access from the machine that will run the app
From the target workstation (or Invoice itself), verify you can:
- open `\\invoice\MainMenu\`
- create files/folders inside `\\invoice\MainMenu\Data\` and `\\invoice\MainMenu\Backups\`
- read `\\invoice\word\` and its `.doc` files

If any of those fail, the app’s backup will fail.

### 2) Run the compiled EXE on the target machine
Best practice:
- Build **Release** on your dev computer
- Copy the output folder (or installer) to the target machine
- Run it there and click **(I)**

## What you do *not* need
- You do **not** need drive `F:` mapping (we’re using UNC).
- You do **not** need the DOS `.BAS` files for this backup feature.

## One important gotcha
If the Invoice share requires credentials, your dev machine may succeed (because you already authenticated) while another workstation fails. So testing from the real workstation matters.

## Quick question to guide the next step
Where will the app actually run?
1) on the **Invoice server itself**, or
2) on **workstations** (multiple PCs) that access `\\invoice\...`?

Depending on that answer, I’ll suggest the best deployment/test approach (ClickOnce/MSIX/simple copy, plus whether you need to request share permissions for users).

## @testsubject117

app will actually run on multiple pcs that access \\invoice\

## Copilot

Yes—test from at least **one real workstation** (and ideally 2–3), because each PC/user account can have different network credentials and permissions to `\\invoice\...`.

## What to test on a workstation (recommended checklist)

### 1) Share permissions (most important)
On a workstation, logged in as a typical user who will run the app:

- Can you open `\\invoice\MainMenu\` in File Explorer?
- Can you create a folder/file here?
  - `\\invoice\MainMenu\Data\test.txt`
  - `\\invoice\MainMenu\Backups\test.txt`
- Can you list/read `\\invoice\word\` and open a `.doc`?

If the user can’t create files in `\\invoice\MainMenu\Backups`, the ZIP step will fail.

### 2) Run the app from the workstation
Build Release on your dev PC, then copy the output to the workstation and run:
- Click **(I)** once
  - Verify it creates:
    - `\\invoice\MainMenu\Backups\WORD.zip`
    - `\\invoice\MainMenu\Backups\BACKUP#.zip`
  - Verify it created/updated:
    - `\\invoice\MainMenu\Data\PACK.NUM`
- Click **(I)** again
  - Confirm the backup number increments (BACKUP1.zip then BACKUP2.zip, etc.)

### 3) Migration safety test (since you enabled migration)
Before first run, drop a harmless test file in `\\invoice\` root (if allowed), like:
- `\\invoice\TESTMIG.TXT`

Then run (I) and confirm it gets moved to:
- `\\invoice\MainMenu\Data\TESTMIG.TXT`

(If you don’t want migration to touch “random” root files, tell me and we’ll tighten the migration patterns to only the exact filenames your system uses.)

## Deployment note (so every PC can run it consistently)
For “multiple PCs”, you generally want either:
- copy the EXE to each PC (simple, but manual updates), or
- put the app binaries on a shared location (read-only) and run from there (updates are easier, but still needs permissions), or
- ClickOnce/MSIX (best update experience, a bit more setup)

We can decide later—just don’t run the EXE directly from `\\invoice\MainMenu\` unless you’re comfortable with file-locking/update behaviors.

## One question (permissions)
What Windows accounts will users run under?
- a shared login (everyone uses the same user), or
- individual domain/local accounts?

This determines how you should set permissions on `\\invoice\MainMenu\Data` and `\\invoice\MainMenu\Backups`.

## @testsubject117

how do I build release on your dev pc and copy the output to the workstation and run it

## Copilot

To “build Release” on your dev PC and run it on a workstation, do this:

## 1) Build **Release** in Visual Studio
1) Open the solution in Visual Studio.
2) In the top toolbar, find the configuration dropdown that likely says **Debug**.
3) Change **Debug → Release**.
   - If you don’t see it: **Build → Configuration Manager…** and pick **Release** for your project.
4) Build:
   - **Build → Build Solution** (or press **Ctrl+Shift+B**)

## 2) Find the output files to copy
In Solution Explorer, right-click the WinForms project → **Open Folder in File Explorer** (or open the project folder manually), then navigate to one of these (depends on project type):

### SDK-style projects (common newer format)
- `bin\Release\<target-framework>\`
  - example: `bin\Release\net8.0-windows\`
  - or `bin\Release\net9.0-windows\`

### Older .NET Framework style
- `bin\Release\`

Inside will be your `.exe` plus `.dll` files (and possibly `.config`).

**Copy the entire folder contents**, not just the EXE.

## 3) Copy to the workstation
On the workstation, create a folder like:
- `C:\Apps\MainMenu\`

Then copy everything from your dev output folder into that workstation folder.

Common ways:
- File Explorer copy/paste
- a USB drive
- a network share

## 4) Run it on the workstation
On the workstation:
1) Go to `C:\Apps\MainMenu\`
2) Double-click your app `.exe`

### If Windows blocks it
If you copied from another PC, Windows may mark files as “downloaded from the internet” / untrusted:
- Right-click the `.exe` → **Properties** → check **Unblock** (if present) → OK.

## 5) What to verify
- App launches
- Press **I** (or click the (I) button)
- Confirm it creates:
  - `\\invoice\MainMenu\Backups\WORD.zip`
  - `\\invoice\MainMenu\Backups\BACKUP1.zip` (then BACKUP2.zip, etc.)

## Quick question so I can be precise
Is your app targeting **.NET (Core/5+/6+/8+/9)** or **.NET Framework 4.x**?

You can tell by looking at:
- Project Properties → **Application** (Target framework), or
- the output folder name like `net8.0-windows` (that means modern .NET).

If you tell me which one, I’ll tell you exactly which folder to copy and what runtime prerequisites the workstation might need.

### How to find it in Visual Studio

2) You’ll see:

- **Solution** (top)
  - **Project A**
  - **Project B**
  - …

The WinForms project name is the project that:
- has `FormMainMenu.vb` under it, and/or
- has **References / Dependencies**, **My Project**, **Forms**, etc.
- when you right‑click it, it has **Set as Startup Project**

- Right‑click each project → **Set as Startup Project** is available

- Right‑click the project → **Properties** → **Application** tab → look at **Assembly name**.  
  That “Assembly name” is also the default EXE name.

## @testsubject117

target framework is .net 10.0

## Copilot

If you’re targeting **.NET 10.0**, then yes—you need to test on a workstation, and you must also ensure the workstation can run a .NET 10 WinForms app.

## What this means for running on the workstations
### Option A (simplest for now): install the **.NET 10 Desktop Runtime** on each workstation
On each workstation, install the **.NET Desktop Runtime 10.0 (Windows Desktop Runtime)** that matches your app’s bitness (usually x64).

Then your copied `bin\Release\net10.0-windows\...` output should run.

### Option B (best for easy deployment): publish **self-contained**
This bundles the runtime so the workstation does **not** need .NET 10 installed.

In Visual Studio:
1) Right‑click **AMiOffice** → **Publish…**
2) Choose **Folder** (or “Folder Profile”)
3) In publish settings:
   - **Deployment mode**: *Self-contained*
   - **Target runtime**: `win-x64` (most likely)
4) Publish, then copy the **publish output** folder to the workstation and run the EXE from there.

This is usually the cleanest way when you have multiple PCs.

## Quick sanity check
In your Release output path, do you see something like:
- `...\bin\Release\net10.0-windows\`

If yes, you’re on the right folder.

## One question before I recommend a deployment path
Are your workstations all **Windows 64-bit** (almost certainly), and are you okay installing a runtime on each PC, or would you rather do a **self-contained publish** so it’s just “copy folder and run”?

## @testsubject117

workstations are all 64 bit, prefer self-contained publish

## Copilot

Do a **self-contained publish (win-x64)** and copy the publish folder to each workstation. That way you don’t need to install .NET 10 on every PC.

## Self-contained publish in Visual Studio (AMiOffice, .NET 10, WinForms)

1) In **Solution Explorer**, right-click **AMiOffice** → **Publish…**
2) If it asks for a target:
   - Choose **Folder**
   - Pick a location on your dev PC, e.g. `C:\Publish\AMiOffice\`
3) In the Publish screen, open **Settings** (or “More actions / Edit” depending on the UI).
4) Set:
   - **Configuration**: `Release`
   - **Target runtime**: `win-x64`
   - **Deployment mode**: **Self-contained**
5) (Optional but useful) set:
   - **Produce single file**: On (makes copying easier)
   - **Trim unused code**: Off (safer for WinForms and reflection-heavy libs)
6) Click **Publish**

After publishing, you’ll get a folder containing your app + runtime.

## Copy to workstation and run
1) Copy the **entire publish output folder** to each workstation, e.g.:
   - `C:\Apps\AMiOffice\`
2) Run:
   - `C:\Apps\AMiOffice\AMiOffice.exe`
3) Test the backup:
   - Click/press **I**
   - Confirm output appears under:
     - `\\invoice\MainMenu\Backups\WORD.zip`
     - `\\invoice\MainMenu\Backups\BACKUP#.zip`

## Two gotchas to watch for
- **Windows SmartScreen / “downloaded from internet”**: if prompted, right-click the EXE → Properties → **Unblock** (if present).
- **Permissions to \\invoice**: if it fails, the error message should tell us whether it’s access denied vs path not found.

## If you don’t see “Self-contained” in the Publish UI
Tell me what you *do* see in the Publish settings panel (copy/paste the options), and I’ll map it to the right choices.

If you want, paste your `.vbproj` `<PropertyGroup>` (target framework section) and I can give you the exact `dotnet publish` command that matches your project as a backup plan.

## @testsubject117

when I click "I" I get a message stating Not implemented yet: backup price list & rolodex (implement in .net)

## Copilot

That message means your running build is still using the **old `Case "I" : NotYet("Backup Price List & Rolodex (implement in .NET)")`** handler (or you published an older build). Your posted `FormMainMenu.vb` *does* have the implemented `Case "I"` block, so this is almost certainly a **deployment/version mismatch**.

## Fix: confirm the running EXE is the new one

### 1) Update the code (if needed)
In `FormMainMenu.vb`, in `HandleMenuKey`, make sure `Case "I"` is the *Try/Catch* block (not `NotYet(...)`). It should look like:

```vbnet
Case "I"
    Try
        Cursor = Cursors.WaitCursor
        MigrationService.EnsureFoldersAndMigrateOnce()
        BackupService.RunBackupPriceListAndRolodex()
        MessageBox.Show("Backup complete." & Environment.NewLine & AppPaths.BackupDir,
            "Backup", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information)
    Catch ex As Exception
        MessageBox.Show("Backup failed: " & ex.Message,
            "Backup", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
    Finally
        Cursor = Cursors.Default
    End Try
```

### 2) Re-Publish (self-contained) and redeploy
1) Right-click **AMiOffice** → **Publish**
2) Publish again (Release, `win-x64`, Self-contained)
3) On the workstation:
   - **close the app**
   - delete/rename the old folder you copied earlier (to avoid running the old EXE by mistake)
   - copy the *new* publish output folder over
   - run the EXE from that folder

### 3) Make it impossible to confuse builds (quick sanity check)
Add a temporary “version stamp” to your menu so you can see the build you’re running.

For example, change the header text in `BuildMenu()` to:

```vbnet
flpLeft.Controls.Add(MakeHeaderLabel("Main Menu (Left) - build 2026-04-13 I=ZIP"))
```

Rebuild/publish. If you don’t see that text, you’re not running the new build.

## If you want the fastest diagnosis
Paste your current `Select Case up` section for `Case "H"` through `Case "K"` from the file you are actually building in Visual Studio. That will tell us immediately whether the source still contains `NotYet(...)` for I, or if the wrong EXE is being run.

To make it solid for multi‑PC use, the next two improvements I recommend are:
