## Copilot

You pasted an **incomplete** file (it cuts off mid-`AddEntry`), so the compiler is right: it can’t find the missing methods, and it also sees unbalanced `Sub/Function` blocks.

Below is a **complete, compiling** `FormMileageTracking.vb` that:

- Uses `\\invoice\data\MILEAGE.DAT` + `ODOMETER.NUM` (historical compatible)
- Stores each record as **two `WRITE#` lines**, same as the BAS:
  1) `"MM-DD-YYYY","Destination","Business Purpose"`
  2) `OdomStart,OdomEnd,BusinessMiles,"Cash/Charge"`
- Loads existing records
- Add / Delete Selected / Save / Reload
- Defaults Start Odometer from `ODOMETER.NUM`
- Validates like the BAS (Start >= 999, End > Start, Miles >= 1)
- Hotkeys: `Ctrl+S` Save, `Esc` Close, `Enter` in Purpose adds

Copy/replace the entire file with this:

```vbnet name=FormMileageTracking.vb
Option Strict On
Option Explicit On

Imports System
Imports System.Data
Imports System.Drawing
Imports System.Globalization
Imports System.IO
Imports System.Linq
Imports System.Text
Imports System.Windows.Forms

Public Class FormMileageTracking

    ' All non-backup/non-word data goes here (per your requirement)
    Private Const DataDir As String = "\\invoice\data"

    Private ReadOnly MileageDatPath As String = Path.Combine(DataDir, "MILEAGE.DAT")
    Private ReadOnly OdometerNumPath As String = Path.Combine(DataDir, "ODOMETER.NUM")
    Private ReadOnly MileageTmpPath As String = Path.Combine(DataDir, "MILEAGE.TMP")

    Private _table As DataTable = Nothing
    Private _grid As DataGridView = Nothing

    ' Inputs
    Private _dtpDate As DateTimePicker = Nothing
    Private _txtDestination As TextBox = Nothing
    Private _txtPurpose As TextBox = Nothing
    Private _txtStart As TextBox = Nothing
    Private _txtEnd As TextBox = Nothing
    Private _txtMiles As TextBox = Nothing
    Private _cmbPayment As ComboBox = Nothing
    Private _lblMilesHint As Label = Nothing

    ' Buttons (for hotkeys/PerformClick)
    Private _btnAdd As Button = Nothing
    Private _btnDelete As Button = Nothing
    Private _btnSave As Button = Nothing
    Private _btnReload As Button = Nothing
    Private _btnClose As Button = Nothing

    Private _lastOdometerDefault As Integer = 0
    Private _suppressAutoMiles As Boolean = False

    Public Sub New()
        InitializeComponent()
    End Sub

    Protected Overrides Sub OnLoad(e As EventArgs)
        MyBase.OnLoad(e)

        Me.Text = "Mileage Tracking"
        Me.StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent
        Me.KeyPreview = True
        Me.MinimumSize = New Size(1120, 720)

        EnsureDataDirExists()

        BuildUi()
        BuildTable()

        _lastOdometerDefault = LoadLastOdometer()
        ApplyDefaultStartOdometer()

        LoadFromLegacyDat()
        RecalcMilesHint()
    End Sub

    Protected Overrides Sub OnKeyDown(e As KeyEventArgs)
        MyBase.OnKeyDown(e)

        If e.Control AndAlso e.KeyCode = Keys.S Then
            SaveAllToLegacyDat()
            e.Handled = True
            Return
        End If

        If e.KeyCode = Keys.Escape Then
            Close()
            e.Handled = True
            Return
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub EnsureDataDirExists()
        If Not Directory.Exists(DataDir) Then
            Throw New DirectoryNotFoundException("Data directory not found: " & DataDir)
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub BuildUi()
        Dim root As New TableLayoutPanel() With {
            .Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
            .Padding = New Padding(12),
            .ColumnCount = 1,
            .RowCount = 4
        }
        root.RowStyles.Add(New RowStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))          ' header
        root.RowStyles.Add(New RowStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))          ' row 1
        root.RowStyles.Add(New RowStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))          ' row 2
        root.RowStyles.Add(New RowStyle(SizeType.Percent, 100.0F))   ' grid

        Dim lblHeader As New Label() With {
            .AutoSize = True,
            .Font = New Font("Segoe UI", 16.0F, FontStyle.Bold),
            .Text = "Mileage Tracking"
        }

        ' Row 1 (date/dest/purpose/start/end)
        Dim row1 As New TableLayoutPanel() With {
            .Dock = DockStyle.Top,
            .AutoSize = True,
            .ColumnCount = 10
        }
        row1.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))        ' Date
        row1.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 140))
        row1.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))        ' Destination
        row1.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 240))
        row1.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))        ' Purpose
        row1.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Percent, 100.0F))
        row1.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))        ' Start
        row1.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 95))
        row1.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))        ' End
        row1.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 95))

        _dtpDate = New DateTimePicker() With {.Format = DateTimePickerFormat.Short, .Value = DateTime.Today, .Dock = DockStyle.Fill}
        _txtDestination = New TextBox() With {.Dock = DockStyle.Fill}
        _txtPurpose = New TextBox() With {.Dock = DockStyle.Fill}
        _txtStart = New TextBox() With {.Dock = DockStyle.Fill}
        _txtEnd = New TextBox() With {.Dock = DockStyle.Fill}

        AddHandler _txtStart.TextChanged, Sub() OnOdometerChanged()
        AddHandler _txtEnd.TextChanged, Sub() OnOdometerChanged()

        ' Enter in Purpose adds (DOS-like flow)
        AddHandler _txtPurpose.KeyDown,
            Sub(sender, e)
                If e.KeyCode = Keys.Enter Then
                    AddEntry()
                    e.SuppressKeyPress = True
                End If
            End Sub

        row1.Controls.Add(New Label() With {.AutoSize = True, .Text = "Date:", .Padding = New Padding(0, 8, 6, 0)}, 0, 0)
        row1.Controls.Add(_dtpDate, 1, 0)
        row1.Controls.Add(New Label() With {.AutoSize = True, .Text = "Destination:", .Padding = New Padding(12, 8, 6, 0)}, 2, 0)
        row1.Controls.Add(_txtDestination, 3, 0)
        row1.Controls.Add(New Label() With {.AutoSize = True, .Text = "Business Purpose:", .Padding = New Padding(12, 8, 6, 0)}, 4, 0)
        row1.Controls.Add(_txtPurpose, 5, 0)
        row1.Controls.Add(New Label() With {.AutoSize = True, .Text = "Start:", .Padding = New Padding(12, 8, 6, 0)}, 6, 0)
        row1.Controls.Add(_txtStart, 7, 0)
        row1.Controls.Add(New Label() With {.AutoSize = True, .Text = "End:", .Padding = New Padding(12, 8, 6, 0)}, 8, 0)
        row1.Controls.Add(_txtEnd, 9, 0)

        ' Row 2 (miles/payment/buttons)
        Dim row2 As New TableLayoutPanel() With {.Dock = DockStyle.Top, .AutoSize = True, .ColumnCount = 8}
        row2.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))        ' miles label
        row2.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 95))    ' miles textbox
        row2.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))        ' hint
        row2.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))        ' payment label
        row2.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 140))   ' payment combo
        row2.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Percent, 100.0F)) ' spacer
        row2.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))        ' buttons

        _txtMiles = New TextBox() With {.Dock = DockStyle.Fill}
        AddHandler _txtMiles.TextChanged,
            Sub()
                If Not _suppressAutoMiles Then
                    ' user typed something manually, stop auto-filling until cleared
                End If
            End Sub

        _lblMilesHint = New Label() With {
            .AutoSize = True,
            .Font = New Font("Segoe UI", 10.0F, FontStyle.Bold),
            .Text = "Miles: —",
            .Padding = New Padding(8, 7, 8, 7)
        }

        _cmbPayment = New ComboBox() With {.DropDownStyle = ComboBoxStyle.DropDownList, .Dock = DockStyle.Fill}
        _cmbPayment.Items.Add("Cash")
        _cmbPayment.Items.Add("Charge")
        _cmbPayment.SelectedIndex = 0

        _btnAdd = New Button() With {.Text = "Add", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler _btnAdd.Click, Sub() AddEntry()

        _btnDelete = New Button() With {.Text = "Delete Selected", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler _btnDelete.Click, Sub() DeleteSelected()

        _btnSave = New Button() With {.Text = "Save (Ctrl+S)", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler _btnSave.Click, Sub() SaveAllToLegacyDat()

        _btnReload = New Button() With {.Text = "Reload", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler _btnReload.Click, Sub() ReloadFromDisk()

        _btnClose = New Button() With {.Text = "(Esc) Close", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler _btnClose.Click, Sub() Close()

        Dim btnPanel As New FlowLayoutPanel() With {.AutoSize = True, .FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight, .WrapContents = False}
        btnPanel.Controls.Add(_btnAdd)
        btnPanel.Controls.Add(_btnDelete)
        btnPanel.Controls.Add(_btnSave)
        btnPanel.Controls.Add(_btnReload)
        btnPanel.Controls.Add(_btnClose)

        row2.Controls.Add(New Label() With {.AutoSize = True, .Text = "Business Miles:", .Padding = New Padding(0, 8, 6, 0)}, 0, 0)
        row2.Controls.Add(_txtMiles, 1, 0)
        row2.Controls.Add(_lblMilesHint, 2, 0)
        row2.Controls.Add(New Label() With {.AutoSize = True, .Text = "Payment:", .Padding = New Padding(12, 8, 6, 0)}, 3, 0)
        row2.Controls.Add(_cmbPayment, 4, 0)
        row2.Controls.Add(New Panel() With {.Dock = DockStyle.Fill}, 5, 0)
        row2.Controls.Add(btnPanel, 6, 0)

        _grid = New DataGridView() With {
            .Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
            .ReadOnly = False,
            .AllowUserToAddRows = False,
            .AllowUserToDeleteRows = False,
            .SelectionMode = DataGridViewSelectionMode.FullRowSelect,
            .MultiSelect = True,
            .AutoSizeColumnsMode = DataGridViewAutoSizeColumnsMode.Fill
        }

        root.Controls.Add(lblHeader, 0, 0)
        root.Controls.Add(row1, 0, 1)
        root.Controls.Add(row2, 0, 2)
        root.Controls.Add(_grid, 0, 3)

        Controls.Clear()
        Controls.Add(root)
    End Sub

    Private Sub BuildTable()
        _table = New DataTable("Mileage")
        _table.Columns.Add("Date", GetType(DateTime))
        _table.Columns.Add("Destination", GetType(String))
        _table.Columns.Add("BusinessPurpose", GetType(String))
        _table.Columns.Add("OdometerStart", GetType(Integer))
        _table.Columns.Add("OdometerEnd", GetType(Integer))
        _table.Columns.Add("BusinessMiles", GetType(Integer))
        _table.Columns.Add("PaymentType", GetType(String))

        _grid.DataSource = _table
        _grid.Columns("Date").DefaultCellStyle.Format = "d"

        _grid.Columns("OdometerStart").FillWeight = 12
        _grid.Columns("OdometerEnd").FillWeight = 12
        _grid.Columns("BusinessMiles").FillWeight = 10
        _grid.Columns("PaymentType").FillWeight = 10
        _grid.Columns("Destination").FillWeight = 22
        _grid.Columns("BusinessPurpose").FillWeight = 34
    End Sub

    Private Sub OnOdometerChanged()
        RecalcMilesHint()

        Dim os As Integer
        Dim oe As Integer

        If Integer.TryParse(_txtStart.Text.Trim(), os) AndAlso Integer.TryParse(_txtEnd.Text.Trim(), oe) Then
            Dim miles = oe - os
            If miles > 0 Then
                If String.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_txtMiles.Text) Then
                    _suppressAutoMiles = True
                    _txtMiles.Text = miles.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)
                    _suppressAutoMiles = False
                End If
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub RecalcMilesHint()
        Dim os As Integer
        Dim oe As Integer
        If Integer.TryParse(_txtStart.Text.Trim(), os) AndAlso Integer.TryParse(_txtEnd.Text.Trim(), oe) Then
            Dim miles = oe - os
            If miles >= 0 Then
                _lblMilesHint.Text = "Miles: " & miles.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)
            Else
                _lblMilesHint.Text = "Miles: (end < start)"
            End If
        Else
            _lblMilesHint.Text = "Miles: —"
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub ApplyDefaultStartOdometer()
        If _lastOdometerDefault > 0 Then
            _txtStart.Text = _lastOdometerDefault.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)
        Else
            _txtStart.Clear()
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Function LoadLastOdometer() As Integer
        Try
            If Not File.Exists(OdometerNumPath) Then Return 0
            Dim txt = File.ReadAllText(OdometerNumPath).Trim()

            ' ODOMETER.NUM written by BASIC could be: 12345   or   12345,
            txt = txt.Trim().TrimEnd(","c)

            Dim v As Integer
            If Integer.TryParse(txt, NumberStyles.Integer, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, v) Then
                Return v
            End If

            Return 0
        Catch
            Return 0
        End Try
    End Function

    Private Sub SaveLastOdometer(odometerEnding As Integer)
        ' BASIC overwrote ODOMETER.NUM with WRITE#1,OE (text representation)
        Try
            File.WriteAllText(OdometerNumPath, odometerEnding.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture), Encoding.ASCII)
        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("Could not update ODOMETER.NUM: " & ex.Message, "Mileage", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub AddEntry()
        Dim dest = _txtDestination.Text.Trim()
        Dim purpose = _txtPurpose.Text.Trim()
        Dim payment = If(_cmbPayment.SelectedItem Is Nothing, "Cash", _cmbPayment.SelectedItem.ToString())

        Dim os As Integer
        Dim oe As Integer
        Dim bm As Integer

        If Not Integer.TryParse(_txtStart.Text.Trim(), os) Then
            MessageBox.Show("Odometer Start must be a whole number.", "Mileage", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
            _txtStart.Focus()
            Return
        End If

        If os < 999 Then
            MessageBox.Show("Odometer Start must be at least 999 (matches original BAS validation).", "Mileage", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
            _txtStart.Focus()
            Return
        End If

        If Not Integer.TryParse(_txtEnd.Text.Trim(), oe) Then
            MessageBox.Show("Odometer End must be a whole number.", "Mileage", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
            _txtEnd.Focus()
            Return
        End If

        If oe <= os Then
            MessageBox.Show("Odometer End must be greater than Start.", "Mileage", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
            _txtEnd.Focus()
            Return
        End If

        If Not Integer.TryParse(_txtMiles.Text.Trim(), bm) Then
            MessageBox.Show("Business Miles must be a whole number.", "Mileage", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
            _txtMiles.Focus()
            Return
        End If

        If bm < 1 Then
            MessageBox.Show("Business Miles must be at least 1.", "Mileage", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
            _txtMiles.Focus()
            Return
        End If

        Dim row = _table.NewRow()
        row("Date") = _dtpDate.Value.Date
        row("Destination") = dest
        row("BusinessPurpose") = purpose
        row("OdometerStart") = os
        row("OdometerEnd") = oe
        row("BusinessMiles") = bm
        row("PaymentType") = payment
        _table.Rows.Add(row)

        ' BAS behavior: after confirming, it saved OE to ODOMETER.NUM
        SaveLastOdometer(oe)
        _lastOdometerDefault = oe

        ' Clear for next entry
        _txtDestination.Clear()
        _txtPurpose.Clear()
        _txtEnd.Clear()
        _txtMiles.Clear()

        ApplyDefaultStartOdometer()
        _txtEnd.Focus()
        RecalcMilesHint()
    End Sub

    Private Sub DeleteSelected()
        If _grid.SelectedRows.Count = 0 Then Return

        If MessageBox.Show($"Delete {_grid.SelectedRows.Count} selected row(s)?",
                           "Mileage", MessageBoxButtons.YesNo, MessageBoxIcon.Question) <> DialogResult.Yes Then
            Return
        End If

        Dim idxs = _grid.SelectedRows.Cast(Of DataGridViewRow)().
            Select(Function(r) r.Index).
            Where(Function(i) i >= 0).
            OrderByDescending(Function(i) i).
            ToList()

        For Each i In idxs
            If i < _table.Rows.Count Then
                _table.Rows.RemoveAt(i)
            End If
        Next
    End Sub

    Private Sub ReloadFromDisk()
        If MessageBox.Show("Reload from disk and lose unsaved changes?",
                           "Mileage", MessageBoxButtons.YesNo, MessageBoxIcon.Question) <> DialogResult.Yes Then
            Return
        End If

        LoadFromLegacyDat()
    End Sub

    Private Sub LoadFromLegacyDat()
        _table.Rows.Clear()

        If Not File.Exists(MileageDatPath) Then Return

        Dim lines = File.ReadAllLines(MileageDatPath, Encoding.ASCII).
            Where(Function(l) Not String.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(l)).
            ToList()

        ' BAS writes 2 lines per record. We'll parse as pairs.
        Dim i As Integer = 0
        While i + 1 < lines.Count
            Dim line1 = lines(i).Trim()
            Dim line2 = lines(i + 1).Trim()

            Dim parts1 = ParseBasicWriteLine(line1)
            Dim parts2 = ParseBasicWriteLine(line2)

            If parts1.Count >= 3 AndAlso parts2.Count >= 4 Then
                Dim dtText = parts1(0)
                Dim dest = parts1(1)
                Dim purpose = parts1(2)

                Dim os As Integer
                Dim oe As Integer
                Dim bm As Integer
                Dim payment = parts2(3)

                If Integer.TryParse(parts2(0), NumberStyles.Integer, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, os) AndAlso
                   Integer.TryParse(parts2(1), NumberStyles.Integer, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, oe) AndAlso
                   Integer.TryParse(parts2(2), NumberStyles.Integer, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, bm) Then

                    Dim dt As DateTime
                    ' BAS uses MM-DD-YYYY
                    If DateTime.TryParseExact(dtText, "MM-dd-yyyy", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, DateTimeStyles.None, dt) Then
                        Dim row = _table.NewRow()
                        row("Date") = dt.Date
                        row("Destination") = dest
                        row("BusinessPurpose") = purpose
                        row("OdometerStart") = os
                        row("OdometerEnd") = oe
                        row("BusinessMiles") = bm
                        row("PaymentType") = payment
                        _table.Rows.Add(row)
                    End If
                End If
            End If

            i += 2
        End While
    End Sub

    Private Sub SaveAllToLegacyDat()
        Try
            ' Write to tmp then replace (similar to BAS delete logic)
            Using sw As New StreamWriter(MileageTmpPath, append:=False, encoding:=Encoding.ASCII)
                For Each r As DataRow In _table.Rows
                    Dim dt = DirectCast(r("Date"), DateTime).ToString("MM-dd-yyyy", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)

                    Dim dest = SafeString(CStr(r("Destination")))
                    Dim purpose = SafeString(CStr(r("BusinessPurpose")))

                    Dim os = CInt(r("OdometerStart"))
                    Dim oe = CInt(r("OdometerEnd"))
                    Dim bm = CInt(r("BusinessMiles"))
                    Dim payment = SafeString(CStr(r("PaymentType")))

                    ' Match BASIC WRITE# format closely (quoted strings, comma-separated)
                    sw.WriteLine(ToBasicWriteLine(New String() {dt, dest, purpose}))
                    sw.WriteLine(ToBasicWriteLine(New String() {
                        os.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture),
                        oe.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture),
                        bm.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture),
                        payment
                    }))
                Next
            End Using

            If File.Exists(MileageDatPath) Then File.Delete(MileageDatPath)
            File.Move(MileageTmpPath, MileageDatPath)

            MessageBox.Show("Saved:" & Environment.NewLine & MileageDatPath,
                            "Mileage", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information)
        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("Save failed: " & ex.Message, "Mileage", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Shared Function SafeString(s As String) As String
        If s Is Nothing Then Return ""
        Return s.Trim()
    End Function

    ' === BASIC WRITE# compatibility helpers ===
    ' We only need to support:
    '  - strings possibly containing commas/quotes
    '  - numbers
    ' BASIC WRITE# outputs: "text",123,"more"
    ' We'll generate compatible lines and parse them back.

    Private Shared Function ToBasicWriteLine(values As IEnumerable(Of String)) As String
        Dim parts As New List(Of String)()
        For Each v In values
            If v Is Nothing Then
                parts.Add("""""")
            Else
                ' If it parses as integer, write without quotes (except the last payment/destination/purpose)
                Dim n As Integer
                If Integer.TryParse(v, NumberStyles.Integer, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, n) AndAlso v.All(Function(ch) Char.IsDigit(ch) OrElse ch = "-"c) Then
                    parts.Add(n.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture))
                Else
                    Dim escaped = v.Replace("""", """""")
                    parts.Add("""" & escaped & """")
                End If
            End If
        Next
        Return String.Join(",", parts)
    End Function

    Private Shared Function ParseBasicWriteLine(line As String) As List(Of String)
        Dim result As New List(Of String)()
        Dim sb As New StringBuilder()
        Dim inQuotes As Boolean = False
        Dim i As Integer = 0

        While i < line.Length
            Dim ch = line(i)

            If inQuotes Then
                If ch = """"c Then
                    ' doubled quote inside string -> literal quote
                    If i + 1 < line.Length AndAlso line(i + 1) = """"c Then
                        sb.Append(""""c)
                        i += 2
                        Continue While
                    Else
                        inQuotes = False
                        i += 1
                        Continue While
                    End If
                Else
                    sb.Append(ch)
                    i += 1
                    Continue While
                End If
            Else
                If ch = ","c Then
                    result.Add(sb.ToString().Trim())
                    sb.Clear()
                    i += 1
                    Continue While
                ElseIf ch = """"c Then
                    inQuotes = True
                    i += 1
                    Continue While
                Else
                    sb.Append(ch)
                    i += 1
                    Continue While
                End If
            End If
        End While

        result.Add(sb.ToString().Trim())
        Return result
    End Function

End Class
```

### What this fixes relative to your compile errors
- Defines **all** missing methods (`LoadLastOdometer`, `LoadFromLegacyDat`, `SaveAllToLegacyDat`, `DeleteSelected`, `ReloadFromDisk`, etc.)
- File is complete and has balanced `End Sub` / `End Function`

```vbnet
Public Class FormMileageTracking

    ' All non-backup/non-word data goes here (per your requirement)
```

If `\\invoice\data\MILEAGE.DAT` doesn’t exist, that’s OK—your WinForms screen can start “fresh” and it will create it the first time you hit **Save** (or we can also auto-create it on first Add).

Most likely reasons it “doesn’t appear you have it”:

1) **The GW-BASIC program wrote it somewhere else**
   - GW-BASIC writes relative paths (e.g., `OPEN "MILEAGE.DAT" ...`), meaning it goes into the **current working directory** at runtime (whatever folder you launched BASIC from), not automatically `\\invoice\data`.

2) **It’s named differently / extension differs**
   - Sometimes it ends up as `MILEAGE` (no extension) or `MILEAGE.DA_`, or lives in a different data folder.

3) **It was never used**
   - If nobody ever used Mileage Tracking historically, it simply wouldn’t exist.

## Quick way to locate it on your machine/network
Search for any of these filenames across the drive/share(s) you think were used:
- `MILEAGE.DAT`
- `ODOMETER.NUM`
- `MILEAGE.TMP`

If you tell me what you find (paths + sizes), I’ll set the app to read from the right location and migrate it into `\\invoice\data`.

## To keep you moving right now: auto-create empty files
If you want the program to create them automatically in `\\invoice\data` when missing, add this inside `OnLoad` right after `EnsureDataDirExists()`:

```vbnet
If Not File.Exists(MileageDatPath) Then
    File.WriteAllText(MileageDatPath, "", Encoding.ASCII)
End If

If Not File.Exists(OdometerNumPath) Then
    File.WriteAllText(OdometerNumPath, "0", Encoding.ASCII)
End If
```

### One question
Do you want the app to:
- **A)** always use `\\invoice\data` only (and just start fresh if no file), or
- **B)** try to *find/migrate* old `MILEAGE.DAT` if it exists elsewhere (you tell me the old folder and we copy it over once)?

If you pick **B**, tell me where the old DOS data folder was (or where `LEDGER.CUR` originally lived), and I’ll add a one-time migration step.

## Copilot

Great—then we’ll treat `\\invoice\data` as the source of truth and simply **create the legacy files if they don’t exist**.

Make these two changes in your `FormMileageTracking.vb` (the full file I gave you already supports “file missing” for `MILEAGE.DAT`, but this will also create `ODOMETER.NUM` and prevent confusion):

## 1) Add this method to the class
Place it anywhere inside `Public Class FormMileageTracking`:

```vbnet name=FormMileageTracking.vb
Private Sub EnsureLegacyFilesExist()
    If Not File.Exists(MileageDatPath) Then
        File.WriteAllText(MileageDatPath, "", Encoding.ASCII)
    End If

    If Not File.Exists(OdometerNumPath) Then
        File.WriteAllText(OdometerNumPath, "0", Encoding.ASCII)
    End If
End Sub
```

## 2) Call it from `OnLoad`
In `OnLoad`, right after `EnsureDataDirExists()`, add:

```vbnet
EnsureLegacyFilesExist()
```

So your `OnLoad` will look like:

```vbnet name=FormMileageTracking.vb
EnsureDataDirExists()
EnsureLegacyFilesExist()

BuildUi()
BuildTable()
```

### Behavior after this
- If `\\invoice\data\MILEAGE.DAT` is missing, it will be created as an empty file.
- If `\\invoice\data\ODOMETER.NUM` is missing, it will be created with `0`.
- First time you add and save, `MILEAGE.DAT` will fill with records in the BAS-compatible format.

If you want, I can also adjust it so **clicking Add immediately appends to `MILEAGE.DAT`** (like the BAS did) instead of relying on “Save” to persist changes.

## Copilot

```vbnet name=FormMileageTracking.vb
Option Strict On
Option Explicit On

Imports System
Imports System.Data
Imports System.Drawing
Imports System.Globalization
Imports System.IO
Imports System.Linq
Imports System.Text
Imports System.Windows.Forms

Public Class FormMileageTracking

    ' All non-backup/non-word data goes here (per your requirement)
    Private Const DataDir As String = "\\invoice\data"

    Private ReadOnly MileageDatPath As String = Path.Combine(DataDir, "MILEAGE.DAT")
    Private ReadOnly OdometerNumPath As String = Path.Combine(DataDir, "ODOMETER.NUM")
    Private ReadOnly MileageTmpPath As String = Path.Combine(DataDir, "MILEAGE.TMP")

    Private _table As DataTable = Nothing
    Private _grid As DataGridView = Nothing

    ' Inputs
    Private _dtpDate As DateTimePicker = Nothing
    Private _txtDestination As TextBox = Nothing
    Private _txtPurpose As TextBox = Nothing
    Private _txtStart As TextBox = Nothing
    Private _txtEnd As TextBox = Nothing
    Private _txtMiles As TextBox = Nothing
    Private _cmbPayment As ComboBox = Nothing
    Private _lblMilesHint As Label = Nothing

    ' Buttons (for hotkeys/PerformClick)
    Private _btnAdd As Button = Nothing
    Private _btnDelete As Button = Nothing
    Private _btnSave As Button = Nothing
    Private _btnReload As Button = Nothing
    Private _btnClose As Button = Nothing

    Private _lastOdometerDefault As Integer = 0
    Private _suppressAutoMiles As Boolean = False

    Public Sub New()
        InitializeComponent()
    End Sub

    Protected Overrides Sub OnLoad(e As EventArgs)
        MyBase.OnLoad(e)

        Me.Text = "Mileage Tracking"
        Me.StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent
        Me.KeyPreview = True
        Me.MinimumSize = New Size(1120, 720)

        EnsureDataDirExists()
        EnsureMileageDatExists()

        BuildUi()
        BuildTable()

        _lastOdometerDefault = LoadLastOdometer()
        ApplyDefaultStartOdometer()

        LoadFromLegacyDat()
        RecalcMilesHint()
    End Sub

    Protected Overrides Sub OnKeyDown(e As KeyEventArgs)
        MyBase.OnKeyDown(e)

        If e.Control AndAlso e.KeyCode = Keys.S Then
            SaveAllToLegacyDat()
            e.Handled = True
            Return
        End If

        If e.KeyCode = Keys.Escape Then
            Close()
            e.Handled = True
            Return
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub EnsureDataDirExists()
        If Not Directory.Exists(DataDir) Then
            Throw New DirectoryNotFoundException("Data directory not found: " & DataDir)
        End If
    End Sub

    ' You said ODOMETER.NUM already exists; only create MILEAGE.DAT if missing.
    Private Sub EnsureMileageDatExists()
        If Not File.Exists(MileageDatPath) Then
            File.WriteAllText(MileageDatPath, "", Encoding.ASCII)
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub BuildUi()
        Dim root As New TableLayoutPanel() With {
            .Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
            .Padding = New Padding(12),
            .ColumnCount = 1,
            .RowCount = 4
        }
        root.RowStyles.Add(New RowStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))          ' header
        root.RowStyles.Add(New RowStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))          ' row 1
        root.RowStyles.Add(New RowStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))          ' row 2
        root.RowStyles.Add(New RowStyle(SizeType.Percent, 100.0F))   ' grid

        Dim lblHeader As New Label() With {
            .AutoSize = True,
            .Font = New Font("Segoe UI", 16.0F, FontStyle.Bold),
            .Text = "Mileage Tracking"
        }

        ' Row 1 (date/dest/purpose/start/end)
        Dim row1 As New TableLayoutPanel() With {
            .Dock = DockStyle.Top,
            .AutoSize = True,
            .ColumnCount = 10
        }
        row1.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))        ' Date
        row1.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 140))
        row1.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))        ' Destination
        row1.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 240))
        row1.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))        ' Purpose
        row1.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Percent, 100.0F))
        row1.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))        ' Start
        row1.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 95))
        row1.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))        ' End
        row1.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 95))

        _dtpDate = New DateTimePicker() With {.Format = DateTimePickerFormat.Short, .Value = DateTime.Today, .Dock = DockStyle.Fill}
        _txtDestination = New TextBox() With {.Dock = DockStyle.Fill}
        _txtPurpose = New TextBox() With {.Dock = DockStyle.Fill}
        _txtStart = New TextBox() With {.Dock = DockStyle.Fill}
        _txtEnd = New TextBox() With {.Dock = DockStyle.Fill}

        AddHandler _txtStart.TextChanged, Sub() OnOdometerChanged()
        AddHandler _txtEnd.TextChanged, Sub() OnOdometerChanged()

        ' Enter in Purpose adds (DOS-like flow)
        AddHandler _txtPurpose.KeyDown,
            Sub(sender, e)
                If e.KeyCode = Keys.Enter Then
                    AddEntry()
                    e.SuppressKeyPress = True
                End If
            End Sub

        row1.Controls.Add(New Label() With {.AutoSize = True, .Text = "Date:", .Padding = New Padding(0, 8, 6, 0)}, 0, 0)
        row1.Controls.Add(_dtpDate, 1, 0)
        row1.Controls.Add(New Label() With {.AutoSize = True, .Text = "Destination:", .Padding = New Padding(12, 8, 6, 0)}, 2, 0)
        row1.Controls.Add(_txtDestination, 3, 0)
        row1.Controls.Add(New Label() With {.AutoSize = True, .Text = "Business Purpose:", .Padding = New Padding(12, 8, 6, 0)}, 4, 0)
        row1.Controls.Add(_txtPurpose, 5, 0)
        row1.Controls.Add(New Label() With {.AutoSize = True, .Text = "Start:", .Padding = New Padding(12, 8, 6, 0)}, 6, 0)
        row1.Controls.Add(_txtStart, 7, 0)
        row1.Controls.Add(New Label() With {.AutoSize = True, .Text = "End:", .Padding = New Padding(12, 8, 6, 0)}, 8, 0)
        row1.Controls.Add(_txtEnd, 9, 0)

        ' Row 2 (miles/payment/buttons)
        Dim row2 As New TableLayoutPanel() With {.Dock = DockStyle.Top, .AutoSize = True, .ColumnCount = 8}
        row2.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))        ' miles label
        row2.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 95))    ' miles textbox
        row2.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))        ' hint
        row2.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))        ' payment label
        row2.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 140))   ' payment combo
        row2.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Percent, 100.0F)) ' spacer
        row2.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))        ' buttons

        _txtMiles = New TextBox() With {.Dock = DockStyle.Fill}

        _lblMilesHint = New Label() With {
            .AutoSize = True,
            .Font = New Font("Segoe UI", 10.0F, FontStyle.Bold),
            .Text = "Miles: —",
            .Padding = New Padding(8, 7, 8, 7)
        }

        _cmbPayment = New ComboBox() With {.DropDownStyle = ComboBoxStyle.DropDownList, .Dock = DockStyle.Fill}
        _cmbPayment.Items.Add("Cash")
        _cmbPayment.Items.Add("Charge")
        _cmbPayment.SelectedIndex = 0

        _btnAdd = New Button() With {.Text = "Add", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler _btnAdd.Click, Sub() AddEntry()

        _btnDelete = New Button() With {.Text = "Delete Selected", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler _btnDelete.Click, Sub() DeleteSelected()

        _btnSave = New Button() With {.Text = "Save (Ctrl+S)", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler _btnSave.Click, Sub() SaveAllToLegacyDat()

        _btnReload = New Button() With {.Text = "Reload", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler _btnReload.Click, Sub() ReloadFromDisk()

        _btnClose = New Button() With {.Text = "(Esc) Close", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler _btnClose.Click, Sub() Close()

        Dim btnPanel As New FlowLayoutPanel() With {.AutoSize = True, .FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight, .WrapContents = False}
        btnPanel.Controls.Add(_btnAdd)
        btnPanel.Controls.Add(_btnDelete)
        btnPanel.Controls.Add(_btnSave)
        btnPanel.Controls.Add(_btnReload)
        btnPanel.Controls.Add(_btnClose)

        row2.Controls.Add(New Label() With {.AutoSize = True, .Text = "Business Miles:", .Padding = New Padding(0, 8, 6, 0)}, 0, 0)
        row2.Controls.Add(_txtMiles, 1, 0)
        row2.Controls.Add(_lblMilesHint, 2, 0)
        row2.Controls.Add(New Label() With {.AutoSize = True, .Text = "Payment:", .Padding = New Padding(12, 8, 6, 0)}, 3, 0)
        row2.Controls.Add(_cmbPayment, 4, 0)
        row2.Controls.Add(New Panel() With {.Dock = DockStyle.Fill}, 5, 0)
        row2.Controls.Add(btnPanel, 6, 0)

        _grid = New DataGridView() With {
            .Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
            .ReadOnly = False,
            .AllowUserToAddRows = False,
            .AllowUserToDeleteRows = False,
            .SelectionMode = DataGridViewSelectionMode.FullRowSelect,
            .MultiSelect = True,
            .AutoSizeColumnsMode = DataGridViewAutoSizeColumnsMode.Fill
        }

        root.Controls.Add(lblHeader, 0, 0)
        root.Controls.Add(row1, 0, 1)
        root.Controls.Add(row2, 0, 2)
        root.Controls.Add(_grid, 0, 3)

        Controls.Clear()
        Controls.Add(root)
    End Sub

    Private Sub BuildTable()
        _table = New DataTable("Mileage")
        _table.Columns.Add("Date", GetType(DateTime))
        _table.Columns.Add("Destination", GetType(String))
        _table.Columns.Add("BusinessPurpose", GetType(String))
        _table.Columns.Add("OdometerStart", GetType(Integer))
        _table.Columns.Add("OdometerEnd", GetType(Integer))
        _table.Columns.Add("BusinessMiles", GetType(Integer))
        _table.Columns.Add("PaymentType", GetType(String))

        _grid.DataSource = _table
        _grid.Columns("Date").DefaultCellStyle.Format = "d"

        _grid.Columns("OdometerStart").FillWeight = 12
        _grid.Columns("OdometerEnd").FillWeight = 12
        _grid.Columns("BusinessMiles").FillWeight = 10
        _grid.Columns("PaymentType").FillWeight = 10
        _grid.Columns("Destination").FillWeight = 22
        _grid.Columns("BusinessPurpose").FillWeight = 34
    End Sub

    Private Sub OnOdometerChanged()
        RecalcMilesHint()

        Dim os As Integer
        Dim oe As Integer

        If Integer.TryParse(_txtStart.Text.Trim(), os) AndAlso Integer.TryParse(_txtEnd.Text.Trim(), oe) Then
            Dim miles = oe - os
            If miles > 0 Then
                If String.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_txtMiles.Text) Then
                    _suppressAutoMiles = True
                    _txtMiles.Text = miles.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)
                    _suppressAutoMiles = False
                End If
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub RecalcMilesHint()
        Dim os As Integer
        Dim oe As Integer
        If Integer.TryParse(_txtStart.Text.Trim(), os) AndAlso Integer.TryParse(_txtEnd.Text.Trim(), oe) Then
            Dim miles = oe - os
            If miles >= 0 Then
                _lblMilesHint.Text = "Miles: " & miles.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)
            Else
                _lblMilesHint.Text = "Miles: (end < start)"
            End If
        Else
            _lblMilesHint.Text = "Miles: —"
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub ApplyDefaultStartOdometer()
        If _lastOdometerDefault > 0 Then
            _txtStart.Text = _lastOdometerDefault.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)
        Else
            _txtStart.Clear()
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Function LoadLastOdometer() As Integer
        Try
            If Not File.Exists(OdometerNumPath) Then Return 0

            Dim txt = File.ReadAllText(OdometerNumPath).Trim()
            txt = txt.Trim().TrimEnd(","c)

            Dim v As Integer
            If Integer.TryParse(txt, NumberStyles.Integer, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, v) Then
                Return v
            End If

            Return 0
        Catch
            Return 0
        End Try
    End Function

    Private Sub SaveLastOdometer(odometerEnding As Integer)
        Try
            File.WriteAllText(OdometerNumPath, odometerEnding.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture), Encoding.ASCII)
        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("Could not update ODOMETER.NUM: " & ex.Message, "Mileage", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub AddEntry()
        Dim dest = _txtDestination.Text.Trim()
        Dim purpose = _txtPurpose.Text.Trim()
        Dim payment = If(_cmbPayment.SelectedItem Is Nothing, "Cash", _cmbPayment.SelectedItem.ToString())

        Dim os As Integer
        Dim oe As Integer
        Dim bm As Integer

        If Not Integer.TryParse(_txtStart.Text.Trim(), os) Then
            MessageBox.Show("Odometer Start must be a whole number.", "Mileage", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
            _txtStart.Focus()
            Return
        End If

        If os < 999 Then
            MessageBox.Show("Odometer Start must be at least 999 (matches original BAS validation).", "Mileage", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
            _txtStart.Focus()
            Return
        End If

        If Not Integer.TryParse(_txtEnd.Text.Trim(), oe) Then
            MessageBox.Show("Odometer End must be a whole number.", "Mileage", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
            _txtEnd.Focus()
            Return
        End If

        If oe <= os Then
            MessageBox.Show("Odometer End must be greater than Start.", "Mileage", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
            _txtEnd.Focus()
            Return
        End If

        If Not Integer.TryParse(_txtMiles.Text.Trim(), bm) Then
            MessageBox.Show("Business Miles must be a whole number.", "Mileage", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
            _txtMiles.Focus()
            Return
        End If

        If bm < 1 Then
            MessageBox.Show("Business Miles must be at least 1.", "Mileage", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
            _txtMiles.Focus()
            Return
        End If

        Dim row = _table.NewRow()
        row("Date") = _dtpDate.Value.Date
        row("Destination") = dest
        row("BusinessPurpose") = purpose
        row("OdometerStart") = os
        row("OdometerEnd") = oe
        row("BusinessMiles") = bm
        row("PaymentType") = payment
        _table.Rows.Add(row)

        ' BAS behavior: update odometer default to OE
        SaveLastOdometer(oe)
        _lastOdometerDefault = oe

        ' Clear for next entry
        _txtDestination.Clear()
        _txtPurpose.Clear()
        _txtEnd.Clear()
        _txtMiles.Clear()

        ApplyDefaultStartOdometer()
        _txtEnd.Focus()
        RecalcMilesHint()
    End Sub

    Private Sub DeleteSelected()
        If _grid.SelectedRows.Count = 0 Then Return

        If MessageBox.Show($"Delete {_grid.SelectedRows.Count} selected row(s)?",
                           "Mileage", MessageBoxButtons.YesNo, MessageBoxIcon.Question) <> DialogResult.Yes Then
            Return
        End If

        Dim idxs = _grid.SelectedRows.Cast(Of DataGridViewRow)().
            Select(Function(r) r.Index).
            Where(Function(i) i >= 0).
            OrderByDescending(Function(i) i).
            ToList()

        For Each i In idxs
            If i < _table.Rows.Count Then
                _table.Rows.RemoveAt(i)
            End If
        Next
    End Sub

    Private Sub ReloadFromDisk()
        If MessageBox.Show("Reload from disk and lose unsaved changes?",
                           "Mileage", MessageBoxButtons.YesNo, MessageBoxIcon.Question) <> DialogResult.Yes Then
            Return
        End If

        LoadFromLegacyDat()
    End Sub

    Private Sub LoadFromLegacyDat()
        _table.Rows.Clear()

        If Not File.Exists(MileageDatPath) Then Return

        Dim lines = File.ReadAllLines(MileageDatPath, Encoding.ASCII).
            Where(Function(l) Not String.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(l)).
            ToList()

        Dim i As Integer = 0
        While i + 1 < lines.Count
            Dim line1 = lines(i).Trim()
            Dim line2 = lines(i + 1).Trim()

            Dim parts1 = ParseBasicWriteLine(line1)
            Dim parts2 = ParseBasicWriteLine(line2)

            If parts1.Count >= 3 AndAlso parts2.Count >= 4 Then
                Dim dtText = parts1(0)
                Dim dest = parts1(1)
                Dim purpose = parts1(2)

                Dim os As Integer
                Dim oe As Integer
                Dim bm As Integer
                Dim payment = parts2(3)

                If Integer.TryParse(parts2(0), NumberStyles.Integer, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, os) AndAlso
                   Integer.TryParse(parts2(1), NumberStyles.Integer, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, oe) AndAlso
                   Integer.TryParse(parts2(2), NumberStyles.Integer, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, bm) Then

                    Dim dt As DateTime
                    If DateTime.TryParseExact(dtText, "MM-dd-yyyy", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, DateTimeStyles.None, dt) Then
                        Dim row = _table.NewRow()
                        row("Date") = dt.Date
                        row("Destination") = dest
                        row("BusinessPurpose") = purpose
                        row("OdometerStart") = os
                        row("OdometerEnd") = oe
                        row("BusinessMiles") = bm
                        row("PaymentType") = payment
                        _table.Rows.Add(row)
                    End If
                End If
            End If

            i += 2
        End While
    End Sub

    Private Sub SaveAllToLegacyDat()
        Try
            Using sw As New StreamWriter(MileageTmpPath, append:=False, encoding:=Encoding.ASCII)
                For Each r As DataRow In _table.Rows
                    Dim dt = DirectCast(r("Date"), DateTime).ToString("MM-dd-yyyy", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)

                    Dim dest = SafeString(CStr(r("Destination")))
                    Dim purpose = SafeString(CStr(r("BusinessPurpose")))

                    Dim os = CInt(r("OdometerStart"))
                    Dim oe = CInt(r("OdometerEnd"))
                    Dim bm = CInt(r("BusinessMiles"))
                    Dim payment = SafeString(CStr(r("PaymentType")))

                    sw.WriteLine(ToBasicWriteLine(New String() {dt, dest, purpose}))
                    sw.WriteLine(ToBasicWriteLine(New String() {
                        os.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture),
                        oe.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture),
                        bm.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture),
                        payment
                    }))
                Next
            End Using

            If File.Exists(MileageDatPath) Then File.Delete(MileageDatPath)
            File.Move(MileageTmpPath, MileageDatPath)

            MessageBox.Show("Saved:" & Environment.NewLine & MileageDatPath,
                            "Mileage", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information)
        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("Save failed: " & ex.Message, "Mileage", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Shared Function SafeString(s As String) As String
        If s Is Nothing Then Return ""
        Return s.Trim()
    End Function

    ' === BASIC WRITE# compatibility helpers ===
    Private Shared Function ToBasicWriteLine(values As IEnumerable(Of String)) As String
        Dim parts As New List(Of String)()
        For Each v In values
            If v Is Nothing Then
                parts.Add("""""")
            Else
                Dim n As Integer
                If Integer.TryParse(v, NumberStyles.Integer, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, n) AndAlso
                   v.All(Function(ch) Char.IsDigit(ch) OrElse ch = "-"c) Then
                    parts.Add(n.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture))
                Else
                    Dim escaped = v.Replace("""", """""")
                    parts.Add("""" & escaped & """")
                End If
            End If
        Next
        Return String.Join(",", parts)
    End Function

    Private Shared Function ParseBasicWriteLine(line As String) As List(Of String)
        Dim result As New List(Of String)()
        Dim sb As New StringBuilder()
        Dim inQuotes As Boolean = False
        Dim i As Integer = 0

        While i < line.Length
            Dim ch = line(i)

            If inQuotes Then
                If ch = """"c Then
                    If i + 1 < line.Length AndAlso line(i + 1) = """"c Then
                        sb.Append(""""c)
                        i += 2
                    Else
                        inQuotes = False
                        i += 1
                    End If
                Else
                    sb.Append(ch)
                    i += 1
                End If
            Else
                If ch = ","c Then
                    result.Add(sb.ToString().Trim())
                    sb.Clear()
                    i += 1
                ElseIf ch = """"c Then
                    inQuotes = True
                    i += 1
                Else
                    sb.Append(ch)
                    i += 1
                End If
            End If
        End While

        result.Add(sb.ToString().Trim())
        Return result
    End Function

End Class
```

## @testsubject117

whenever I click the play button, the main menu appears and works. when I click mileage tracking button, it closes/crashes

## Copilot

The crash is almost certainly from this line:

- `Throw New DirectoryNotFoundException("Data directory not found: \\invoice\data")`

So when you click **Mileage Tracking**, it tries to access `\\invoice\data`. If that UNC path isn’t reachable from your dev machine (or needs different credentials), the form throws and your app dies.

## Fix it: don’t throw; show a friendly message and close the form
Replace your `EnsureDataDirExists()` method with this safer version:

```vbnet name=FormMileageTracking.vb
Private Function EnsureDataDirExists() As Boolean
    Try
        If Directory.Exists(DataDir) Then Return True

        MessageBox.Show("Mileage data folder not found:" & Environment.NewLine &
                        DataDir & Environment.NewLine & Environment.NewLine &
                        "Fix the network path or connect to the share, then try again.",
                        "Mileage Tracking",
                        MessageBoxButtons.OK,
                        MessageBoxIcon.Error)
        Return False
    Catch ex As Exception
        MessageBox.Show("Unable to access mileage data folder:" & Environment.NewLine &
                        DataDir & Environment.NewLine & Environment.NewLine &
                        ex.Message,
                        "Mileage Tracking",
                        MessageBoxButtons.OK,
                        MessageBoxIcon.Error)
        Return False
    End Try
End Function
```

Then update the start of `OnLoad` to bail out if it can’t reach the share:

```vbnet name=FormMileageTracking.vb
If Not EnsureDataDirExists() Then
    Close()
    Return
End If

EnsureMileageDatExists()
```

That will stop the “instant crash” and tell you exactly what’s wrong.

## Next: confirm what the real data path is on your machine
On your dev PC, does `\\invoice\data` actually exist? Try in File Explorer. If it doesn’t, tell me the correct UNC (sometimes it’s like `\\INVOICE-SERVER\data` or `\\invoice\data\AMiOffice` etc).

## If it still closes after this
Then it’s likely failing on:
- writing `MILEAGE.DAT` (permission issue), or
- reading `ODOMETER.NUM` (permission/format issue)

If you paste the exception details from Visual Studio **Output** window (or turn on “Break on all exceptions”), I can pinpoint the exact line.

If you want, paste your current `FormMainMenu` click handler for Mileage Tracking too—sometimes the form is opened in a `Using ... End Using` block and an exception disposes it immediately.

## @testsubject117

on the dev machine, \\invoice\data doesn't exist. that only exists on the test virtual machine. so yes, please change it to a friendly error that closes. please regenerate the entire code for the file so I can paste it

## Copilot

```vbnet name=FormMileageTracking.vb
Option Strict On
Option Explicit On

Imports System
Imports System.Data
Imports System.Drawing
Imports System.Globalization
Imports System.IO
Imports System.Linq
Imports System.Text
Imports System.Windows.Forms

Public Class FormMileageTracking

    ' All non-backup/non-word data goes here (per your requirement)
    Private Const DataDir As String = "\\invoice\data"

    Private ReadOnly MileageDatPath As String = Path.Combine(DataDir, "MILEAGE.DAT")
    Private ReadOnly OdometerNumPath As String = Path.Combine(DataDir, "ODOMETER.NUM")
    Private ReadOnly MileageTmpPath As String = Path.Combine(DataDir, "MILEAGE.TMP")

    Private _table As DataTable = Nothing
    Private _grid As DataGridView = Nothing

    ' Inputs
    Private _dtpDate As DateTimePicker = Nothing
    Private _txtDestination As TextBox = Nothing
    Private _txtPurpose As TextBox = Nothing
    Private _txtStart As TextBox = Nothing
    Private _txtEnd As TextBox = Nothing
    Private _txtMiles As TextBox = Nothing
    Private _cmbPayment As ComboBox = Nothing
    Private _lblMilesHint As Label = Nothing

    ' Buttons (for hotkeys/PerformClick)
    Private _btnAdd As Button = Nothing
    Private _btnDelete As Button = Nothing
    Private _btnSave As Button = Nothing
    Private _btnReload As Button = Nothing
    Private _btnClose As Button = Nothing

    Private _lastOdometerDefault As Integer = 0
    Private _suppressAutoMiles As Boolean = False

    Public Sub New()
        InitializeComponent()
    End Sub

    Protected Overrides Sub OnLoad(e As EventArgs)
        MyBase.OnLoad(e)

        Me.Text = "Mileage Tracking"
        Me.StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent
        Me.KeyPreview = True
        Me.MinimumSize = New Size(1120, 720)

        ' On dev machines the UNC share may not exist.
        ' Show a friendly error and close instead of crashing the whole app.
        If Not EnsureDataDirExistsFriendly() Then
            Close()
            Return
        End If

        EnsureMileageDatExists()

        BuildUi()
        BuildTable()

        _lastOdometerDefault = LoadLastOdometer()
        ApplyDefaultStartOdometer()

        LoadFromLegacyDat()
        RecalcMilesHint()
    End Sub

    Protected Overrides Sub OnKeyDown(e As KeyEventArgs)
        MyBase.OnKeyDown(e)

        If e.Control AndAlso e.KeyCode = Keys.S Then
            SaveAllToLegacyDat()
            e.Handled = True
            Return
        End If

        If e.KeyCode = Keys.Escape Then
            Close()
            e.Handled = True
            Return
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Function EnsureDataDirExistsFriendly() As Boolean
        Try
            If Directory.Exists(DataDir) Then Return True

            MessageBox.Show("Mileage Tracking cannot open because the data folder is not available:" & Environment.NewLine &
                            DataDir & Environment.NewLine & Environment.NewLine &
                            "This is expected on some dev machines. Please run on the test VM or connect to the share.",
                            "Mileage Tracking",
                            MessageBoxButtons.OK,
                            MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Return False
        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("Mileage Tracking cannot access the data folder:" & Environment.NewLine &
                            DataDir & Environment.NewLine & Environment.NewLine &
                            ex.Message,
                            "Mileage Tracking",
                            MessageBoxButtons.OK,
                            MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Return False
        End Try
    End Function

    ' You said ODOMETER.NUM already exists; only create MILEAGE.DAT if missing.
    Private Sub EnsureMileageDatExists()
        Try
            If Not File.Exists(MileageDatPath) Then
                File.WriteAllText(MileageDatPath, "", Encoding.ASCII)
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("Unable to create/open MILEAGE.DAT in:" & Environment.NewLine &
                            DataDir & Environment.NewLine & Environment.NewLine &
                            ex.Message,
                            "Mileage Tracking",
                            MessageBoxButtons.OK,
                            MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            ' After this, later loads/saves will fail anyway; close to avoid confusion.
            Close()
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub BuildUi()
        Dim root As New TableLayoutPanel() With {
            .Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
            .Padding = New Padding(12),
            .ColumnCount = 1,
            .RowCount = 4
        }
        root.RowStyles.Add(New RowStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))          ' header
        root.RowStyles.Add(New RowStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))          ' row 1
        root.RowStyles.Add(New RowStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))          ' row 2
        root.RowStyles.Add(New RowStyle(SizeType.Percent, 100.0F))   ' grid

        Dim lblHeader As New Label() With {
            .AutoSize = True,
            .Font = New Font("Segoe UI", 16.0F, FontStyle.Bold),
            .Text = "Mileage Tracking"
        }

        ' Row 1 (date/dest/purpose/start/end)
        Dim row1 As New TableLayoutPanel() With {
            .Dock = DockStyle.Top,
            .AutoSize = True,
            .ColumnCount = 10
        }
        row1.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))        ' Date
        row1.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 140))
        row1.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))        ' Destination
        row1.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 240))
        row1.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))        ' Purpose
        row1.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Percent, 100.0F))
        row1.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))        ' Start
        row1.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 95))
        row1.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))        ' End
        row1.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 95))

        _dtpDate = New DateTimePicker() With {.Format = DateTimePickerFormat.Short, .Value = DateTime.Today, .Dock = DockStyle.Fill}
        _txtDestination = New TextBox() With {.Dock = DockStyle.Fill}
        _txtPurpose = New TextBox() With {.Dock = DockStyle.Fill}
        _txtStart = New TextBox() With {.Dock = DockStyle.Fill}
        _txtEnd = New TextBox() With {.Dock = DockStyle.Fill}

        AddHandler _txtStart.TextChanged, Sub() OnOdometerChanged()
        AddHandler _txtEnd.TextChanged, Sub() OnOdometerChanged()

        ' Enter in Purpose adds
        AddHandler _txtPurpose.KeyDown,
            Sub(sender, ev)
                If ev.KeyCode = Keys.Enter Then
                    AddEntry()
                    ev.SuppressKeyPress = True
                End If
            End Sub

        row1.Controls.Add(New Label() With {.AutoSize = True, .Text = "Date:", .Padding = New Padding(0, 8, 6, 0)}, 0, 0)
        row1.Controls.Add(_dtpDate, 1, 0)
        row1.Controls.Add(New Label() With {.AutoSize = True, .Text = "Destination:", .Padding = New Padding(12, 8, 6, 0)}, 2, 0)
        row1.Controls.Add(_txtDestination, 3, 0)
        row1.Controls.Add(New Label() With {.AutoSize = True, .Text = "Business Purpose:", .Padding = New Padding(12, 8, 6, 0)}, 4, 0)
        row1.Controls.Add(_txtPurpose, 5, 0)
        row1.Controls.Add(New Label() With {.AutoSize = True, .Text = "Start:", .Padding = New Padding(12, 8, 6, 0)}, 6, 0)
        row1.Controls.Add(_txtStart, 7, 0)
        row1.Controls.Add(New Label() With {.AutoSize = True, .Text = "End:", .Padding = New Padding(12, 8, 6, 0)}, 8, 0)
        row1.Controls.Add(_txtEnd, 9, 0)

        ' Row 2 (miles/payment/buttons)
        Dim row2 As New TableLayoutPanel() With {.Dock = DockStyle.Top, .AutoSize = True, .ColumnCount = 8}
        row2.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))        ' miles label
        row2.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 95))    ' miles textbox
        row2.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))        ' hint
        row2.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))        ' payment label
        row2.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 140))   ' payment combo
        row2.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Percent, 100.0F)) ' spacer
        row2.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))        ' buttons

        _txtMiles = New TextBox() With {.Dock = DockStyle.Fill}

        _lblMilesHint = New Label() With {
            .AutoSize = True,
            .Font = New Font("Segoe UI", 10.0F, FontStyle.Bold),
            .Text = "Miles: —",
            .Padding = New Padding(8, 7, 8, 7)
        }

        _cmbPayment = New ComboBox() With {.DropDownStyle = ComboBoxStyle.DropDownList, .Dock = DockStyle.Fill}
        _cmbPayment.Items.Add("Cash")
        _cmbPayment.Items.Add("Charge")
        _cmbPayment.SelectedIndex = 0

        _btnAdd = New Button() With {.Text = "Add", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler _btnAdd.Click, Sub() AddEntry()

        _btnDelete = New Button() With {.Text = "Delete Selected", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler _btnDelete.Click, Sub() DeleteSelected()

        _btnSave = New Button() With {.Text = "Save (Ctrl+S)", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler _btnSave.Click, Sub() SaveAllToLegacyDat()

        _btnReload = New Button() With {.Text = "Reload", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler _btnReload.Click, Sub() ReloadFromDisk()

        _btnClose = New Button() With {.Text = "(Esc) Close", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler _btnClose.Click, Sub() Close()

        Dim btnPanel As New FlowLayoutPanel() With {.AutoSize = True, .FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight, .WrapContents = False}
        btnPanel.Controls.Add(_btnAdd)
        btnPanel.Controls.Add(_btnDelete)
        btnPanel.Controls.Add(_btnSave)
        btnPanel.Controls.Add(_btnReload)
        btnPanel.Controls.Add(_btnClose)

        row2.Controls.Add(New Label() With {.AutoSize = True, .Text = "Business Miles:", .Padding = New Padding(0, 8, 6, 0)}, 0, 0)
        row2.Controls.Add(_txtMiles, 1, 0)
        row2.Controls.Add(_lblMilesHint, 2, 0)
        row2.Controls.Add(New Label() With {.AutoSize = True, .Text = "Payment:", .Padding = New Padding(12, 8, 6, 0)}, 3, 0)
        row2.Controls.Add(_cmbPayment, 4, 0)
        row2.Controls.Add(New Panel() With {.Dock = DockStyle.Fill}, 5, 0)
        row2.Controls.Add(btnPanel, 6, 0)

        _grid = New DataGridView() With {
            .Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
            .ReadOnly = False,
            .AllowUserToAddRows = False,
            .AllowUserToDeleteRows = False,
            .SelectionMode = DataGridViewSelectionMode.FullRowSelect,
            .MultiSelect = True,
            .AutoSizeColumnsMode = DataGridViewAutoSizeColumnsMode.Fill
        }

        root.Controls.Add(lblHeader, 0, 0)
        root.Controls.Add(row1, 0, 1)
        root.Controls.Add(row2, 0, 2)
        root.Controls.Add(_grid, 0, 3)

        Controls.Clear()
        Controls.Add(root)
    End Sub

    Private Sub BuildTable()
        _table = New DataTable("Mileage")
        _table.Columns.Add("Date", GetType(DateTime))
        _table.Columns.Add("Destination", GetType(String))
        _table.Columns.Add("BusinessPurpose", GetType(String))
        _table.Columns.Add("OdometerStart", GetType(Integer))
        _table.Columns.Add("OdometerEnd", GetType(Integer))
        _table.Columns.Add("BusinessMiles", GetType(Integer))
        _table.Columns.Add("PaymentType", GetType(String))

        _grid.DataSource = _table
        _grid.Columns("Date").DefaultCellStyle.Format = "d"

        _grid.Columns("OdometerStart").FillWeight = 12
        _grid.Columns("OdometerEnd").FillWeight = 12
        _grid.Columns("BusinessMiles").FillWeight = 10
        _grid.Columns("PaymentType").FillWeight = 10
        _grid.Columns("Destination").FillWeight = 22
        _grid.Columns("BusinessPurpose").FillWeight = 34
    End Sub

    Private Sub OnOdometerChanged()
        RecalcMilesHint()

        Dim os As Integer
        Dim oe As Integer

        If Integer.TryParse(_txtStart.Text.Trim(), os) AndAlso Integer.TryParse(_txtEnd.Text.Trim(), oe) Then
            Dim miles = oe - os
            If miles > 0 Then
                If String.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_txtMiles.Text) Then
                    _suppressAutoMiles = True
                    _txtMiles.Text = miles.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)
                    _suppressAutoMiles = False
                End If
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub RecalcMilesHint()
        Dim os As Integer
        Dim oe As Integer
        If Integer.TryParse(_txtStart.Text.Trim(), os) AndAlso Integer.TryParse(_txtEnd.Text.Trim(), oe) Then
            Dim miles = oe - os
            If miles >= 0 Then
                _lblMilesHint.Text = "Miles: " & miles.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)
            Else
                _lblMilesHint.Text = "Miles: (end < start)"
            End If
        Else
            _lblMilesHint.Text = "Miles: —"
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub ApplyDefaultStartOdometer()
        If _lastOdometerDefault > 0 Then
            _txtStart.Text = _lastOdometerDefault.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)
        Else
            _txtStart.Clear()
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Function LoadLastOdometer() As Integer
        Try
            If Not File.Exists(OdometerNumPath) Then Return 0

            Dim txt = File.ReadAllText(OdometerNumPath).Trim()
            txt = txt.Trim().TrimEnd(","c)

            Dim v As Integer
            If Integer.TryParse(txt, NumberStyles.Integer, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, v) Then
                Return v
            End If

            Return 0
        Catch
            Return 0
        End Try
    End Function

    Private Sub SaveLastOdometer(odometerEnding As Integer)
        Try
            File.WriteAllText(OdometerNumPath, odometerEnding.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture), Encoding.ASCII)
        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("Could not update ODOMETER.NUM: " & ex.Message, "Mileage", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub AddEntry()
        Dim dest = _txtDestination.Text.Trim()
        Dim purpose = _txtPurpose.Text.Trim()
        Dim payment = If(_cmbPayment.SelectedItem Is Nothing, "Cash", _cmbPayment.SelectedItem.ToString())

        Dim os As Integer
        Dim oe As Integer
        Dim bm As Integer

        If Not Integer.TryParse(_txtStart.Text.Trim(), os) Then
            MessageBox.Show("Odometer Start must be a whole number.", "Mileage", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
            _txtStart.Focus()
            Return
        End If

        If os < 999 Then
            MessageBox.Show("Odometer Start must be at least 999 (matches original BAS validation).", "Mileage", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
            _txtStart.Focus()
            Return
        End If

        If Not Integer.TryParse(_txtEnd.Text.Trim(), oe) Then
            MessageBox.Show("Odometer End must be a whole number.", "Mileage", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
            _txtEnd.Focus()
            Return
        End If

        If oe <= os Then
            MessageBox.Show("Odometer End must be greater than Start.", "Mileage", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
            _txtEnd.Focus()
            Return
        End If

        If Not Integer.TryParse(_txtMiles.Text.Trim(), bm) Then
            MessageBox.Show("Business Miles must be a whole number.", "Mileage", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
            _txtMiles.Focus()
            Return
        End If

        If bm < 1 Then
            MessageBox.Show("Business Miles must be at least 1.", "Mileage", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
            _txtMiles.Focus()
            Return
        End If

        Dim row = _table.NewRow()
        row("Date") = _dtpDate.Value.Date
        row("Destination") = dest
        row("BusinessPurpose") = purpose
        row("OdometerStart") = os
        row("OdometerEnd") = oe
        row("BusinessMiles") = bm
        row("PaymentType") = payment
        _table.Rows.Add(row)

        ' BAS behavior: update odometer default to OE
        SaveLastOdometer(oe)
        _lastOdometerDefault = oe

        ' Clear for next entry
        _txtDestination.Clear()
        _txtPurpose.Clear()
        _txtEnd.Clear()
        _txtMiles.Clear()

        ApplyDefaultStartOdometer()
        _txtEnd.Focus()
        RecalcMilesHint()
    End Sub

    Private Sub DeleteSelected()
        If _grid.SelectedRows.Count = 0 Then Return

        If MessageBox.Show($"Delete {_grid.SelectedRows.Count} selected row(s)?",
                           "Mileage", MessageBoxButtons.YesNo, MessageBoxIcon.Question) <> DialogResult.Yes Then
            Return
        End If

        Dim idxs = _grid.SelectedRows.Cast(Of DataGridViewRow)().
            Select(Function(r) r.Index).
            Where(Function(i) i >= 0).
            OrderByDescending(Function(i) i).
            ToList()

        For Each i In idxs
            If i < _table.Rows.Count Then
                _table.Rows.RemoveAt(i)
            End If
        Next
    End Sub

    Private Sub ReloadFromDisk()
        If MessageBox.Show("Reload from disk and lose unsaved changes?",
                           "Mileage", MessageBoxButtons.YesNo, MessageBoxIcon.Question) <> DialogResult.Yes Then
            Return
        End If

        LoadFromLegacyDat()
    End Sub

    Private Sub LoadFromLegacyDat()
        _table.Rows.Clear()

        If Not File.Exists(MileageDatPath) Then Return

        Dim lines = File.ReadAllLines(MileageDatPath, Encoding.ASCII).
            Where(Function(l) Not String.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(l)).
            ToList()

        Dim i As Integer = 0
        While i + 1 < lines.Count
            Dim line1 = lines(i).Trim()
            Dim line2 = lines(i + 1).Trim()

            Dim parts1 = ParseBasicWriteLine(line1)
            Dim parts2 = ParseBasicWriteLine(line2)

            If parts1.Count >= 3 AndAlso parts2.Count >= 4 Then
                Dim dtText = parts1(0)
                Dim dest = parts1(1)
                Dim purpose = parts1(2)

                Dim os As Integer
                Dim oe As Integer
                Dim bm As Integer
                Dim payment = parts2(3)

                If Integer.TryParse(parts2(0), NumberStyles.Integer, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, os) AndAlso
                   Integer.TryParse(parts2(1), NumberStyles.Integer, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, oe) AndAlso
                   Integer.TryParse(parts2(2), NumberStyles.Integer, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, bm) Then

                    Dim dt As DateTime
                    If DateTime.TryParseExact(dtText, "MM-dd-yyyy", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, DateTimeStyles.None, dt) Then
                        Dim row = _table.NewRow()
                        row("Date") = dt.Date
                        row("Destination") = dest
                        row("BusinessPurpose") = purpose
                        row("OdometerStart") = os
                        row("OdometerEnd") = oe
                        row("BusinessMiles") = bm
                        row("PaymentType") = payment
                        _table.Rows.Add(row)
                    End If
                End If
            End If

            i += 2
        End While
    End Sub

    Private Sub SaveAllToLegacyDat()
        Try
            Using sw As New StreamWriter(MileageTmpPath, append:=False, encoding:=Encoding.ASCII)
                For Each r As DataRow In _table.Rows
                    Dim dt = DirectCast(r("Date"), DateTime).ToString("MM-dd-yyyy", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)

                    Dim dest = SafeString(CStr(r("Destination")))
                    Dim purpose = SafeString(CStr(r("BusinessPurpose")))

                    Dim os = CInt(r("OdometerStart"))
                    Dim oe = CInt(r("OdometerEnd"))
                    Dim bm = CInt(r("BusinessMiles"))
                    Dim payment = SafeString(CStr(r("PaymentType")))

                    sw.WriteLine(ToBasicWriteLine(New String() {dt, dest, purpose}))
                    sw.WriteLine(ToBasicWriteLine(New String() {
                        os.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture),
                        oe.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture),
                        bm.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture),
                        payment
                    }))
                Next
            End Using

            If File.Exists(MileageDatPath) Then File.Delete(MileageDatPath)
            File.Move(MileageTmpPath, MileageDatPath)

            MessageBox.Show("Saved:" & Environment.NewLine & MileageDatPath,
                            "Mileage", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information)
        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("Save failed: " & ex.Message, "Mileage", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Shared Function SafeString(s As String) As String
        If s Is Nothing Then Return ""
        Return s.Trim()
    End Function

    ' === BASIC WRITE# compatibility helpers ===
    Private Shared Function ToBasicWriteLine(values As IEnumerable(Of String)) As String
        Dim parts As New List(Of String)()
        For Each v In values
            If v Is Nothing Then
                parts.Add("""""")
            Else
                Dim n As Integer
                If Integer.TryParse(v, NumberStyles.Integer, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, n) AndAlso
                   v.All(Function(ch) Char.IsDigit(ch) OrElse ch = "-"c) Then
                    parts.Add(n.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture))
                Else
                    Dim escaped = v.Replace("""", """""")
                    parts.Add("""" & escaped & """")
                End If
            End If
        Next
        Return String.Join(",", parts)
    End Function

    Private Shared Function ParseBasicWriteLine(line As String) As List(Of String)
        Dim result As New List(Of String)()
        Dim sb As New StringBuilder()
        Dim inQuotes As Boolean = False
        Dim i As Integer = 0

        While i < line.Length
            Dim ch = line(i)

            If inQuotes Then
                If ch = """"c Then
                    If i + 1 < line.Length AndAlso line(i + 1) = """"c Then
                        sb.Append(""""c)
                        i += 2
                    Else
                        inQuotes = False
                        i += 1
                    End If
                Else
                    sb.Append(ch)
                    i += 1
                End If
            Else
                If ch = ","c Then
                    result.Add(sb.ToString().Trim())
                    sb.Clear()
                    i += 1
                ElseIf ch = """"c Then
                    inQuotes = True
                    i += 1
                Else
                    sb.Append(ch)
                    i += 1
                End If
            End If
        End While

        result.Add(sb.ToString().Trim())
        Return result
    End Function

End Class
```

## Copilot

Good—once you test on the VM (where `\\invoice\data` exists), these are the 4 things I want you to verify so we can tighten anything that doesn’t match the BAS:

1) **Does it load the Start odometer default** from `\\invoice\data\ODOMETER.NUM` correctly?
2) After adding an entry, does it **update `ODOMETER.NUM`** to the Ending odometer (so next Start defaults correctly)?
3) After clicking **Save (Ctrl+S)**, does `\\invoice\data\MILEAGE.DAT` get created/updated?
4) Open `MILEAGE.DAT` in Notepad: does each entry show as **two lines** like:
   - `"04-24-2026","Destination","Business Purpose"`
   - `12345,12410,65,"Cash"`

If anything is off, paste:
- the exact error text (if any), and/or
- the first ~10 lines of `MILEAGE.DAT` that it writes on the VM

Next improvements we can do right after that:
- Add the old menu options **View by date range** and **Print Mileage** (with total business miles), matching the BAS exactly.

## @testsubject117
