```vbnet name=FormPersonalCalendar.vb
Option Strict On
Option Explicit On

Imports System
Imports System.Collections.Generic
Imports System.Drawing
Imports System.Globalization
Imports System.IO
Imports System.Linq
Imports System.Text
Imports System.Windows.Forms

Public Class FormPersonalCalendar

    ' Per your instruction: under the share
    Private Const DataDir As String = "\\invoice\mainmenu\data"

    Private ReadOnly DatesPmsPath As String = Path.Combine(DataDir, "DATES.PMS")
    Private ReadOnly PmsNumPath As String = Path.Combine(DataDir, "PMS.NUM")

    ' View is a month/year, but entries are recurring by month/day regardless of stored year.
    Private _viewMonth As DateTime = New DateTime(DateTime.Today.Year, DateTime.Today.Month, 1)

    Private _allEntries As New List(Of PmsEntry)()

    ' UI
    Private _lblHeaderRight As Label = Nothing
    Private _lblMonth As Label = Nothing
    Private _dtJump As DateTimePicker = Nothing
    Private _grid As DataGridView = Nothing
    Private _lblStatus As Label = Nothing

    Public Sub New()
        InitializeComponent()
    End Sub

    Protected Overrides Sub OnLoad(e As EventArgs)
        MyBase.OnLoad(e)

        Me.Text = "Personal Calendar"
        Me.StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent
        Me.KeyPreview = True
        Me.MinimumSize = New Size(980, 600)

        If Not EnsureDataDirExistsFriendly() Then
            Me.Close()
            Return
        End If

        EnsureFilesExist()
        BuildUi()

        LoadAllData()
        LoadViewMonthFromPmsNum()   ' sets _viewMonth (month stored in PMS.NUM, year = current year)
        SyncJumpPicker()
        RefreshMonthLabel()
        BindGridForCurrentMonth()
    End Sub

    Protected Overrides Sub OnKeyDown(e As KeyEventArgs)
        MyBase.OnKeyDown(e)

        If e.KeyCode = Keys.Escape Then
            Me.Close()
            e.Handled = True
            Return
        End If

        If e.KeyCode = Keys.PageDown Then
            NextMonth()
            e.Handled = True
            Return
        End If

        If e.KeyCode = Keys.PageUp Then
            PrevMonth()
            e.Handled = True
            Return
        End If

        If e.KeyCode = Keys.Insert Then
            AddEvent()
            e.Handled = True
            Return
        End If

        If e.KeyCode = Keys.Delete Then
            DeleteSelected()
            e.Handled = True
            Return
        End If

        If e.Control AndAlso e.KeyCode = Keys.G Then
            If _dtJump IsNot Nothing Then _dtJump.Focus()
            e.Handled = True
            Return
        End If

        If e.Control AndAlso e.KeyCode = Keys.R Then
            LoadAllData()
            BindGridForCurrentMonth()
            e.Handled = True
            Return
        End If
    End Sub

    ' =========================
    ' Model
    ' =========================
    Private NotInheritable Class PmsEntry
        Public Property StoredDate As DateTime     ' What is in file
        Public Property Text As String             ' Event text
    End Class

    Private NotInheritable Class GridRow
        Public Property OccurrenceDate As DateTime ' Date in view year
        Public Property DayName As String
        Public Property Text As String
        Public Property StoredDate As DateTime
    End Class

    ' =========================
    ' UI
    ' =========================
    Private Sub BuildUi()
        Dim root As New TableLayoutPanel() With {
            .Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
            .Padding = New Padding(10),
            .ColumnCount = 1,
            .RowCount = 3
        }
        root.RowStyles.Add(New RowStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))
        root.RowStyles.Add(New RowStyle(SizeType.Percent, 100.0F))
        root.RowStyles.Add(New RowStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))

        ' Header bar (DOS-like: date/time + title)
        Dim header As New TableLayoutPanel() With {
            .Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
            .ColumnCount = 2,
            .RowCount = 1
        }
        header.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Percent, 100.0F))
        header.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))

        Dim lblTitle As New Label() With {
            .AutoSize = True,
            .Font = New Font("Segoe UI", 14.0F, FontStyle.Bold),
            .Text = "Personal Calendar"
        }

        _lblHeaderRight = New Label() With {
            .AutoSize = True,
            .Font = New Font("Segoe UI", 10.0F, FontStyle.Regular),
            .Text = DateTime.Now.ToString("MM-dd-yy  ddd  h:mm tt", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)
        }

        header.Controls.Add(lblTitle, 0, 0)
        header.Controls.Add(_lblHeaderRight, 1, 0)

        ' Body: nav + grid
        Dim body As New TableLayoutPanel() With {
            .Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
            .ColumnCount = 1,
            .RowCount = 2
        }
        body.RowStyles.Add(New RowStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))
        body.RowStyles.Add(New RowStyle(SizeType.Percent, 100.0F))

        Dim nav As New FlowLayoutPanel() With {
            .Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
            .AutoSize = True,
            .WrapContents = True
        }

        Dim btnPrev As New Button() With {.Text = "< Previous Month (PgUp)", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler btnPrev.Click, Sub() PrevMonth()

        Dim btnNext As New Button() With {.Text = "Next Month (PgDn) >", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler btnNext.Click, Sub() NextMonth()

        _lblMonth = New Label() With {
            .AutoSize = True,
            .Font = New Font("Segoe UI", 11.0F, FontStyle.Bold),
            .Padding = New Padding(12, 7, 12, 0)
        }

        Dim lblGo As New Label() With {
            .AutoSize = True,
            .Text = "Go to:",
            .Padding = New Padding(12, 10, 0, 0)
        }

        _dtJump = New DateTimePicker() With {
            .Format = DateTimePickerFormat.Custom,
            .CustomFormat = "MMMM yyyy",
            .ShowUpDown = True,
            .Width = 160,
            .Value = _viewMonth
        }

        Dim btnGo As New Button() With {.Text = "Go (Enter)", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler btnGo.Click,
            Sub()
                GoToMonth(New DateTime(_dtJump.Value.Year, _dtJump.Value.Month, 1))
            End Sub

        AddHandler _dtJump.KeyDown,
            Sub(sender, e)
                If e.KeyCode = Keys.Enter Then
                    GoToMonth(New DateTime(_dtJump.Value.Year, _dtJump.Value.Month, 1))
                    e.Handled = True
                End If
            End Sub

        Dim btnAdd As New Button() With {.Text = "Add (Ins)", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler btnAdd.Click, Sub() AddEvent()

        Dim btnDelete As New Button() With {.Text = "Delete (Del)", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler btnDelete.Click, Sub() DeleteSelected()

        Dim btnReload As New Button() With {.Text = "Reload (Ctrl+R)", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler btnReload.Click,
            Sub()
                LoadAllData()
                BindGridForCurrentMonth()
            End Sub

        nav.Controls.Add(btnPrev)
        nav.Controls.Add(btnNext)
        nav.Controls.Add(_lblMonth)
        nav.Controls.Add(lblGo)
        nav.Controls.Add(_dtJump)
        nav.Controls.Add(btnGo)
        nav.Controls.Add(New Label() With {.AutoSize = True, .Text = "   "})
        nav.Controls.Add(btnAdd)
        nav.Controls.Add(btnDelete)
        nav.Controls.Add(btnReload)

        _grid = New DataGridView() With {
            .Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
            .ReadOnly = True,
            .AllowUserToAddRows = False,
            .AllowUserToDeleteRows = False,
            .SelectionMode = DataGridViewSelectionMode.FullRowSelect,
            .MultiSelect = True,
            .AutoGenerateColumns = False,
            .AutoSizeColumnsMode = DataGridViewAutoSizeColumnsMode.Fill
        }

        _grid.Columns.Clear()
        _grid.Columns.Add(New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn() With {
            .Name = "Date",
            .HeaderText = "Date",
            .AutoSizeMode = DataGridViewAutoSizeColumnMode.None,
            .Width = 95
        })
        _grid.Columns.Add(New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn() With {
            .Name = "Day",
            .HeaderText = "Day",
            .AutoSizeMode = DataGridViewAutoSizeColumnMode.None,
            .Width = 55
        })
        _grid.Columns.Add(New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn() With {
            .Name = "Event",
            .HeaderText = "Event"
        })

        body.Controls.Add(nav, 0, 0)
        body.Controls.Add(_grid, 0, 1)

        ' Footer
        Dim footer As New TableLayoutPanel() With {
            .Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
            .ColumnCount = 2,
            .RowCount = 1
        }
        footer.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Percent, 100.0F))
        footer.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))

        _lblStatus = New Label() With {.AutoSize = True}

        Dim btnClose As New Button() With {.Text = "Close (Esc)", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler btnClose.Click, Sub() Me.Close()

        footer.Controls.Add(_lblStatus, 0, 0)
        footer.Controls.Add(btnClose, 1, 0)

        root.Controls.Add(header, 0, 0)
        root.Controls.Add(body, 0, 1)
        root.Controls.Add(footer, 0, 2)

        Me.Controls.Clear()
        Me.Controls.Add(root)

        ' Update clock display
        Dim t As New Timer() With {.Interval = 1000}
        AddHandler t.Tick,
            Sub()
                If _lblHeaderRight IsNot Nothing Then
                    _lblHeaderRight.Text = DateTime.Now.ToString("MM-dd-yy  ddd  h:mm tt", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)
                End If
            End Sub
        t.Start()
    End Sub

    Private Sub RefreshMonthLabel()
        If _lblMonth IsNot Nothing Then
            _lblMonth.Text = _viewMonth.ToString("MMMM yyyy", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub SyncJumpPicker()
        If _dtJump IsNot Nothing Then
            _dtJump.Value = _viewMonth
        End If
    End Sub

    ' =========================
    ' Month navigation
    ' =========================
    Private Sub PrevMonth()
        GoToMonth(_viewMonth.AddMonths(-1))
    End Sub

    Private Sub NextMonth()
        GoToMonth(_viewMonth.AddMonths(1))
    End Sub

    Private Sub GoToMonth(newMonth As DateTime)
        _viewMonth = New DateTime(newMonth.Year, newMonth.Month, 1)
        SyncJumpPicker()
        RefreshMonthLabel()
        BindGridForCurrentMonth()
        SaveViewMonthToPmsNum()
    End Sub

    ' =========================
    ' Data I/O
    ' =========================
    Private Function EnsureDataDirExistsFriendly() As Boolean
        Try
            If Directory.Exists(DataDir) Then Return True

            MessageBox.Show("Personal Calendar cannot open because the data folder is not available:" & Environment.NewLine &
                            DataDir,
                            "Personal Calendar",
                            MessageBoxButtons.OK,
                            MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Return False
        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("Personal Calendar cannot access the data folder:" & Environment.NewLine &
                            DataDir & Environment.NewLine & Environment.NewLine &
                            ex.Message,
                            "Personal Calendar",
                            MessageBoxButtons.OK,
                            MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Return False
        End Try
    End Function

    Private Sub EnsureFilesExist()
        Try
            If Not File.Exists(DatesPmsPath) Then
                ' Header line (legacy PMS seems to include this)
                Dim headerLine = ToBasicWriteLine(New String() {New String("1"c, 60), "1", "31"})
                File.WriteAllText(DatesPmsPath, headerLine & Environment.NewLine, Encoding.ASCII)
            End If

            If Not File.Exists(PmsNumPath) Then
                ' flag, lastDate, count
                Dim initLine = ToBasicWriteLine(New String() {"0", DateTime.Today.ToString("MM-dd-yyyy", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture), "0"})
                File.WriteAllText(PmsNumPath, initLine & Environment.NewLine, Encoding.ASCII)
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("Could not create/open PMS files in:" & Environment.NewLine &
                            DataDir & Environment.NewLine & Environment.NewLine &
                            ex.Message,
                            "Personal Calendar",
                            MessageBoxButtons.OK,
                            MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Me.Close()
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub LoadAllData()
        _allEntries.Clear()

        Dim lines = File.ReadAllLines(DatesPmsPath, Encoding.ASCII).
            Select(Function(l) StripDosEofOnly(l).Trim()).
            Where(Function(l) l.Length > 0).
            ToList()

        If lines.Count = 0 Then
            UpdateStatus(0)
            Return
        End If

        Dim startIndex As Integer = 0

        ' Detect optional header: "11111...1",1,31
        Dim headerParts = ParseBasicWriteLine(lines(0))
        If headerParts.Count >= 3 Then
            Dim mask = headerParts(0)
            If Not String.IsNullOrEmpty(mask) AndAlso mask.All(Function(ch) ch = "1"c) Then
                startIndex = 1
            End If
        End If

        For i As Integer = startIndex To lines.Count - 1
            Dim parts = ParseBasicWriteLine(lines(i))
            If parts.Count < 2 Then Continue For

            Dim dtText = parts(0)
            Dim txt = parts(1)

            Dim dt As DateTime
            If DateTime.TryParseExact(dtText, "MM-dd-yyyy", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, DateTimeStyles.None, dt) Then
                _allEntries.Add(New PmsEntry With {
                    .StoredDate = dt.Date,
                    .Text = If(txt, "").Trim()
                })
            End If
        Next

        UpdateStatus(-1)
    End Sub

    ' =========================
    ' Leap-year-safe bind (UPDATED)
    ' =========================
    Private Sub BindGridForCurrentMonth()
        Dim month As Integer = _viewMonth.Month
        Dim year As Integer = _viewMonth.Year

        ' Recurring logic: show items whose stored Month/Day matches the viewed month, regardless of stored year.
        ' Leap-year safety: if an entry is 02-29 and the viewed year isn't a leap year, skip it.
        Dim rows As List(Of GridRow) =
            _allEntries.
                Where(Function(e) e.StoredDate.Month = month).
                Select(Function(e)
                           Dim occ As DateTime
                           Try
                               occ = New DateTime(year, e.StoredDate.Month, e.StoredDate.Day)
                           Catch
                               Return Nothing
                           End Try

                           Return New GridRow With {
                               .OccurrenceDate = occ,
                               .DayName = occ.ToString("ddd", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture),
                               .Text = e.Text,
                               .StoredDate = e.StoredDate
                           }
                       End Function).
                Where(Function(r) r IsNot Nothing).
                OrderBy(Function(r) r.OccurrenceDate.Day).
                ThenBy(Function(r) r.Text).
                ToList()

        _grid.Rows.Clear()
        For Each r In rows
            Dim dateDisplay As String = r.OccurrenceDate.ToString("MM-dd-yy", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)
            Dim idx = _grid.Rows.Add(dateDisplay, r.DayName, r.Text)
            _grid.Rows(idx).Tag = r
        Next

        UpdateStatus(rows.Count)
    End Sub

    Private Sub UpdateStatus(Optional monthCount As Integer = -1)
        Dim sb As New StringBuilder()
        sb.Append($"Total entries: {_allEntries.Count}")
        If monthCount >= 0 Then sb.Append($"   This month: {monthCount}")
        sb.Append("   PgUp/PgDn = Month   Go = Month/Year picker   Ins = Add   Del = Delete   Ctrl+R = Reload   Esc = Close")
        _lblStatus.Text = sb.ToString()
    End Sub

    Private Sub LoadViewMonthFromPmsNum()
        Try
            Dim raw = StripDosEofOnly(File.ReadAllText(PmsNumPath, Encoding.ASCII)).Trim()
            If raw.Length = 0 Then Return

            Dim parts = ParseBasicWriteLine(raw)
            If parts.Count < 2 Then Return

            Dim dtText = parts(1)
            Dim dt As DateTime
            If DateTime.TryParseExact(dtText, "MM-dd-yyyy", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, DateTimeStyles.None, dt) Then
                ' PMS.NUM is "state". We'll use its month but keep year as current year.
                _viewMonth = New DateTime(DateTime.Today.Year, dt.Month, 1)
            End If
        Catch
            ' ignore
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub SaveViewMonthToPmsNum()
        Try
            ' State file: flag, lastDate, count
            Dim lastDate = New DateTime(DateTime.Today.Year, _viewMonth.Month, 1).
                ToString("MM-dd-yyyy", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)

            Dim count = _allEntries.Count.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)

            Dim line = ToBasicWriteLine(New String() {"0", lastDate, count})
            File.WriteAllText(PmsNumPath, line & Environment.NewLine, Encoding.ASCII)
        Catch
            ' ignore (don’t block UI)
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' =========================
    ' Add / Delete
    ' =========================
    Private Sub AddEvent()
        Using dlg As New AddEventDialog(_viewMonth)
            If dlg.ShowDialog(Me) <> DialogResult.OK Then Return

            Dim md = dlg.SelectedMonthDay
            Dim text = dlg.EventText.Trim()

            ' Store with a neutral year (recurring list; year doesn't matter for inclusion)
            Dim stored = New DateTime(1993, md.Month, md.Day)

            _allEntries.Add(New PmsEntry With {
                .StoredDate = stored,
                .Text = text
            })

            SaveDatesPms()
            LoadAllData()
            BindGridForCurrentMonth()
            SaveViewMonthToPmsNum()
        End Using
    End Sub

    Private Sub DeleteSelected()
        If _grid.SelectedRows.Count = 0 Then Return

        If MessageBox.Show($"Delete {_grid.SelectedRows.Count} selected event(s)?",
                           "Personal Calendar",
                           MessageBoxButtons.YesNo,
                           MessageBoxIcon.Warning) <> DialogResult.Yes Then
            Return
        End If

        Dim selected As New List(Of GridRow)()
        For Each r As DataGridViewRow In _grid.SelectedRows
            Dim gr = TryCast(r.Tag, GridRow)
            If gr IsNot Nothing Then selected.Add(gr)
        Next

        If selected.Count = 0 Then Return

        ' Remove by exact match of stored date + text (handles duplicates one-by-one)
        For Each s In selected
            Dim idx = _allEntries.FindIndex(Function(e) e.StoredDate = s.StoredDate AndAlso String.Equals(e.Text, s.Text, StringComparison.Ordinal))
            If idx >= 0 Then _allEntries.RemoveAt(idx)
        Next

        SaveDatesPms()
        LoadAllData()
        BindGridForCurrentMonth()
        SaveViewMonthToPmsNum()
    End Sub

    Private Sub SaveDatesPms()
        ' Re-write DATES.PMS in GW-BASIC WRITE# compatible format:
        ' header + "MM-dd-yyyy","text"
        Dim sb As New StringBuilder()

        sb.AppendLine(ToBasicWriteLine(New String() {New String("1"c, 60), "1", "31"}))

        For Each e In _allEntries.
            OrderBy(Function(x) x.StoredDate.Month).
            ThenBy(Function(x) x.StoredDate.Day).
            ThenBy(Function(x) x.Text)

            sb.AppendLine(ToBasicWriteLine(New String() {e.StoredDate.ToString("MM-dd-yyyy", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture), e.Text}))
        Next

        File.WriteAllText(DatesPmsPath, sb.ToString(), Encoding.ASCII)
    End Sub

    ' =========================
    ' BASIC WRITE# helpers
    ' =========================
    Private Shared Function StripDosEofOnly(s As String) As String
        If s Is Nothing Then Return ""
        Return s.Replace(ChrW(26), "")
    End Function

    Private Shared Function ToBasicWriteLine(values As IEnumerable(Of String)) As String
        Dim parts As New List(Of String)()

        For Each v In values
            If v Is Nothing Then
                parts.Add("""""")
            Else
                Dim n As Integer
                If Integer.TryParse(v, NumberStyles.Integer, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, n) AndAlso
                   v.All(Function(ch) Char.IsDigit(ch) OrElse ch = "-"c) Then
                    parts.Add(n.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture))
                Else
                    Dim escaped = v.Replace("""", """""")
                    parts.Add("""" & escaped & """")
                End If
            End If
        Next

        Return String.Join(",", parts)
    End Function

    Private Shared Function ParseBasicWriteLine(line As String) As List(Of String)
        Dim result As New List(Of String)()
        Dim sb As New StringBuilder()
        Dim inQuotes As Boolean = False
        Dim i As Integer = 0

        While i < line.Length
            Dim ch = line(i)

            If inQuotes Then
                If ch = """"c Then
                    If i + 1 < line.Length AndAlso line(i + 1) = """"c Then
                        sb.Append(""""c)
                        i += 2
                    Else
                        inQuotes = False
                        i += 1
                    End If
                Else
                    sb.Append(ch)
                    i += 1
                End If
            Else
                If ch = ","c Then
                    result.Add(sb.ToString().Trim())
                    sb.Clear()
                    i += 1
                ElseIf ch = """"c Then
                    inQuotes = True
                    i += 1
                Else
                    sb.Append(ch)
                    i += 1
                End If
            End If
        End While

        result.Add(sb.ToString().Trim())
        Return result
    End Function

    ' =========================
    ' Add dialog
    ' =========================
    Private NotInheritable Class AddEventDialog
        Inherits Form

        Private ReadOnly _dtp As DateTimePicker
        Private ReadOnly _txt As TextBox

        Public ReadOnly Property SelectedMonthDay As DateTime
            Get
                Return _dtp.Value.Date
            End Get
        End Property

        Public ReadOnly Property EventText As String
            Get
                Return _txt.Text
            End Get
        End Property

        Public Sub New(viewMonth As DateTime)
            Me.Text = "Add an Event"
            Me.StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent
            Me.FormBorderStyle = FormBorderStyle.FixedDialog
            Me.MinimizeBox = False
            Me.MaximizeBox = False
            Me.ShowInTaskbar = False
            Me.ClientSize = New Size(560, 180)

            Dim layout As New TableLayoutPanel() With {
                .Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                .Padding = New Padding(10),
                .ColumnCount = 2,
                .RowCount = 3
            }
            layout.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))
            layout.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Percent, 100.0F))

            layout.RowStyles.Add(New RowStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))
            layout.RowStyles.Add(New RowStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))
            layout.RowStyles.Add(New RowStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))

            layout.Controls.Add(New Label() With {.AutoSize = True, .Text = "Date (month/day):"}, 0, 0)

            _dtp = New DateTimePicker() With {
                .Format = DateTimePickerFormat.Custom,
                .CustomFormat = "MM-dd",
                .ShowUpDown = True,
                .Value = New DateTime(2000, viewMonth.Month, 1)
            }
            layout.Controls.Add(_dtp, 1, 0)

            layout.Controls.Add(New Label() With {.AutoSize = True, .Text = "Event:"}, 0, 1)
            _txt = New TextBox() With {.Dock = DockStyle.Fill}
            layout.Controls.Add(_txt, 1, 1)

            Dim buttons As New FlowLayoutPanel() With {
                .Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                .FlowDirection = FlowDirection.RightToLeft,
                .AutoSize = True,
                .WrapContents = False
            }
            Dim ok As New Button() With {.Text = "OK", .DialogResult = DialogResult.OK, .AutoSize = True}
            Dim cancel As New Button() With {.Text = "Cancel", .DialogResult = DialogResult.Cancel, .AutoSize = True}
            buttons.Controls.Add(ok)
            buttons.Controls.Add(cancel)
            layout.Controls.Add(buttons, 1, 2)

            Me.Controls.Add(layout)
            Me.AcceptButton = ok
            Me.CancelButton = cancel

            AddHandler Me.FormClosing,
                Sub(sender, e)
                    If Me.DialogResult = DialogResult.OK Then
                        If String.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_txt.Text) Then
                            MessageBox.Show("Please enter an event description.",
                                            "Add an Event",
                                            MessageBoxButtons.OK,
                                            MessageBoxIcon.Information)
                            e.Cancel = True
                        End If
                    End If
                End Sub
        End Sub
    End Class

End Class
```

## Copilot

```vbnet name=FormPersonalCalendar.vb
Option Strict On
Option Explicit On

Imports System
Imports System.Collections.Generic
Imports System.Drawing
Imports System.Globalization
Imports System.IO
Imports System.Linq
Imports System.Text
Imports System.Windows.Forms

Public Class FormPersonalCalendar

    ' Per your instruction: under the share
    Private Const DataDir As String = "\\invoice\mainmenu\data"

    Private ReadOnly DatesPmsPath As String = Path.Combine(DataDir, "DATES.PMS")
    Private ReadOnly DatesPmsTmpPath As String = Path.Combine(DataDir, "DATES.PMS.tmp")
    Private ReadOnly DatesPmsBakPath As String = Path.Combine(DataDir, "DATES.PMS.bak")

    Private ReadOnly PmsNumPath As String = Path.Combine(DataDir, "PMS.NUM")
    Private ReadOnly PmsNumTmpPath As String = Path.Combine(DataDir, "PMS.NUM.tmp")
    Private ReadOnly PmsNumBakPath As String = Path.Combine(DataDir, "PMS.NUM.bak")

    ' View is a month/year, but entries are recurring by month/day regardless of stored year.
    Private _viewMonth As DateTime = New DateTime(DateTime.Today.Year, DateTime.Today.Month, 1)

    Private _allEntries As New List(Of PmsEntry)()

    ' UI
    Private _lblHeaderRight As Label = Nothing
    Private _lblMonth As Label = Nothing
    Private _dtJump As DateTimePicker = Nothing
    Private _grid As DataGridView = Nothing
    Private _lblStatus As Label = Nothing

    Public Sub New()
        InitializeComponent()
    End Sub

    Protected Overrides Sub OnLoad(e As EventArgs)
        MyBase.OnLoad(e)

        Me.Text = "Personal Calendar"
        Me.StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent
        Me.KeyPreview = True
        Me.MinimumSize = New Size(980, 600)

        If Not EnsureDataDirExistsFriendly() Then
            Me.Close()
            Return
        End If

        EnsureFilesExist()
        EnsureBackupsExist()

        BuildUi()

        LoadAllData()
        LoadViewMonthFromPmsNum()   ' sets _viewMonth (month stored in PMS.NUM, year = current year)
        SyncJumpPicker()
        RefreshMonthLabel()
        BindGridForCurrentMonth()
    End Sub

    Protected Overrides Sub OnKeyDown(e As KeyEventArgs)
        MyBase.OnKeyDown(e)

        If e.KeyCode = Keys.Escape Then
            Me.Close()
            e.Handled = True
            Return
        End If

        If e.KeyCode = Keys.PageDown Then
            NextMonth()
            e.Handled = True
            Return
        End If

        If e.KeyCode = Keys.PageUp Then
            PrevMonth()
            e.Handled = True
            Return
        End If

        If e.KeyCode = Keys.Insert Then
            AddEvent()
            e.Handled = True
            Return
        End If

        If e.KeyCode = Keys.Delete Then
            DeleteSelected()
            e.Handled = True
            Return
        End If

        If e.Control AndAlso e.KeyCode = Keys.G Then
            If _dtJump IsNot Nothing Then _dtJump.Focus()
            e.Handled = True
            Return
        End If

        If e.Control AndAlso e.KeyCode = Keys.R Then
            LoadAllData()
            BindGridForCurrentMonth()
            e.Handled = True
            Return
        End If
    End Sub

    ' =========================
    ' Model
    ' =========================
    Private NotInheritable Class PmsEntry
        Public Property StoredDate As DateTime     ' What is in file
        Public Property Text As String             ' Event text
    End Class

    Private NotInheritable Class GridRow
        Public Property OccurrenceDate As DateTime ' Date in view year
        Public Property DayName As String
        Public Property Text As String
        Public Property StoredDate As DateTime
    End Class

    ' =========================
    ' UI
    ' =========================
    Private Sub BuildUi()
        Dim root As New TableLayoutPanel() With {
            .Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
            .Padding = New Padding(10),
            .ColumnCount = 1,
            .RowCount = 3
        }
        root.RowStyles.Add(New RowStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))
        root.RowStyles.Add(New RowStyle(SizeType.Percent, 100.0F))
        root.RowStyles.Add(New RowStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))

        ' Header bar (DOS-like: date/time + title)
        Dim header As New TableLayoutPanel() With {
            .Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
            .ColumnCount = 2,
            .RowCount = 1
        }
        header.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Percent, 100.0F))
        header.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))

        Dim lblTitle As New Label() With {
            .AutoSize = True,
            .Font = New Font("Segoe UI", 14.0F, FontStyle.Bold),
            .Text = "Personal Calendar"
        }

        _lblHeaderRight = New Label() With {
            .AutoSize = True,
            .Font = New Font("Segoe UI", 10.0F, FontStyle.Regular),
            .Text = DateTime.Now.ToString("MM-dd-yy  ddd  h:mm tt", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)
        }

        header.Controls.Add(lblTitle, 0, 0)
        header.Controls.Add(_lblHeaderRight, 1, 0)

        ' Body: nav + grid
        Dim body As New TableLayoutPanel() With {
            .Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
            .ColumnCount = 1,
            .RowCount = 2
        }
        body.RowStyles.Add(New RowStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))
        body.RowStyles.Add(New RowStyle(SizeType.Percent, 100.0F))

        Dim nav As New FlowLayoutPanel() With {
            .Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
            .AutoSize = True,
            .WrapContents = True
        }

        Dim btnPrev As New Button() With {.Text = "< Previous Month (PgUp)", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler btnPrev.Click, Sub() PrevMonth()

        Dim btnNext As New Button() With {.Text = "Next Month (PgDn) >", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler btnNext.Click, Sub() NextMonth()

        _lblMonth = New Label() With {
            .AutoSize = True,
            .Font = New Font("Segoe UI", 11.0F, FontStyle.Bold),
            .Padding = New Padding(12, 7, 12, 0)
        }

        Dim lblGo As New Label() With {
            .AutoSize = True,
            .Text = "Go to:",
            .Padding = New Padding(12, 10, 0, 0)
        }

        _dtJump = New DateTimePicker() With {
            .Format = DateTimePickerFormat.Custom,
            .CustomFormat = "MMMM yyyy",
            .ShowUpDown = True,
            .Width = 160,
            .Value = _viewMonth
        }

        Dim btnGo As New Button() With {.Text = "Go (Enter)", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler btnGo.Click,
            Sub()
                GoToMonth(New DateTime(_dtJump.Value.Year, _dtJump.Value.Month, 1))
            End Sub

        AddHandler _dtJump.KeyDown,
            Sub(sender, e)
                If e.KeyCode = Keys.Enter Then
                    GoToMonth(New DateTime(_dtJump.Value.Year, _dtJump.Value.Month, 1))
                    e.Handled = True
                End If
            End Sub

        Dim btnAdd As New Button() With {.Text = "Add (Ins)", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler btnAdd.Click, Sub() AddEvent()

        Dim btnDelete As New Button() With {.Text = "Delete (Del)", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler btnDelete.Click, Sub() DeleteSelected()

        Dim btnReload As New Button() With {.Text = "Reload (Ctrl+R)", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler btnReload.Click,
            Sub()
                LoadAllData()
                BindGridForCurrentMonth()
            End Sub

        nav.Controls.Add(btnPrev)
        nav.Controls.Add(btnNext)
        nav.Controls.Add(_lblMonth)
        nav.Controls.Add(lblGo)
        nav.Controls.Add(_dtJump)
        nav.Controls.Add(btnGo)
        nav.Controls.Add(New Label() With {.AutoSize = True, .Text = "   "})
        nav.Controls.Add(btnAdd)
        nav.Controls.Add(btnDelete)
        nav.Controls.Add(btnReload)

        _grid = New DataGridView() With {
            .Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
            .ReadOnly = True,
            .AllowUserToAddRows = False,
            .AllowUserToDeleteRows = False,
            .SelectionMode = DataGridViewSelectionMode.FullRowSelect,
            .MultiSelect = True,
            .AutoGenerateColumns = False,
            .AutoSizeColumnsMode = DataGridViewAutoSizeColumnsMode.Fill
        }

        _grid.Columns.Clear()
        _grid.Columns.Add(New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn() With {
            .Name = "Date",
            .HeaderText = "Date",
            .AutoSizeMode = DataGridViewAutoSizeColumnMode.None,
            .Width = 95
        })
        _grid.Columns.Add(New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn() With {
            .Name = "Day",
            .HeaderText = "Day",
            .AutoSizeMode = DataGridViewAutoSizeColumnMode.None,
            .Width = 55
        })
        _grid.Columns.Add(New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn() With {
            .Name = "Event",
            .HeaderText = "Event"
        })

        body.Controls.Add(nav, 0, 0)
        body.Controls.Add(_grid, 0, 1)

        ' Footer
        Dim footer As New TableLayoutPanel() With {
            .Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
            .ColumnCount = 2,
            .RowCount = 1
        }
        footer.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Percent, 100.0F))
        footer.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))

        _lblStatus = New Label() With {.AutoSize = True}

        Dim btnClose As New Button() With {.Text = "Close (Esc)", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler btnClose.Click, Sub() Me.Close()

        footer.Controls.Add(_lblStatus, 0, 0)
        footer.Controls.Add(btnClose, 1, 0)

        root.Controls.Add(header, 0, 0)
        root.Controls.Add(body, 0, 1)
        root.Controls.Add(footer, 0, 2)

        Me.Controls.Clear()
        Me.Controls.Add(root)

        ' Update clock display
        Dim t As New Timer() With {.Interval = 1000}
        AddHandler t.Tick,
            Sub()
                If _lblHeaderRight IsNot Nothing Then
                    _lblHeaderRight.Text = DateTime.Now.ToString("MM-dd-yy  ddd  h:mm tt", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)
                End If
            End Sub
        t.Start()
    End Sub

    Private Sub RefreshMonthLabel()
        If _lblMonth IsNot Nothing Then
            _lblMonth.Text = _viewMonth.ToString("MMMM yyyy", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub SyncJumpPicker()
        If _dtJump IsNot Nothing Then
            _dtJump.Value = _viewMonth
        End If
    End Sub

    ' =========================
    ' Month navigation
    ' =========================
    Private Sub PrevMonth()
        GoToMonth(_viewMonth.AddMonths(-1))
    End Sub

    Private Sub NextMonth()
        GoToMonth(_viewMonth.AddMonths(1))
    End Sub

    Private Sub GoToMonth(newMonth As DateTime)
        _viewMonth = New DateTime(newMonth.Year, newMonth.Month, 1)
        SyncJumpPicker()
        RefreshMonthLabel()
        BindGridForCurrentMonth()
        SaveViewMonthToPmsNum()
    End Sub

    ' =========================
    ' Data I/O
    ' =========================
    Private Function EnsureDataDirExistsFriendly() As Boolean
        Try
            If Directory.Exists(DataDir) Then Return True

            MessageBox.Show("Personal Calendar cannot open because the data folder is not available:" & Environment.NewLine &
                            DataDir,
                            "Personal Calendar",
                            MessageBoxButtons.OK,
                            MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Return False
        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("Personal Calendar cannot access the data folder:" & Environment.NewLine &
                            DataDir & Environment.NewLine & Environment.NewLine &
                            ex.Message,
                            "Personal Calendar",
                            MessageBoxButtons.OK,
                            MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Return False
        End Try
    End Function

    Private Sub EnsureFilesExist()
        Try
            If Not File.Exists(DatesPmsPath) Then
                ' Header line (legacy PMS seems to include this)
                Dim headerLine = ToBasicWriteLine(New String() {New String("1"c, 60), "1", "31"})
                File.WriteAllText(DatesPmsPath, headerLine & Environment.NewLine, Encoding.ASCII)
            End If

            If Not File.Exists(PmsNumPath) Then
                ' flag, lastDate, count
                Dim initLine = ToBasicWriteLine(New String() {"0", DateTime.Today.ToString("MM-dd-yyyy", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture), "0"})
                File.WriteAllText(PmsNumPath, initLine & Environment.NewLine, Encoding.ASCII)
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("Could not create/open PMS files in:" & Environment.NewLine &
                            DataDir & Environment.NewLine & Environment.NewLine &
                            ex.Message,
                            "Personal Calendar",
                            MessageBoxButtons.OK,
                            MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Me.Close()
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub EnsureBackupsExist()
        Try
            If File.Exists(DatesPmsPath) AndAlso Not File.Exists(DatesPmsBakPath) Then
                File.Copy(DatesPmsPath, DatesPmsBakPath, overwrite:=False)
            End If
        Catch
            ' ignore
        End Try

        Try
            If File.Exists(PmsNumPath) AndAlso Not File.Exists(PmsNumBakPath) Then
                File.Copy(PmsNumPath, PmsNumBakPath, overwrite:=False)
            End If
        Catch
            ' ignore
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub LoadAllData()
        _allEntries.Clear()

        Dim lines = File.ReadAllLines(DatesPmsPath, Encoding.ASCII).
            Select(Function(l) StripDosEofOnly(l).Trim()).
            Where(Function(l) l.Length > 0).
            ToList()

        If lines.Count = 0 Then
            UpdateStatus(0)
            Return
        End If

        Dim startIndex As Integer = 0

        ' Detect optional header: "11111...1",1,31
        Dim headerParts = ParseBasicWriteLine(lines(0))
        If headerParts.Count >= 3 Then
            Dim mask = headerParts(0)
            If Not String.IsNullOrEmpty(mask) AndAlso mask.All(Function(ch) ch = "1"c) Then
                startIndex = 1
            End If
        End If

        For i As Integer = startIndex To lines.Count - 1
            Dim parts = ParseBasicWriteLine(lines(i))
            If parts.Count < 2 Then Continue For

            Dim dtText = parts(0)
            Dim txt = parts(1)

            Dim dt As DateTime
            If DateTime.TryParseExact(dtText, "MM-dd-yyyy", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, DateTimeStyles.None, dt) Then
                _allEntries.Add(New PmsEntry With {
                    .StoredDate = dt.Date,
                    .Text = If(txt, "").Trim()
                })
            End If
        Next

        UpdateStatus(-1)
    End Sub

    ' =========================
    ' Leap-year-safe bind (UPDATED)
    ' =========================
    Private Sub BindGridForCurrentMonth()
        Dim month As Integer = _viewMonth.Month
        Dim year As Integer = _viewMonth.Year

        ' Recurring logic: show items whose stored Month/Day matches the viewed month, regardless of stored year.
        ' Leap-year safety: if an entry is 02-29 and the viewed year isn't a leap year, skip it.
        Dim rows As List(Of GridRow) =
            _allEntries.
                Where(Function(e) e.StoredDate.Month = month).
                Select(Function(e)
                           Dim occ As DateTime
                           Try
                               occ = New DateTime(year, e.StoredDate.Month, e.StoredDate.Day)
                           Catch
                               Return Nothing
                           End Try

                           Return New GridRow With {
                               .OccurrenceDate = occ,
                               .DayName = occ.ToString("ddd", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture),
                               .Text = e.Text,
                               .StoredDate = e.StoredDate
                           }
                       End Function).
                Where(Function(r) r IsNot Nothing).
                OrderBy(Function(r) r.OccurrenceDate.Day).
                ThenBy(Function(r) r.Text).
                ToList()

        _grid.Rows.Clear()
        For Each r In rows
            Dim dateDisplay As String = r.OccurrenceDate.ToString("MM-dd-yy", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)
            Dim idx = _grid.Rows.Add(dateDisplay, r.DayName, r.Text)
            _grid.Rows(idx).Tag = r
        Next

        UpdateStatus(rows.Count)
    End Sub

    Private Sub UpdateStatus(Optional monthCount As Integer = -1)
        Dim sb As New StringBuilder()
        sb.Append($"Total entries: {_allEntries.Count}")
        If monthCount >= 0 Then sb.Append($"   This month: {monthCount}")
        sb.Append("   PgUp/PgDn = Month   Go = Month/Year picker   Ins = Add   Del = Delete   Ctrl+R = Reload   Esc = Close")
        _lblStatus.Text = sb.ToString()
    End Sub

    Private Sub LoadViewMonthFromPmsNum()
        Try
            Dim raw = StripDosEofOnly(File.ReadAllText(PmsNumPath, Encoding.ASCII)).Trim()
            If raw.Length = 0 Then Return

            Dim parts = ParseBasicWriteLine(raw)
            If parts.Count < 2 Then Return

            Dim dtText = parts(1)
            Dim dt As DateTime
            If DateTime.TryParseExact(dtText, "MM-dd-yyyy", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, DateTimeStyles.None, dt) Then
                ' PMS.NUM is "state". We'll use its month but keep year as current year.
                _viewMonth = New DateTime(DateTime.Today.Year, dt.Month, 1)
            End If
        Catch
            ' ignore
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub SaveViewMonthToPmsNum()
        Try
            Dim lastDate = New DateTime(DateTime.Today.Year, _viewMonth.Month, 1).
                ToString("MM-dd-yyyy", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)

            Dim count = _allEntries.Count.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)

            Dim line = ToBasicWriteLine(New String() {"0", lastDate, count})
            WriteAllTextAtomic(PmsNumPath, PmsNumTmpPath, PmsNumBakPath, line & Environment.NewLine, Encoding.ASCII)
        Catch
            ' ignore
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' =========================
    ' Add / Delete
    ' =========================
    Private Sub AddEvent()
        Using dlg As New AddEventDialog(_viewMonth)
            If dlg.ShowDialog(Me) <> DialogResult.OK Then Return

            Dim md = dlg.SelectedMonthDay
            Dim text = dlg.EventText.Trim()

            ' Store with a neutral year (recurring list; year doesn't matter for inclusion)
            Dim stored = New DateTime(1993, md.Month, md.Day)

            ' Reload before modifying to reduce the chance of overwriting another user.
            LoadAllData()

            _allEntries.Add(New PmsEntry With {
                .StoredDate = stored,
                .Text = text
            })

            SaveDatesPms()
            LoadAllData()
            BindGridForCurrentMonth()
            SaveViewMonthToPmsNum()
        End Using
    End Sub

    Private Sub DeleteSelected()
        If _grid.SelectedRows.Count = 0 Then Return

        If MessageBox.Show($"Delete {_grid.SelectedRows.Count} selected event(s)?",
                           "Personal Calendar",
                           MessageBoxButtons.YesNo,
                           MessageBoxIcon.Warning) <> DialogResult.Yes Then
            Return
        End If

        Dim selected As New List(Of GridRow)()
        For Each r As DataGridViewRow In _grid.SelectedRows
            Dim gr = TryCast(r.Tag, GridRow)
            If gr IsNot Nothing Then selected.Add(gr)
        Next

        If selected.Count = 0 Then Return

        ' Reload before modifying to reduce the chance of overwriting another user.
        LoadAllData()

        For Each s In selected
            Dim idx = _allEntries.FindIndex(Function(e) e.StoredDate = s.StoredDate AndAlso String.Equals(e.Text, s.Text, StringComparison.Ordinal))
            If idx >= 0 Then _allEntries.RemoveAt(idx)
        Next

        SaveDatesPms()
        LoadAllData()
        BindGridForCurrentMonth()
        SaveViewMonthToPmsNum()
    End Sub

    Private Sub SaveDatesPms()
        Dim sb As New StringBuilder()

        sb.AppendLine(ToBasicWriteLine(New String() {New String("1"c, 60), "1", "31"}))

        For Each e In _allEntries.
            OrderBy(Function(x) x.StoredDate.Month).
            ThenBy(Function(x) x.StoredDate.Day).
            ThenBy(Function(x) x.Text)

            sb.AppendLine(ToBasicWriteLine(New String() {e.StoredDate.ToString("MM-dd-yyyy", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture), e.Text}))
        Next

        WriteAllTextAtomic(DatesPmsPath, DatesPmsTmpPath, DatesPmsBakPath, sb.ToString(), Encoding.ASCII)
    End Sub

    ' =========================
    ' Atomic write helper (tmp + replace)
    ' =========================
    Private Shared Sub WriteAllTextAtomic(targetPath As String, tmpPath As String, bakPath As String, content As String, enc As Encoding)
        ' 1) write tmp
        File.WriteAllText(tmpPath, content, enc)

        ' 2) one-time .bak (best effort)
        Try
            If File.Exists(targetPath) AndAlso Not File.Exists(bakPath) Then
                File.Copy(targetPath, bakPath, overwrite:=False)
            End If
        Catch
            ' ignore
        End Try

        ' 3) replace atomically when possible
        Try
            If File.Exists(targetPath) Then
                ' File.Replace is atomic on local NTFS; on shares it is usually still safer than rewrite.
                File.Replace(tmpPath, targetPath, destinationBackupFileName:=Nothing, ignoreMetadataErrors:=True)
            Else
                File.Move(tmpPath, targetPath)
            End If
        Catch
            ' Fall back to overwrite
            File.Copy(tmpPath, targetPath, overwrite:=True)
            Try
                File.Delete(tmpPath)
            Catch
                ' ignore
            End Try
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' =========================
    ' BASIC WRITE# helpers
    ' =========================
    Private Shared Function StripDosEofOnly(s As String) As String
        If s Is Nothing Then Return ""
        Return s.Replace(ChrW(26), "")
    End Function

    Private Shared Function ToBasicWriteLine(values As IEnumerable(Of String)) As String
        Dim parts As New List(Of String)()

        For Each v In values
            If v Is Nothing Then
                parts.Add("""""")
            Else
                Dim n As Integer
                If Integer.TryParse(v, NumberStyles.Integer, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, n) AndAlso
                   v.All(Function(ch) Char.IsDigit(ch) OrElse ch = "-"c) Then
                    parts.Add(n.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture))
                Else
                    Dim escaped = v.Replace("""", """""")
                    parts.Add("""" & escaped & """")
                End If
            End If
        Next

        Return String.Join(",", parts)
    End Function

    Private Shared Function ParseBasicWriteLine(line As String) As List(Of String)
        Dim result As New List(Of String)()
        Dim sb As New StringBuilder()
        Dim inQuotes As Boolean = False
        Dim i As Integer = 0

        While i < line.Length
            Dim ch = line(i)

            If inQuotes Then
                If ch = """"c Then
                    If i + 1 < line.Length AndAlso line(i + 1) = """"c Then
                        sb.Append(""""c)
                        i += 2
                    Else
                        inQuotes = False
                        i += 1
                    End If
                Else
                    sb.Append(ch)
                    i += 1
                End If
            Else
                If ch = ","c Then
                    result.Add(sb.ToString().Trim())
                    sb.Clear()
                    i += 1
                ElseIf ch = """"c Then
                    inQuotes = True
                    i += 1
                Else
                    sb.Append(ch)
                    i += 1
                End If
            End If
        End While

        result.Add(sb.ToString().Trim())
        Return result
    End Function

    ' =========================
    ' Add dialog
    ' =========================
    Private NotInheritable Class AddEventDialog
        Inherits Form

        Private ReadOnly _dtp As DateTimePicker
        Private ReadOnly _txt As TextBox

        Public ReadOnly Property SelectedMonthDay As DateTime
            Get
                Return _dtp.Value.Date
            End Get
        End Property

        Public ReadOnly Property EventText As String
            Get
                Return _txt.Text
            End Get
        End Property

        Public Sub New(viewMonth As DateTime)
            Me.Text = "Add an Event"
            Me.StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent
            Me.FormBorderStyle = FormBorderStyle.FixedDialog
            Me.MinimizeBox = False
            Me.MaximizeBox = False
            Me.ShowInTaskbar = False
            Me.ClientSize = New Size(560, 180)

            Dim layout As New TableLayoutPanel() With {
                .Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                .Padding = New Padding(10),
                .ColumnCount = 2,
                .RowCount = 3
            }
            layout.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))
            layout.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Percent, 100.0F))

            layout.RowStyles.Add(New RowStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))
            layout.RowStyles.Add(New RowStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))
            layout.RowStyles.Add(New RowStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))

            layout.Controls.Add(New Label() With {.AutoSize = True, .Text = "Date (month/day):"}, 0, 0)

            _dtp = New DateTimePicker() With {
                .Format = DateTimePickerFormat.Custom,
                .CustomFormat = "MM-dd",
                .ShowUpDown = True,
                .Value = New DateTime(2000, viewMonth.Month, 1)
            }
            layout.Controls.Add(_dtp, 1, 0)

            layout.Controls.Add(New Label() With {.AutoSize = True, .Text = "Event:"}, 0, 1)
            _txt = New TextBox() With {.Dock = DockStyle.Fill}
            layout.Controls.Add(_txt, 1, 1)

            Dim buttons As New FlowLayoutPanel() With {
                .Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                .FlowDirection = FlowDirection.RightToLeft,
                .AutoSize = True,
                .WrapContents = False
            }
            Dim ok As New Button() With {.Text = "OK", .DialogResult = DialogResult.OK, .AutoSize = True}
            Dim cancel As New Button() With {.Text = "Cancel", .DialogResult = DialogResult.Cancel, .AutoSize = True}
            buttons.Controls.Add(ok)
            buttons.Controls.Add(cancel)
            layout.Controls.Add(buttons, 1, 2)

            Me.Controls.Add(layout)
            Me.AcceptButton = ok
            Me.CancelButton = cancel

            AddHandler Me.FormClosing,
                Sub(sender, e)
                    If Me.DialogResult = DialogResult.OK Then
                        If String.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_txt.Text) Then
                            MessageBox.Show("Please enter an event description.",
                                            "Add an Event",
                                            MessageBoxButtons.OK,
                                            MessageBoxIcon.Information)
                            e.Cancel = True
                        End If
                    End If
                End Sub
        End Sub
    End Class

End Class
```

## @testsubject117

ok, what else do we need to do for Personal Calendar or mileage tracking?

## Copilot

If both modules now (1) read the legacy files from `\\invoice\mainmenu\data`, (2) display correctly, and (3) can add/delete/save, then what’s left is mostly **operational hardening** and a couple **edge cases**.

## Personal Calendar — remaining recommended work
1) **Concurrency note (important)**
- The `*.tmp` + replace prevents *partial writes*, but it **does not fully prevent “last writer wins”** if two users edit at the same time.
- If that’s a real risk, the next step is a simple **lock file** (e.g., create `DATES.PMS.lock` with `FileMode.CreateNew`; if it already exists, tell the user “Calendar is in use, try again”). That’s the simplest real multi-user protection.

2) **Feb 29 add validation**
- Viewing is now leap-year-safe.
- But users can still add `02-29`. That’s OK, but you may want the Add dialog to warn: “only appears in leap years”.

3) **Search / filter (nice-to-have)**
- A search box that filters the current month by substring (“taxes”, “herrera”, etc.) is typically the next most useful feature.

4) **Audit/repair tool (optional)**
- A hidden “Repair file” option that:
  - removes blank lines
  - normalizes dates to `MM-dd-yyyy`
  - re-writes with proper quoting
  Helps if the legacy file has hand edits.

## Mileage Tracking — what to verify / harden
Since I don’t have your mileage code in this chat, here’s the standard “done checklist”:

1) **Atomic writes + backup**
- Use the same pattern you used for calendar:
  - `MILEAGE.DAT.tmp` (or whatever the filename is)
  - one-time `.bak`
  - replace/move
This prevents corrupted files.

2) **Multi-user locking (same as above)**
- Mileage is often edited by multiple users. If so, add a lock file around save.

3) **Validation**
- Prevent:
  - negative miles
  - end odometer < start odometer
  - invalid dates
  - blank destination/purpose if required
- Ensure currency math uses `Decimal` and rounds consistently.

4) **Totals match legacy**
- Pick a known month and compare totals vs the old program:
  - total trips
  - total miles
  - reimbursable miles / amount (if applicable)

## What I need to give you a precise answer on Mileage
Tell me the **exact mileage data filename(s)** you’re using under `\\invoice\mainmenu\data` (e.g., `MILEAGE.DAT`, `MILES.DAT`, etc.), and whether mileage supports **add/edit/delete**.

If you paste the mileage form code (or at least its save routine), I can point out exactly whether it already has:
- temp-file safe writes
- backup
- locking
- validation

If you want one “next step” that pays off most: implement the **lock file** for both modules around any save.

If that’s a real risk, the next step is a simple lock file (e.g., create DATES.PMS.lock with FileMode.CreateNew; if it already exists, tell the user “Calendar is in use, try again”). That’s the simplest real multi-user protection.
Feb 29 add validation

Search / filter (nice-to-have)

## Copilot

```vbnet name=FormPersonalCalendar.vb
Option Strict On
Option Explicit On

Imports System
Imports System.Collections.Generic
Imports System.Drawing
Imports System.Globalization
Imports System.IO
Imports System.Linq
Imports System.Text
Imports System.Windows.Forms

Public Class FormPersonalCalendar

    ' Per your instruction: under the share
    Private Const DataDir As String = "\\invoice\mainmenu\data"

    Private ReadOnly DatesPmsPath As String = Path.Combine(DataDir, "DATES.PMS")
    Private ReadOnly DatesPmsTmpPath As String = Path.Combine(DataDir, "DATES.PMS.tmp")
    Private ReadOnly DatesPmsBakPath As String = Path.Combine(DataDir, "DATES.PMS.bak")
    Private ReadOnly DatesPmsLockPath As String = Path.Combine(DataDir, "DATES.PMS.lock")

    Private ReadOnly PmsNumPath As String = Path.Combine(DataDir, "PMS.NUM")
    Private ReadOnly PmsNumTmpPath As String = Path.Combine(DataDir, "PMS.NUM.tmp")
    Private ReadOnly PmsNumBakPath As String = Path.Combine(DataDir, "PMS.NUM.bak")
    Private ReadOnly PmsNumLockPath As String = Path.Combine(DataDir, "PMS.NUM.lock")

    ' View is a month/year, but entries are recurring by month/day regardless of stored year.
    Private _viewMonth As DateTime = New DateTime(DateTime.Today.Year, DateTime.Today.Month, 1)

    Private _allEntries As New List(Of PmsEntry)()

    ' UI
    Private _lblHeaderRight As Label = Nothing
    Private _lblMonth As Label = Nothing
    Private _dtJump As DateTimePicker = Nothing
    Private _txtSearch As TextBox = Nothing
    Private _grid As DataGridView = Nothing
    Private _lblStatus As Label = Nothing

    Public Sub New()
        InitializeComponent()
    End Sub

    Protected Overrides Sub OnLoad(e As EventArgs)
        MyBase.OnLoad(e)

        Me.Text = "Personal Calendar"
        Me.StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent
        Me.KeyPreview = True
        Me.MinimumSize = New Size(1050, 650)

        If Not EnsureDataDirExistsFriendly() Then
            Me.Close()
            Return
        End If

        EnsureFilesExist()
        EnsureBackupsExist()

        BuildUi()

        LoadAllData()
        LoadViewMonthFromPmsNum()   ' sets _viewMonth (month stored in PMS.NUM, year = current year)
        SyncJumpPicker()
        RefreshMonthLabel()
        BindGridForCurrentMonth()
    End Sub

    Protected Overrides Sub OnKeyDown(e As KeyEventArgs)
        MyBase.OnKeyDown(e)

        If e.KeyCode = Keys.Escape Then
            Me.Close()
            e.Handled = True
            Return
        End If

        If e.KeyCode = Keys.PageDown Then
            NextMonth()
            e.Handled = True
            Return
        End If

        If e.KeyCode = Keys.PageUp Then
            PrevMonth()
            e.Handled = True
            Return
        End If

        If e.KeyCode = Keys.Insert Then
            AddEvent()
            e.Handled = True
            Return
        End If

        If e.KeyCode = Keys.Delete Then
            DeleteSelected()
            e.Handled = True
            Return
        End If

        If e.Control AndAlso e.KeyCode = Keys.G Then
            If _dtJump IsNot Nothing Then _dtJump.Focus()
            e.Handled = True
            Return
        End If

        If e.Control AndAlso e.KeyCode = Keys.F Then
            If _txtSearch IsNot Nothing Then _txtSearch.Focus()
            _txtSearch.SelectAll()
            e.Handled = True
            Return
        End If

        If e.Control AndAlso e.KeyCode = Keys.R Then
            LoadAllData()
            BindGridForCurrentMonth()
            e.Handled = True
            Return
        End If

        ' Hidden maintenance hotkey: Ctrl+Shift+R (Repair/Re-write file)
        If e.Control AndAlso e.Shift AndAlso e.KeyCode = Keys.R Then
            RepairDatesPms()
            e.Handled = True
            Return
        End If
    End Sub

    ' =========================
    ' Model
    ' =========================
    Private NotInheritable Class PmsEntry
        Public Property StoredDate As DateTime     ' What is in file
        Public Property Text As String             ' Event text
    End Class

    Private NotInheritable Class GridRow
        Public Property OccurrenceDate As DateTime ' Date in view year
        Public Property DayName As String
        Public Property Text As String
        Public Property StoredDate As DateTime
    End Class

    ' =========================
    ' UI
    ' =========================
    Private Sub BuildUi()
        Dim root As New TableLayoutPanel() With {
            .Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
            .Padding = New Padding(10),
            .ColumnCount = 1,
            .RowCount = 3
        }
        root.RowStyles.Add(New RowStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))
        root.RowStyles.Add(New RowStyle(SizeType.Percent, 100.0F))
        root.RowStyles.Add(New RowStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))

        ' Header bar (DOS-like: date/time + title)
        Dim header As New TableLayoutPanel() With {
            .Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
            .ColumnCount = 2,
            .RowCount = 1
        }
        header.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Percent, 100.0F))
        header.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))

        Dim lblTitle As New Label() With {
            .AutoSize = True,
            .Font = New Font("Segoe UI", 14.0F, FontStyle.Bold),
            .Text = "Personal Calendar"
        }

        _lblHeaderRight = New Label() With {
            .AutoSize = True,
            .Font = New Font("Segoe UI", 10.0F, FontStyle.Regular),
            .Text = DateTime.Now.ToString("MM-dd-yy  ddd  h:mm tt", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)
        }

        header.Controls.Add(lblTitle, 0, 0)
        header.Controls.Add(_lblHeaderRight, 1, 0)

        ' Body: nav + grid
        Dim body As New TableLayoutPanel() With {
            .Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
            .ColumnCount = 1,
            .RowCount = 2
        }
        body.RowStyles.Add(New RowStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))
        body.RowStyles.Add(New RowStyle(SizeType.Percent, 100.0F))

        Dim nav As New FlowLayoutPanel() With {
            .Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
            .AutoSize = True,
            .WrapContents = True
        }

        Dim btnPrev As New Button() With {.Text = "< Previous Month (PgUp)", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler btnPrev.Click, Sub() PrevMonth()

        Dim btnNext As New Button() With {.Text = "Next Month (PgDn) >", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler btnNext.Click, Sub() NextMonth()

        _lblMonth = New Label() With {
            .AutoSize = True,
            .Font = New Font("Segoe UI", 11.0F, FontStyle.Bold),
            .Padding = New Padding(12, 7, 12, 0)
        }

        Dim lblGo As New Label() With {
            .AutoSize = True,
            .Text = "Go to:",
            .Padding = New Padding(12, 10, 0, 0)
        }

        _dtJump = New DateTimePicker() With {
            .Format = DateTimePickerFormat.Custom,
            .CustomFormat = "MMMM yyyy",
            .ShowUpDown = True,
            .Width = 160,
            .Value = _viewMonth
        }

        Dim btnGo As New Button() With {.Text = "Go (Enter)", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler btnGo.Click,
            Sub()
                GoToMonth(New DateTime(_dtJump.Value.Year, _dtJump.Value.Month, 1))
            End Sub

        AddHandler _dtJump.KeyDown,
            Sub(sender, e)
                If e.KeyCode = Keys.Enter Then
                    GoToMonth(New DateTime(_dtJump.Value.Year, _dtJump.Value.Month, 1))
                    e.Handled = True
                End If
            End Sub

        Dim lblSearch As New Label() With {.AutoSize = True, .Text = "Search:", .Padding = New Padding(12, 10, 0, 0)}
        _txtSearch = New TextBox() With {.Width = 220}
        AddHandler _txtSearch.TextChanged, Sub() BindGridForCurrentMonth()
        AddHandler _txtSearch.KeyDown,
            Sub(sender, e)
                If e.KeyCode = Keys.Escape Then
                    _txtSearch.Clear()
                    e.Handled = True
                End If
            End Sub

        Dim btnClearSearch As New Button() With {.Text = "Clear", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler btnClearSearch.Click, Sub() _txtSearch.Clear()

        Dim btnAdd As New Button() With {.Text = "Add (Ins)", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler btnAdd.Click, Sub() AddEvent()

        Dim btnDelete As New Button() With {.Text = "Delete (Del)", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler btnDelete.Click, Sub() DeleteSelected()

        Dim btnReload As New Button() With {.Text = "Reload (Ctrl+R)", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler btnReload.Click,
            Sub()
                LoadAllData()
                BindGridForCurrentMonth()
            End Sub

        Dim btnRepair As New Button() With {.Text = "Repair (Ctrl+Shift+R)", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler btnRepair.Click, Sub() RepairDatesPms()

        nav.Controls.Add(btnPrev)
        nav.Controls.Add(btnNext)
        nav.Controls.Add(_lblMonth)
        nav.Controls.Add(lblGo)
        nav.Controls.Add(_dtJump)
        nav.Controls.Add(btnGo)
        nav.Controls.Add(New Label() With {.AutoSize = True, .Text = "   "})
        nav.Controls.Add(lblSearch)
        nav.Controls.Add(_txtSearch)
        nav.Controls.Add(btnClearSearch)
        nav.Controls.Add(New Label() With {.AutoSize = True, .Text = "   "})
        nav.Controls.Add(btnAdd)
        nav.Controls.Add(btnDelete)
        nav.Controls.Add(btnReload)
        nav.Controls.Add(btnRepair)

        _grid = New DataGridView() With {
            .Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
            .ReadOnly = True,
            .AllowUserToAddRows = False,
            .AllowUserToDeleteRows = False,
            .SelectionMode = DataGridViewSelectionMode.FullRowSelect,
            .MultiSelect = True,
            .AutoGenerateColumns = False,
            .AutoSizeColumnsMode = DataGridViewAutoSizeColumnsMode.Fill
        }

        _grid.Columns.Clear()
        _grid.Columns.Add(New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn() With {
            .Name = "Date",
            .HeaderText = "Date",
            .AutoSizeMode = DataGridViewAutoSizeColumnMode.None,
            .Width = 95
        })
        _grid.Columns.Add(New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn() With {
            .Name = "Day",
            .HeaderText = "Day",
            .AutoSizeMode = DataGridViewAutoSizeColumnMode.None,
            .Width = 55
        })
        _grid.Columns.Add(New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn() With {
            .Name = "Event",
            .HeaderText = "Event"
        })

        body.Controls.Add(nav, 0, 0)
        body.Controls.Add(_grid, 0, 1)

        ' Footer
        Dim footer As New TableLayoutPanel() With {
            .Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
            .ColumnCount = 2,
            .RowCount = 1
        }
        footer.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.Percent, 100.0F))
        footer.ColumnStyles.Add(New ColumnStyle(SizeType.AutoSize))

        _lblStatus = New Label() With {.AutoSize = True}

        Dim btnClose As New Button() With {.Text = "Close (Esc)", .AutoSize = True}
        AddHandler btnClose.Click, Sub() Me.Close()

        footer.Controls.Add(_lblStatus, 0, 0)
        footer.Controls.Add(btnClose, 1, 0)

        root.Controls.Add(header, 0, 0)
        root.Controls.Add(body, 0, 1)
        root.Controls.Add(footer, 0, 2)

        Me.Controls.Clear()
        Me.Controls.Add(root)

        ' Update clock display
        Dim t As New Timer() With {.Interval = 1000}
        AddHandler t.Tick,
            Sub()
                If _lblHeaderRight IsNot Nothing Then
                    _lblHeaderRight.Text = DateTime.Now.ToString("MM-dd-yy  ddd  h:mm tt", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)
                End If
            End Sub
        t.Start()
    End Sub

    Private Sub RefreshMonthLabel()
        If _lblMonth IsNot Nothing Then
            _lblMonth.Text = _viewMonth.ToString("MMMM yyyy", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub SyncJumpPicker()
        If _dtJump IsNot Nothing Then
            _dtJump.Value = _viewMonth
        End If
    End Sub

    ' =========================
    ' Month navigation
    ' =========================
    Private Sub PrevMonth()
        GoToMonth(_viewMonth.AddMonths(-1))
    End Sub

    Private Sub NextMonth()
        GoToMonth(_viewMonth.AddMonths(1))
    End Sub

    Private Sub GoToMonth(newMonth As DateTime)
        _viewMonth = New DateTime(newMonth.Year, newMonth.Month, 1)
        SyncJumpPicker()
        RefreshMonthLabel()
        BindGridForCurrentMonth()
        SaveViewMonthToPmsNum()
    End Sub

    ' =========================
    ' Data I/O
    ' =========================
    Private Function EnsureDataDirExistsFriendly() As Boolean
        Try
            If Directory.Exists(DataDir) Then Return True

            MessageBox.Show("Personal Calendar cannot open because the data folder is not available:" & Environment.NewLine &
                            DataDir,
                            "Personal Calendar",
                            MessageBoxButtons.OK,
                            MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Return False
        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("Personal Calendar cannot access the data folder:" & Environment.NewLine &
                            DataDir & Environment.NewLine & Environment.NewLine &
                            ex.Message,
                            "Personal Calendar",
                            MessageBoxButtons.OK,
                            MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Return False
        End Try
    End Function

    Private Sub EnsureFilesExist()
        Try
            If Not File.Exists(DatesPmsPath) Then
                ' Header line (legacy PMS seems to include this)
                Dim headerLine = ToBasicWriteLine(New String() {New String("1"c, 60), "1", "31"})
                File.WriteAllText(DatesPmsPath, headerLine & Environment.NewLine, Encoding.ASCII)
            End If

            If Not File.Exists(PmsNumPath) Then
                ' flag, lastDate, count
                Dim initLine = ToBasicWriteLine(New String() {"0", DateTime.Today.ToString("MM-dd-yyyy", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture), "0"})
                File.WriteAllText(PmsNumPath, initLine & Environment.NewLine, Encoding.ASCII)
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("Could not create/open PMS files in:" & Environment.NewLine &
                            DataDir & Environment.NewLine & Environment.NewLine &
                            ex.Message,
                            "Personal Calendar",
                            MessageBoxButtons.OK,
                            MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Me.Close()
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub EnsureBackupsExist()
        Try
            If File.Exists(DatesPmsPath) AndAlso Not File.Exists(DatesPmsBakPath) Then
                File.Copy(DatesPmsPath, DatesPmsBakPath, overwrite:=False)
            End If
        Catch
        End Try

        Try
            If File.Exists(PmsNumPath) AndAlso Not File.Exists(PmsNumBakPath) Then
                File.Copy(PmsNumPath, PmsNumBakPath, overwrite:=False)
            End If
        Catch
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub LoadAllData()
        _allEntries.Clear()

        Dim lines = File.ReadAllLines(DatesPmsPath, Encoding.ASCII).
            Select(Function(l) StripDosEofOnly(l).Trim()).
            Where(Function(l) l.Length > 0).
            ToList()

        If lines.Count = 0 Then
            UpdateStatus(0)
            Return
        End If

        Dim startIndex As Integer = 0

        ' Detect optional header: "11111...1",1,31
        Dim headerParts = ParseBasicWriteLine(lines(0))
        If headerParts.Count >= 3 Then
            Dim mask = headerParts(0)
            If Not String.IsNullOrEmpty(mask) AndAlso mask.All(Function(ch) ch = "1"c) Then
                startIndex = 1
            End If
        End If

        For i As Integer = startIndex To lines.Count - 1
            Dim parts = ParseBasicWriteLine(lines(i))
            If parts.Count < 2 Then Continue For

            Dim dtText = parts(0)
            Dim txt = parts(1)

            Dim dt As DateTime
            If DateTime.TryParseExact(dtText, "MM-dd-yyyy", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, DateTimeStyles.None, dt) Then
                _allEntries.Add(New PmsEntry With {
                    .StoredDate = dt.Date,
                    .Text = If(txt, "").Trim()
                })
            End If
        Next

        UpdateStatus(-1)
    End Sub

    ' =========================
    ' Leap-year-safe bind + Search filter
    ' =========================
    Private Sub BindGridForCurrentMonth()
        Dim month As Integer = _viewMonth.Month
        Dim year As Integer = _viewMonth.Year

        Dim q As String = ""
        If _txtSearch IsNot Nothing Then q = _txtSearch.Text.Trim()

        Dim rows As List(Of GridRow) =
            _allEntries.
                Where(Function(e) e.StoredDate.Month = month).
                Where(Function(e)
                          If q.Length = 0 Then Return True
                          Return e.Text.IndexOf(q, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) >= 0
                      End Function).
                Select(Function(e)
                           Dim occ As DateTime
                           Try
                               occ = New DateTime(year, e.StoredDate.Month, e.StoredDate.Day)
                           Catch
                               ' e.g., 02-29 in non-leap year: skip
                               Return Nothing
                           End Try

                           Return New GridRow With {
                               .OccurrenceDate = occ,
                               .DayName = occ.ToString("ddd", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture),
                               .Text = e.Text,
                               .StoredDate = e.StoredDate
                           }
                       End Function).
                Where(Function(r) r IsNot Nothing).
                OrderBy(Function(r) r.OccurrenceDate.Day).
                ThenBy(Function(r) r.Text).
                ToList()

        _grid.Rows.Clear()
        For Each r In rows
            Dim dateDisplay As String = r.OccurrenceDate.ToString("MM-dd-yy", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)
            Dim idx = _grid.Rows.Add(dateDisplay, r.DayName, r.Text)
            _grid.Rows(idx).Tag = r
        Next

        UpdateStatus(rows.Count, q)
    End Sub

    Private Sub UpdateStatus(Optional monthCount As Integer = -1, Optional search As String = "")
        Dim sb As New StringBuilder()
        sb.Append($"Total entries: {_allEntries.Count}")
        If monthCount >= 0 Then sb.Append($"   This month: {monthCount}")
        If Not String.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(search) Then sb.Append($"   Filter: ""{search}""")
        sb.Append("   PgUp/PgDn = Month   Ctrl+F = Search   Ins = Add   Del = Delete   Ctrl+R = Reload   Ctrl+Shift+R = Repair   Esc = Close")
        _lblStatus.Text = sb.ToString()
    End Sub

    Private Sub LoadViewMonthFromPmsNum()
        Try
            Dim raw = StripDosEofOnly(File.ReadAllText(PmsNumPath, Encoding.ASCII)).Trim()
            If raw.Length = 0 Then Return

            Dim parts = ParseBasicWriteLine(raw)
            If parts.Count < 2 Then Return

            Dim dtText = parts(1)
            Dim dt As DateTime
            If DateTime.TryParseExact(dtText, "MM-dd-yyyy", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, DateTimeStyles.None, dt) Then
                _viewMonth = New DateTime(DateTime.Today.Year, dt.Month, 1)
            End If
        Catch
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub SaveViewMonthToPmsNum()
        Try
            Dim lastDate = New DateTime(DateTime.Today.Year, _viewMonth.Month, 1).
                ToString("MM-dd-yyyy", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)

            Dim count = _allEntries.Count.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)

            Dim line = ToBasicWriteLine(New String() {"0", lastDate, count})
            WithLock(PmsNumLockPath,
                     Sub()
                         WriteAllTextAtomic(PmsNumPath, PmsNumTmpPath, PmsNumBakPath, line & Environment.NewLine, Encoding.ASCII)
                     End Sub,
                     friendlyName:="PMS.NUM")
        Catch
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' =========================
    ' Add / Delete (with lock)
    ' =========================
    Private Sub AddEvent()
        Using dlg As New AddEventDialog(_viewMonth)
            If dlg.ShowDialog(Me) <> DialogResult.OK Then Return

            Dim md = dlg.SelectedMonthDay
            Dim text = dlg.EventText.Trim()

            ' Store with a neutral year (recurring list; year doesn't matter for inclusion)
            Dim stored = New DateTime(1993, md.Month, md.Day)

            WithLock(DatesPmsLockPath,
                     Sub()
                         ' Reload under lock so we don't overwrite someone else
                         LoadAllData()
                         _allEntries.Add(New PmsEntry With {.StoredDate = stored, .Text = text})
                         SaveDatesPms_NoLock() ' already under lock
                     End Sub,
                     friendlyName:="DATES.PMS")

            LoadAllData()
            BindGridForCurrentMonth()
            SaveViewMonthToPmsNum()
        End Using
    End Sub

    Private Sub DeleteSelected()
        If _grid.SelectedRows.Count = 0 Then Return

        If MessageBox.Show($"Delete {_grid.SelectedRows.Count} selected event(s)?",
                           "Personal Calendar",
                           MessageBoxButtons.YesNo,
                           MessageBoxIcon.Warning) <> DialogResult.Yes Then
            Return
        End If

        Dim selected As New List(Of GridRow)()
        For Each r As DataGridViewRow In _grid.SelectedRows
            Dim gr = TryCast(r.Tag, GridRow)
            If gr IsNot Nothing Then selected.Add(gr)
        Next
        If selected.Count = 0 Then Return

        WithLock(DatesPmsLockPath,
                 Sub()
                     LoadAllData() ' reload under lock

                     For Each s In selected
                         Dim idx = _allEntries.FindIndex(Function(e) e.StoredDate = s.StoredDate AndAlso String.Equals(e.Text, s.Text, StringComparison.Ordinal))
                         If idx >= 0 Then _allEntries.RemoveAt(idx)
                     Next

                     SaveDatesPms_NoLock() ' already under lock
                 End Sub,
                 friendlyName:="DATES.PMS")

        LoadAllData()
        BindGridForCurrentMonth()
        SaveViewMonthToPmsNum()
    End Sub

    Private Sub SaveDatesPms()
        WithLock(DatesPmsLockPath, Sub() SaveDatesPms_NoLock(), friendlyName:="DATES.PMS")
    End Sub

    Private Sub SaveDatesPms_NoLock()
        Dim sb As New StringBuilder()

        sb.AppendLine(ToBasicWriteLine(New String() {New String("1"c, 60), "1", "31"}))

        For Each e In _allEntries.
```
